      <media:content url="https://wwr-pro.s3.amazonaws.com/logos/0171/4810/logo.gif" type="image/png"/>
      <title>Kogan.com: AI Automation & Architecture Lead</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state>Victoria</state>
      <skills>Artificial Intelligence (AI), AI Strategy, AI Agents, and Agentic AI</skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description><img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/4810/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" />

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Kogan.com
    <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://www.kogan.com">http://www.kogan.com</a>
</p>

<p><strong>AI Automation &amp; Architecture Lead</strong></p>
<p><strong></strong></p>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal leading-[1.7]">Kogan.com is Australia's largest pure-play online retailer, a publicly listed, high-scale eCommerce platform serving millions of customers.&nbsp;</p>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal leading-[1.7]">This is a fully remote role open to US-based candidates. You'll be expected to visit our Melbourne HQ a few times a year to collaborate in person with the team. Flights and accommodation covered. Melbourne consistently ranks among the world's most liveable cities and is famous for its food, coffee culture, and tech scene.</p>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal leading-[1.7]">In this role, you get focused remote work from home plus genuine in-person time with a sharp, tight-knit&nbsp; team building real things at scale. If you fall in love with the city after your visits and want to relocate, we're open to that conversation, including visa sponsorship for the right person.</p>
<p><strong>This is not a standard AI role.&nbsp;</strong></p>
<p>Are you an AI visionary who can vibe code at the speed of thought? Do you live and breathe autonomous agents, process optimization, and the bleeding edge of LLM capabilities?</p>
<p>At Kogan.com, we are looking for an elite AI specialist to become our internal evangelist and lead our artificial intelligence transformation. Reporting directly to the CEO and CTO, you will have a unique mandate: work on top-priority special projects at the executive level, while simultaneously partnering with every department across the business to ruthlessly optimise our operations.</p>
<p>We aren't just looking for someone who can write ChatGPT prompts. We need an architect who can deploy highly autonomous "God-Mode" agents (like OpenClaw, OpenHands, N8N and CrewAI) securely within a massive e-commerce infrastructure. If you know how to build multi-agent swarms, implement strict security sandboxes, and want to shape the future of Australia's leading retail pioneer, we want you on the team.</p>
<p><strong>What you’ll be doing:</strong></p>
<p><strong></strong></p>
<ul>
<li>Serving as Kogan.com’s AI Evangelist, driving adoption and innovation across the entire organization.</li>
<li>Working one-on-one with the CEO/CTO on high-impact, special projects to give us an unfair competitive advantage.</li>
<li>Rapidly prototyping and deploying production-ready software using AI-assisted "vibe coding."</li>
<li>Architecting and deploying autonomous agents (OpenClaw, OpenHands, LangGraph) to automate complex workflows in supply chain, marketing, and customer service.</li>
<li>Designing Human-in-the-Loop (HITL) workflows to ensure AI bots have appropriate guardrails and approval gates before executing high-stakes production tasks.</li>
<li>Connecting AI agents securely to our e-commerce stack, ERPs, CRM, and internal databases.</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>What you'll need:</strong></p>
<p><strong></strong></p>
<ul>
<li>Strong foundation in computer science, systems architecture, and API integrations.</li>
<li>Proven experience with the absolute latest AI automation tools, multi-agent frameworks, and advanced workflow builders (n8n, Make.com).</li>
<li>Deep understanding of AI security protocols, containerization (Docker), and permission allowlists to protect enterprise data from prompt injections and rogue agent behavior.</li>
<li>Strong commercial awareness of LLM API costs to prevent resource drain and optimize token usage.</li>
<li>A relentless passion for AI and a habit of staying three steps ahead of industry trends.</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>Apply now and help us build the future of retail.</strong></p>
<p><strong>Why Kogan.com:</strong></p>
<p><strong></strong></p>
<ul>
<li>You will have direct access to executive decision-making, real scale, and the freedom to build.</li>
<li>This is an opportunity to define how AI is actually used inside one of Australia’s leading digital retailers, not just experiment on the sidelines.</li>
<li>Our culture is unlike anywhere else and regardless of where you are in your career journey, we empower you to do your best work and have a big impact. Check out&nbsp;<a class="postings-link" href="https://devblog.kogan.com/">https://devblog.kogan.com/</a>&nbsp;and&nbsp;<a class="postings-link" href="https://goodteams.app/engineering/kogan.com">https://goodteams.app/engineering/kogan.com</a>.</li>
<li>Work with an incredible team to solve important challenges, helping to drive Australia and New Zealand’s eCommerce future.</li>
<li>Your role has a lot of ownership, autonomy and little red tape. You’ll be empowered to achieve positive outcomes and your work will have a real impact.</li>
<li>You’ll be at the forefront of the eCommerce industry and be part of a company that are the Pioneers of eCommerce in Australia.</li>
<li>Be an Intrepreneur, playing a hands on role in shaping our strategy at our HQ.</li>
<li>A range of employee benefits such as; Meaningful Learning budget. Complimentary Kogan First Membership, team exclusive discounts, Health &amp; Wellness program, Learning &amp; Development and Lunch &amp; Learns, Hackathons, Team member referral program, Company and team events and celebrations, community engagement (volunteering) and extensive career development opportunities plus loads more!</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>About Us:</strong></p>
<p></p>
<div><strong>AI-enabled. Human-driven. Shipping smarter every day.</strong></div>
<div><br>Kogan.com is a pioneer of Australian eCommerce. Our vision is to use and build technology to deliver personalised, innovative and fast customer experiences. We are pragmatic in our solutions, scalable in our architecture, strong on quality and not afraid to fail fast.</div>
<div>&nbsp;</div>
<div>As a team, we are empowered to make change, share our views and build each other’s capability. We see where AI is heading and we are building towards it. We keep testing, learning and embedding new capabilities into our stack where they add value. It supports our engineers to move faster, make better decisions and focus on solving the right problems, increasing their impact. The software we build, including&nbsp;<a href="https://www.kogan.com">www.kogan.com</a>, is used by millions of customers, so this role has real impact. You will be a key member of a fast paced, independent and ambitious team, working across the full tech stack. We believe in using and building technology to improve the online shopping experience, and we are driven by seeing our software shipped to production every day.</div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/kogan-com-ai-automation-architecture-lead">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/kogan-com-ai-automation-architecture-lead</a></p>
</description>

    <item>
      <title>Discord: Product Design Manager, Engagement</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> San Francisco, CA or Remote (U.S.)
</p>

<div class="job__description body"><div><p>Discord is used by over 200 million people every month for many different reasons, but there’s one thing that nearly everyone does on our platform:<strong> play video games.</strong> Over 90% of our users play games, spending a combined 1.5 billion hours playing thousands of unique titles on Discord each month. Discord plays a uniquely important role in the future of gaming. We are focused on making it easier and more fun for people to talk and hang out before, during, and after playing games.</p></div><div><p>The Engagement organization at Discord is focused on deepening user engagement and retention—ensuring that as we bring in new users, they stick around and make Discord an irreplaceable part of their daily lives. We work on Discord's core social systems: voice and messaging. Our mission is to drive repeatable mechanisms that increase engagement across both our core desktop gaming audience and emerging segments like mobile gamers.</p><br><p>We're looking for an experienced Product Design Manager to lead a team of designers working on one of these strategic themes. You'll manage designers tackling challenges like making voice calls more discoverable and engaging, creating social feedback loops that keep conversations going, or ensuring Discord's foundational experiences remain world-class.</p><br><p>As a Design Manager, you'll independently lead your team across a single domain, balancing strategic thinking with hands-on craft leadership. You'll work closely with cross-functional partners in Product and Engineering to translate Engagement's strategy into delightful user experiences, while developing your designers and maintaining Discord's high quality bar.</p><br><p><strong><br>What You'll Be Doing</strong></p><br><ul><br><li>Develop a team of highly-engaged designers by coaching and instilling a sense of ownership and impact.</li><br><li>Provide direction and guidance of product designers' output, promote partnerships and design process.</li><br><li>Build close bonds with your corresponding engineering and product management leaders to influence product strategy and ensure world-class product execution.</li><br><li>Partner with Staff+ designers and XFN partners to define and refine the design portions of the roadmap, ensuring work is appropriately broken down and prioritized.</li><br><li>Set a strong pace for the team and foster a culture of quality by balancing holistic thinking with feature impact, cutting scope when needed without compromising quality.</li><br><li>Make sound first-principle decisions around resourcing and team composition, adapting to changing needs or tuning team dynamics.</li><br><li>Drive design excellence within your team and owned systems; mentor designers on user-centric thinking and risk mitigation.</li><br><li>Occasionally be hands-on with design work, pitching in to support your team and keep them focused on deeper work—however this is primarily a management role.</li><br></ul><br><p><strong>What you should have</strong></p><br><ul><br><li>2+ years of experience as a Design Manager and/or have led at least 2 Product Designers previously within a design team.</li><br><li>6+ years experience in multi-platform digital products as a Product Designer (or similar role). Especially fluent with mobile product development and consumer products, with experience using prototyping tools to demonstrate product concepts.</li><br><li>A portfolio of work you've designed and shipped as well as examples of work you directed delivered by your team. Examples of how you have previously influenced your product teams, organizations or discipline.</li><br><li>An enjoyment of people leadership. This includes recruiting, training and developing, organization design, and leading by example.</li><br><li>Strong eye for craft. You can identify when work can benefit from more time or investment, identifying gaps in visual or interaction design.</li><br><li>History of strong partnerships with engineering and product management leadership.</li><br><li>You thrive in ambiguous environments and get excited about figuring out strategies or processes to address them—both in product and internal team structures.</li><br><li>You are a first principles thinker that can work with others to come up with pragmatic solutions.</li><br><li>Designing yourself does not scare you, and you're happy to jump in to help if needed. You are still a designer even if you don't do it all the time.</li><br></ul><br><p><em><br>The US base salary range for this full-time position is $220,000 to $247,500 + equity + benefits. Our salary ranges are determined by role and level. Within the range, individual pay is determined by additional factors, including job-related skills, experience, and relevant education or training. Please note that the compensation details listed in US role postings reflect the base salary only, and do not include equity, or benefits.<br></em></p></div><div><p><strong>Why Discord?&nbsp;</strong><br><br>Discord plays a uniquely important role in the future of gaming. We're a multiplatform, multigenerational and multiplayer platform that helps people deepen their friendships around games and shared interests. We believe games give us a way to have fun with our favorite people, whether listening to music together or grinding in competitive matches for diamond rank. <strong>Join us in our mission! Your future is just a click away!</strong></p><br><p><strong>Discord is committed to inclusion and providing reasonable accommodations during the interview process. </strong>We want you to feel set up for success, so if you are in need of reasonable accommodations, please let your recruiter know.</p><br><p><em><strong>Please see our Applicant and Candidate Privacy Policy for details regarding Discord’s collection and usage of personal information relating to the application and recruitment process by clicking&nbsp;<a href="https://discord.com/terms/applicant-candidate-privacy-policy">HERE.</a></strong></em></p></div></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/discord-product-design-manager-engagement">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/discord-product-design-manager-engagement</a></p>
</description>

      <title>Jimdo: Head of Experience Design</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Germany
</p>

<h2><strong>About Jimdo<br></strong></h2><p>We exist to unleash the power of the self-employed - helping solopreneurs and micro-businesses thrive by doing what they're passionate about and removing the complexity of building lasting, successful businesses.</p><p>Jimdo started in 2007 when three school friends built a website builder in a Northern German farmhouse to help everyone build a presence online. Today, we're a profitable, remote-first company with 220+ people from 50+ nationalities working across 15+ countries. We've helped build over 36 million websites to get online across the world.</p><p>We're more than just a website builder. We're an AI-powered platform that helps self-employed people actually run and build successful businesses — from getting found online, winning customers and running their business with a peace of mind by knowing exactly what to do next to move forward.</p><p>At the heart of Jimdo is a strong belief in personalized, data-driven guidance. Our platform combines design, business tools, and an AI-powered core that turns real customer data into clear insights and next steps helping our customers focus on what moves their business forward.<br></p><h2><strong>Role Overview :</strong></h2><p>This role exists to build on the strong design foundation already in place at Jimdo and help evolve it further as the company scales, changes focus to a multiproduct platform, and our AI capabilities mature.</p><p>As Head of Design, you will lead and develop our Product Design function, with a focus on simplicity, usability, and customer outcomes for solopreneurs and micro-businesses. You will ensure design is deeply embedded in how we understand customer problems, shape product strategy, and deliver coherent experiences across the customer lifecycle working closely with our VP of Product &amp; Design on building out this vision.</p><p>A defining aspect of the role is advancing how AI is used within design, not to replace craft or judgment, but to remove low-value iteration, increase leverage, and allow designers to focus on higher-impact work leading to customer success.</p><p></p><h2><strong>Your impact:</strong></h2><ul><li><p>Set clear design direction that raises the quality, clarity, and consistency of product experiences, grounded in the needs of solopreneurs and micro-businesses.</p></li><li><p>Ensure design is a strong partner in problem definition, shaping product strategy—not just executing solutions.</p></li><li><p>Lead the evolution of AI-enabled design practices to increase speed, reduce low-value iteration, and improve outcomes without compromising craft.</p></li><li><p>Own and evolve the design system in close partnership with Product and Engineering, balancing consistency, scalability, and innovation.</p></li><li><p>Take a holistic view of the end-to-end customer experience across product touchpoints and the broader lifecycle.</p></li><li><p>Partner closely with Marketing and Brand to ensure alignment across product experience, content, narrative, and visual language.</p></li><li><p>Lead, coach, and grow a senior Product Design team, fostering a culture of quality, curiosity, and continuous improvement.</p></li><li><p>Work cross-functionally with Product and Engineering leadership to support effective discovery, prioritisation, and execution.</p></li></ul><h2><strong>What you bring:</strong></h2><ul><li><p>Senior leadership experience building and scaling high-performing product design teams.</p></li><li><p>A strong point of view on simplicity, usability, and user-centered design.</p></li><li><p>Demonstrated ability to evolve design systems and experience quality at scale across the full customer journey.</p></li><li><p>Practical experience integrating AI into design workflows to improve speed and outcomes.</p></li><li><p>Deep empathy for small businesses, solopreneurs, or similarly constrained customer segments.</p></li><li><p>Comfort operating across product, brand, content, and lifecycle design.</p></li><li><p>Strong collaboration skills and a systems-thinking mindset.</p></li><li><p>High standards, clear taste, and the ability to raise the bar without creating friction.</p></li><li><p>Experience in optimising for conversion while not detracting from usability.</p></li></ul><p></p><h2><strong>What we offer:<br></strong></h2><p><strong>Inspiring Mission:</strong> At our core, we are driven by a meaningful mission - to&nbsp; empower solopreneurs and small businesses to succeed and&nbsp; to contribute to the sustainability and vibrancy of the communities they serve.</p><p><strong>Flexibility and Trust:</strong> Our work environment thrives on flexibility and trust. We offer fully remote work set-up&nbsp; with opportunities for in-person collaboration. You can manage your working hours flexibly because we prioritize the results you deliver over the number of hours you put in.&nbsp;</p><p><strong>An International Diverse Team:</strong> Our team is a mosaic of over 248 individuals hailing from 50+ different countries and working across 15+ diverse locations. We take pride in our openness and inclusivity, with an Employee-led DEI Council and active ERGs that ensure everyone's voices are heard.</p><p><strong>Continuous&nbsp; Growth and Career Development:</strong> We invest in your growth with company-wide access to LinkedIn Learning and  Coaching. From day one, you have the chance to contribute your ideas and create a meaningful impact. Our flat hierarchies and swift decision-making processes provide an open platform for your career progression.</p><p></p><p><strong>Competitive Benefits Package:&nbsp;</strong></p><ul><li><p>Annual compensation reviews to ensure you're rewarded fairly.</p></li><li><p>A remote office set-up bonus to enhance your workspace.</p></li><li><p>A unique workation policy that allows you to work from different locations.</p></li><li><p>An employee assistance program, offering resources and counseling.</p></li><li><p>Plus, a perk that keeps giving: up to three free Jimdo websites for your personal or professional projects that you get to keep forever.</p></li></ul><p></p><p><em>Jimdo is proud to be an equal opportunity employer. This means that we don’t discriminate based on race or ethnic origin, color, the language(s) you speak, where you (or your parents) are from, or whether or not you consider yourself to have a disability. Neither will your age, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, religion, beliefs, or political opinions play a part in your application with us. Our diverse team values and celebrates the uniqueness of each individual. We embrace differences and believe that they enrich our organization, making us stronger and more innovative. Join us, and let's continue to create a workplace where everyone can thrive, regardless of background or identity.</em></p><p><em><br>By sending your application, you declare that you read and understand the </em><a href="https://www.jimdo.com/info/privacy-applicants/?_ncr=true"><em>Jimdo Applicant Privacy Policy</em></a></p>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/jimdo-head-of-experience-design">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/jimdo-head-of-experience-design</a></p>
</description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Cairo, Cairo Governorate, Egypt
</p>

<p><strong>Description:</strong><br> Designing system architectures and technical solutions to ensure scalability, stability, and security, while aligning solutions with business requirements.</p><p><strong>Key Responsibilities:</strong></p><ul><li> Design system and application architectures (High-Level &amp; Low-Level Design). </li><li> Analyze requirements and translate them into executable architectural solutions. </li><li> Define design standards and technical governance. </li><li> Design system and service integrations (APIs / Integration). </li><li> Review technical decisions and development team deliverables. </li><li> Support implementation teams and resolve architectural challenges. </li><li> Document architecture and technical diagrams.</li></ul> <p></p><p><strong>Requirements:</strong></p><ul><li> Minimum of 10 years of experience in System Design or Solution Architecture. </li><li> Experience designing large and complex systems. </li><li> Strong understanding of architectural principles (Scalability, Availability, Security). </li><li> Experience with Microservices or SOA. </li><li> Good knowledge of design patterns and databases. </li><li> Strong communication skills and ability to work with multiple teams. </li><li> Strong communication skills and ability to work within a team. </li></ul><p></p><p></p>

    <item>
      <title>Sai Group Ltd: Customer Support Executive  AI Platform</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Kolkata, West Bengal, India
</p>

<p>We are looking for a <span>Customer Support Executive</span> to assist users of our AI-based platform that enables database connections, file uploads, and conversational interaction with data. The ideal candidate will help customers resolve technical issues, understand product features, and ensure a smooth user experience.<br><br><span>Key Responsibilities:</span><br>• Assist users with <span>connecting databases</span> (MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, etc.)<br>• Help customers <span>upload files</span> (CSV, Excel, etc.) and query them using AI chat<br>• Troubleshoot basic <span>technical and usage issues</span><br>• Guide users through <span>product features and workflows</span><br>• Respond to customer queries via <span>chat, email, or ticketing system</span><br>• Escalate bugs or complex issues to the technical team with clear details<br>• Maintain logs of customer issues and resolutions<br>• Collect user feedback and share insights with the product team<br><br><span>Required Skills:</span><br>• Good <span>communication skills</span> (written &amp; verbal)<br>• Basic understanding of <span>databases and file formats</span><br>• Familiarity with <span>AI tools / chat-based systems</span> is a plus<br>• Ability to understand technical problems and explain solutions simply<br>• Customer-first mindset and problem-solving attitude<br><br><span>Preferred Qualifications:</span><br>• Experience in <span>SaaS / AI / Tech support</span><br>• Basic knowledge of <span>SQL queries</span><br>• Understanding of <span>APIs and data workflows</span><br>• Prior experience with <span>customer support tools</span> (Freshdesk, Zendesk, Jira, etc.)<br><br><span>What We Offer:</span><br>• Opportunity to work with an <span>AI-driven product</span><br>• Learning and growth in <span>AI, data, and SaaS platforms</span><br>• Collaborative and fast-growing start-up environment<br>• Competitive salary (as per experience)</p>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/sai-group-ltd-customer-support-executive-ai-platform">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/sai-group-ltd-customer-support-executive-ai-platform</a></p>
</description>

We operate in 30+ countries and from 90+ countries, and support customers in 60 languages, helping SaaS, software, and hardware brands deliver secure, world-class customer and technical support.</p><p>Right now, we’re expanding our <strong>talent bench</strong> — a pool of skilled Customer Support Consultants who want to grow with us and be the first in line when new projects open.<br>If you’re ready to join a multicultural, multilingual community and grow professionally while working from home, this could be your next step.</p><p><strong>What you will do:</strong></p><ul><li>Deliver outstanding customer support via calls, chats and emails</li><li>Build strong and lasting customer relationships</li><li>Keep up with evolving tools and technology</li><li>Handle sensitive customer data with care and security</li><li>Apply the latest and greatest customer happiness practices</li><li>Maintain deep understanding of client solutions and meet KPI</li><li>Communicate with developers and cross-functional specialists</li></ul><p><strong>What you need to succeed in this role: </strong></p><ul><li>Native Norwegian and good English communication skills (at B2 level or higher)</li><li><strong>6+ months of experience in customer support role</strong></li><li>CRM systems expertise</li><li>Strong analytical thinking and research skills</li><li>Positive, proactive and responsible attitude</li><li>Personal computer (at least 8Gb of RAM) with a stable internet connection (minimum 50 Mbps–download and 40 Mbps–upload)</li></ul><p><strong>Will be a great plus: </strong></p><ul><li>Experience in technical support</li></ul><p><strong>What you get in return:</strong></p><ul><li>Provide services during flexible hours</li><li>Opportunity to cooperate fully <strong>remotely</strong></li><li>Inclusive international environment</li><li>Compensation in USD</li><li>Rewards for referring friends</li><li>Balance between project workload and personal time, but also –&nbsp;internal health policy</li><li>Responsive leadership interested in your development and long-lasting cooperation</li><li>Greenhouse conditions for self-development</li><li>A culture built on trust, with no time-tracking requirements</li></ul><p><a href="http://www.supportyourapp.com/"></a>If this is about you — let’s get to know each other before 2026 opens its doors. We can simply exchange ideas or talk through the opportunities for our growth together </p><p>*Benefits and conditions may vary depending on the terms of your engagement. Some benefits typically apply to employees; independent contractors may not be eligible for all of them. Final terms will be clearly defined in your agreement if selected.</p><p><em>We adhere to the principles of equal treatment of candidates and prohibit discrimination on any grounds protected by law.</em></p><p><em>Your personal data will be processed as described in the SupportYourApp </em><a href="https://supportyourapp.com/candidate-privacy-notice/"><em>Candidate Privacy Notice</em></a><em>.</em></p>

    <item>
      <title>Rubrik: Sales Engineering Manager, Cloud Product Line Specialists</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> United States
</p>

<div class=""><br><p class="p3"></p><br><p class="p3"><strong>About Team &amp; About Role:</strong></p><br><p class="p3"><span>Rubrik’s sales organization is a united group of elite cross-functional sales professionals that help companies &amp; government entities achieve resilience against cyberattacks, malicious insiders, and operational disruptions. We offer continuous professional development through our world class sales enablement program and our One Rubrik selling approach provides all the resources you need to exceed your goals, maximize your earnings potential and take your career to the next level. All this while doing something that truly matters, protecting the world's data.</span> &nbsp;</p><br><p class="p3">Rubrik is looking for a Sales Engineering Manager to lead a team of Cloud Specialist Sales Engineers and provide technical direction and business guidance to the regional sales team. You will be accountable for regional revenue goals, recruiting and hiring top talent, enabling Sales Engineers to be best in business and by driving innovative technical programs and overseeing day-to-day account-level activities. You will be responsible for evangelizing, positioning, and architecting the industry's first hyper-converged hybrid cloud data management platform for both existing customers and new accounts.&nbsp;</p><br><p class="p4"><strong>What You’ll Do: </strong></p><br><ul class="ul1"><br><li class="li6">Leads a team of Sales Engineers across the Americas region</li><br><li class="li6">Responsible for recruiting, hiring and enabling top SE’s as we expand our coverage</li><br><li class="li6">Provide Technical Leadership and direction to the Sales Teams in the Region to help them build technology solutions for our customers and prospective customers.</li><br><li class="li6">Assists in the analysis, design and development of fully integrated technology solutions.</li><br><li class="li6">Demonstrates technical leadership and subject matter expertise on Rubrik’s products, distributed architectures, file systems, and competitive storage offerings in the Cloud and NAS product space.</li><br><li class="li6">Acts as technical expert</li><br><li class="li6">Makes technical and sales presentations to customer's technical staff and senior management.</li><br><li class="li6">Serves as a trusted technology advisor to customers and serves as an internal resource on technical issues or specific business applications within an assigned market segment.</li><br><li class="li6">Successfully builds relationships with the account team, partners and customers in support of sales team objectives and engages and leverages corporate resources, abilities, budgets and personnel as appropriate.</li><br></ul><br><p class="p9"><strong>Experience You’ll Need</strong><span>: </span></p><br><ul><br><li><span class="s1">3-5 years of sales engineering management experience preferably in a Cloud Infrastructure environments, working with AWS, Azure and GCP</span></li><br><li><span class="s1">Driven – need for success, highly energetic with a strong hands-on, “can do” approach.</span></li><br><li><span class="s1">The successful candidate must have a fundamental breadth of technical knowledge in cloud data management, backup and disaster recovery and data analytics.</span></li><br><li><span class="s1">Entrepreneurial - willing to go the extra mile, strong work ethic, resourceful, “get it done” attitude</span></li><br><li><span class="s1">Strives in moving in a fast-paced environment; including handling multiple calls/demos per day with immediate follow up.</span></li><br><li><span class="s1">A high level of business acumen and experience working with Cx0 level personnel, bringing technology solutions to solve business challenges.</span></li><br><li><span class="s1">Smart, adaptable and open-minded</span></li><br><li><span class="s1">Bachelor’s degree required or equivalent experience</span></li><br></ul><br><p><em><span class="s1">#LI-DNI</span></em></p><br><p><span class="s1">#LI-REMOTE</span></p><br><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p><span>The minimum and maximum base salaries for this role are posted below; this role is also eligible to earn commissions pursuant to the Company’s written Incentive Compensation Plan. Additionally, the role is eligible for equity and benefits. </span><span>The range displayed reflects the minimum and maximum target for new hire salaries for the role based on U.S. location. Within the range, the salary offered will be determined by work location and additional factors, including job-related skills, experience, and relevant education or training.</span></p></div><div class="title">US Pay Range</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$135,600</span><span class="divider">—</span><span>$216,600 USD</span></div></div></div><br><div class="content-conclusion"><h2>Join Us in Securing the World's Data</h2><br><p>Rubrik (RBRK), the Security and AI Operations Company, leads at the intersection of data protection, cyber resilience, and enterprise AI acceleration. Rubrik Security Cloud delivers complete cyber resilience by securing, monitoring, and recovering data, identities, and workloads across clouds. Rubrik Agent Cloud accelerates trusted AI agent deployments at scale by monitoring and auditing agentic actions, enforcing real-time guardrails, fine-tuning for accuracy and undoing agentic mistakes.&nbsp;</p><br><p><a href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/rubrik-inc/mycompany/verification/">Linkedin</a> | <a href="https://twitter.com/rubrikinc">X (formerly Twitter)</a> | <a href="https://www.instagram.com/rubrikinc/">Instagram</a> |&nbsp;<a href="https://www.rubrik.com">Rubrik.com</a></p><br><h2>Inclusion @ Rubrik</h2><br><p>At Rubrik, we are dedicated to fostering a culture where people from all backgrounds are valued, feel they belong, and believe they can succeed. Our commitment to inclusion is at the heart of our mission to secure the world’s data.</p><br><p>Our goal is to hire and promote the best talent, regardless of background. We continually review our hiring practices to ensure fairness and strive to create an environment where every employee has equal access to opportunities for growth and excellence. We believe in empowering everyone to bring their authentic selves to work and achieve their fullest potential.</p><br><h3>Our inclusion strategy focuses on three core areas of our business and culture:</h3><br><ul><br><li><br><p>Our Company: We are committed to building a merit-based organization that offers equal access to growth and success for all employees globally. Your potential is limitless here.</p><br></li><br><li><br><p>Our Culture: We strive to create an inclusive atmosphere where individuals from all backgrounds feel a strong sense of belonging, can thrive, and do their best work. Your contributions help us innovate and break boundaries.</p><br></li><br><li><br><p>Our Communities: We are dedicated to expanding our engagement with the communities we operate in, creating opportunities for underrepresented talent and driving greater innovation for our clients. Your impact extends beyond Rubrik, contributing to safer and stronger communities.</p><br></li><br></ul><br><h2>Equal Opportunity Employer/Veterans/Disabled</h2><br><p>Rubrik is an Equal Opportunity Employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, or protected veteran status and will not be discriminated against on the basis of disability.</p><br><p>Rubrik provides equal employment opportunities (EEO) to all employees and applicants for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, age, disability or genetics. In addition to federal law requirements, Rubrik complies with applicable state and local laws governing nondiscrimination in employment in every location in which the company has facilities. This policy applies to all terms and conditions of employment, including recruiting, hiring, placement, promotion, termination, layoff, recall, transfer, leaves of absence, compensation and training.&nbsp;</p><br><p>Federal law requires employers to provide reasonable accommodation to qualified individuals with disabilities. Please contact us at hr@rubrik.com if you require a reasonable accommodation to apply for a job or to perform your job. Examples of reasonable accommodation include making a change to the application process or work procedures, providing documents in an alternate format, using a sign language interpreter, or using specialized equipment.</p><br><p><a href="https://www.eeoc.gov/sites/default/files/2023-06/22-088_EEOC_KnowYourRights6.12ScreenRdr.pdf">EEO IS THE LAW</a></p><br><p><a href="https://www.dol.gov/sites/dolgov/files/olms/regs/compliance/eo_posters/employeerightsposter2page_19final.pdf">NOTIFICATION OF EMPLOYEE RIGHTS UNDER FEDERAL LABOR LAWS</a></p></div><br></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/rubrik-sales-engineering-manager-cloud-product-line-specialists">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/rubrik-sales-engineering-manager-cloud-product-line-specialists</a></p>
</description>

      <title>Wati.io: Product Support Intern</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India
</p>

<h3>Internship Duration : 3–6 months without Pay<br><br>About wati </h3><p><strong>Wati is the world's leading WhatsApp-first conversational growth platform, empowering businesses to build deeper customer relationships and accelerate revenue growth.</strong></p><p>Trusted and loved by over 16,000+ customers across 190+ countries, Wati has established itself as the premier choice for businesses leveraging WhatsApp and other messaging channels to connect with customers on their platform of choice. In a world where real-time interactions drive growth, Wati's story is all about business growth through conversations.</p><p>At Wati, we believe that every conversation matters, whether it's engaging a first-time prospect, nurturing a qualified lead, or deepening relationships with loyal clients. We transform these conversations into opportunities for building relationships, and strong relationships lead to increased revenue.</p><p><strong>Our Platform<br></strong>The AI-native platform simplifies complex business operations by bringing all customer interactions under one intelligent roof. Designed for scalability and ease of use, our solution delivers a measurable ROI while adapting to businesses of all sizes, from emerging startups to established enterprises.<br></p><p><strong>Our Backing &amp; Partnerships</strong><br>Wati is proudly backed by world-class investors including Tiger Global, Sequoia Capital, DST Global, and Shopify. As a Premium-tier Partner of Meta, Google, and WhatsApp, we maintain the highest standards of integration and platform excellence.<br></p><h3>About the Role</h3><p>We are looking for a Support Intern to join our Customer Support team and gain hands-on experience in supporting a fast-growing SaaS product. This role is ideal for someone who wants to build a career in customer support, customer success, or SaaS operations.</p><p>As a Support Intern, you will work closely with experienced support specialists to assist customers via tickets and live chat, learn product workflows, and understand how world-class SaaS support teams operate.</p><h3>Key Responsibilities</h3><ul><li>Respond to customer queries via tickets and live chat under guidance</li><li>Understand customer issues and provide accurate, timely resolutions</li><li>Escalate bugs and complex issues to internal teams with proper documentation</li><li>Learn and follow SLAs, response time, and quality standards</li><li>Update internal knowledge base and FAQs</li><li>Assist in testing product features and reproducing customer-reported issues</li><li>Analyze recurring issues and suggest improvements to support processes</li><li>Maintain clear and professional communication with customers</li></ul><h3>What You Will Learn</h3><ul><li>How SaaS customer support operates end-to-end</li><li>Ticketing systems, live chat tools, and CRM workflows</li><li>Basics of product troubleshooting and root cause analysis</li><li>Customer communication best practices</li><li>Working with Engineering, Product, and QA teams</li><li>Support metrics such as FRT, ART, CSAT, and ticket categorization</li></ul><p></p><p></p><p></p><p></p><p></p><p></p> <h3>Required Skills &amp; Qualifications</h3><ul><li>Strong written and verbal communication skills</li><li>Willingness to learn and a customer-first mindset</li><li>Basic understanding of web applications (browsers, internet, SaaS tools)</li><li>Good problem-solving and analytical skills</li><li>Ability to work in a fast-paced environment</li><li>Currently pursuing or recently completed a degree in any discipline</li></ul><h3>Good to Have (not mandatory)</h3><ul><li>Basic knowledge of SaaS or B2B products</li><li>Familiarity with support tools like Zendesk, Freshdesk, Intercom, etc.</li><li>Basic technical knowledge (APIs, logs, SQL, or HTML)</li><li>Prior internship or customer-facing experience</li></ul><h3>Who Should Apply</h3><ul><li>Students or fresh graduates interested in SaaS, Technical&nbsp; Support, Customer Support, or Customer Success</li><li>Individuals looking to start a career in tech without heavy coding requirements</li><li>Fast learners with strong communication skills</li></ul> <h3>Internship Benefits</h3><ul><li>Hands-on experience in a real-world SaaS support environment</li><li>Mentorship from experienced support leaders</li><li>Certificate of completion and a Recommendation/Experience letter</li><li>Opportunity for full-time role conversion based on performance and requirements</li><li>Exposure to global customers and real production systems</li></ul>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/wati-io-product-support-intern">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/wati-io-product-support-intern</a></p>
</description>

    <item>
      <title>Feedzai: Senior Frontend Engineer - Product</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Portugal
</p>

<div class="about_feedzai"><br><p><strong>The Engineering (Tech) Team </strong>is responsible for all Feedzai product development. Together with Product Management and Data Science, we build the next generation of tools to catch fraud in real-time with a machine learning first approach. Formed by engineers and managed by engineers, at Feedzai, you will find one of the most talented teams out there, from junior to senior engineers.</p><br><p>We are fast-paced and provide a safe, open, and collaborative environment that encourages us to lean in, try new things and discover our potential with continuous learning for everyone.</p><br><p>While building the best value for our customers, you will work with a wide range of technical challenges. Such as building distributed systems that need to operate 24/7 and ultra-low latencies, solving UI/UX problems to help fraud analysts to fight fraud more efficiently. In addition, designing extensive databases from relational, NoSQL and graphs, validate and develop new data science techniques and algorithms.</p><br><p><strong>You:</strong> We’re looking for a Frontend Engineer to join the <strong>Studio team</strong>, the team responsible for maintaining and evolving the micro-frontend project that hosts the different components of the Feedzai product.</p><br><p>Studio is the backbone of our product integration, ensuring a seamless user experience, performance, and cohesion across our entire product suite. Your mission goes beyond building features; you will be building the platform that hosts them. You will treat Studio as an internal product, focusing on scalability, adoption, and creating a world-class developer experience for your colleagues.</p><br><p><strong>The Studio Team:</strong> The Studio Team builds the foundation that allows Feedzai to disrupt the financial crime industry with speed and consistency.</p><br><ul><br><li>We view our fellow engineers and product teams as our <strong>primary customers</strong>.</li><br><li>By providing a robust, cloud-first, and flexible <strong>micro-frontend host</strong>, we enable product teams to focus on solving complex financial risk problems rather than reinventing application infrastructure.</li><br><li>Being part of this team means you value precision, empathy for the developer experience, and the power of shared standards.</li><br></ul><br><p><strong>Your Day to Day:</strong></p><br><ul><br><li><strong>Architect &amp; Build:</strong> Develop a highly scalable and performant micro-frontend architecture that serves as the host environment for all Feedzai products, ensuring distinct applications work in harmony.</li><br><li><strong>Bridge Platform &amp; Products:</strong> Collaborate closely with Product Engineering teams to translate their standalone modules into a unified application, ensuring seamless integration and routing.</li><br><li><strong>Empower Developers:</strong> Write clear, comprehensive documentation and create tooling that makes it easy for product teams to plug their micro-frontends into the Studio shell.</li><br><li><strong>Quality Assurance:</strong> Be the guardian of platform standards. Implement rigorous testing strategies to ensure zero regressions in the host environment and shared dependencies.</li><br><li><strong>Support &amp; Advocate:</strong> Act as a consultant for product teams, helping them solve complex integration issues and gathering feedback to iterate on the Studio platform.</li><br><li><strong>Strategic Evolution:</strong> Have an active role in decisions regarding the frontend architecture and the long-term roadmap of the Studio project.</li><br></ul><br><p><strong>You Have &amp; You Know-how:</strong></p><br><ul><br><li><strong>BSc/MSc degree</strong> in Computer Science, or a similar technical degree.</li><br><li><strong>4+ years of experience</strong> in modern JavaScript (ES6+), HTML5, and advanced architecture patterns.</li><br><li>Deep experience with <strong>React</strong> and its ecosystem.</li><br><li>Strong proficiency in <strong>TypeScript</strong></li><br><li><strong>Demonstrated experience architecting or contributing to Micro-Frontend architectures</strong></li><br><li>Experience with testing frameworks (Jest, React Testing Library) and integration testing tools (e.g., Cypress, Playwright).</li><br><li>Experience with <strong>build tools</strong> (Webpack/Vite/Rollup), and <strong>release lifecycles</strong>.</li><br><li>A <strong>"Service Mindset" or "Platform Mindset"</strong>—you enjoy helping other developers succeed.</li><br><li>Solid knowledge of&nbsp;<strong>Web Accessibility standards (WCAG) </strong>is a plus<br><br></li><br></ul><br><p>The <strong>Product Team</strong> builds our product to disrupt the financial crime industry from a data-led approach. We partner with our clients using a holistic lens and have result-driven solutions to manage financial risk with a cloud-first platform and a world-class UX interface. Being part of this team, you have a voice in planning, strategizing, and challenging the status quo. Your thoughts and ideas are valued. Our fast-paced and open environment encourages us to lean in, try new things, and&nbsp; discover our potential. We define and act on what could be in tomorrow's world, not on what is today. <strong>Join Us!</strong></p><br><p>&nbsp;#LI-Remote #LI-MG3</p><br></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/feedzai-senior-frontend-engineer-product">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/feedzai-senior-frontend-engineer-product</a></p>
</description>

    <item>
      <title>Instacart: Senior Product Manager, Marketing Experiences, Growth</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> United States - Remote
</p>

<div class=""><br><div class="content-intro"><p><strong>We're transforming the grocery industry</strong></p><br><p><span class="im">At Instacart, we invite the world to share love through food because we believe everyone should have access to the food they love and more time to enjoy it together. Where others see a simple need for grocery delivery, we see exciting complexity and endless opportunity to serve the varied needs of our community. We work to deliver an essential service that customers rely on to get their groceries and household goods, while also offering safe and flexible earnings opportunities to Instacart Personal Shoppers.</span></p><br><p>Instacart has become a lifeline for millions of people, and we’re building the team to help push our shopping cart forward. If you’re ready to do the best work of your life, come join our table.</p><br><p><strong>Instacart is a Flex First team </strong></p><br><p>There’s no one-size fits all approach to how we do our best work. Our employees have the flexibility to choose where they do their best work—whether it’s from home, an office, or your favorite coffee shop—while staying connected and building community through regular in-person events. <a href="https://instacart.careers/remote/">Learn more about our flexible approach to where we work.</a></p></div><br><h2><strong>Overview</strong></h2><br><p>&nbsp;</p><br><p>Instacart’s Growth team builds the products and experiences that acquire, activate, and deepen relationships with consumers and retailer partners. We’re hiring a Product Manager, Marketer Experience, to empower both Instacart’s internal marketers and our retailers’ marketing teams with tools that make world-class campaigns easier to create, measure, and scale.</p><br><p>&nbsp;</p><br><p>In this role, you’ll partner hand in glove with Marketing, Design, Engineering, and Data Science to ideate ideal consumer experiences and enable them through automation, AI, and self-serve workflows. Your work will directly influence campaigns backed by hundreds of millions of dollars in annual spend, driving measurable growth for Instacart’s marketplace and for our retailers’ e-commerce sites.</p><br><p>&nbsp;</p><br><p>You’ll join a fast-paced, highly collaborative Growth org of 10+ PMs and work closely with two PMs focused on Marketing Capabilities. If you thrive on building from the ground up, iterating quickly, and delivering insights and repeatability at scale, this is a unique opportunity to have outsized impact.</p><br><p>&nbsp;</p><br><h2><strong>About the Job</strong></h2><br><p>&nbsp;</p><br><ul><br><li>Own the strategy and roadmap for the marketer experience that powers campaign creation, testing, measurement, and iteration across Instacart and retailer partner channels. Partner closely with Marketing Capability PMs to support your vision, where needed.&nbsp;</li><br><li>Translate campaign goals into productized workflows, templates, and experimentation frameworks in close partnership with internal Marketing, retailer marketing teams, Design, Engineering, and Data Science.</li><br><li>Build automation and AI-assisted capabilities that reduce operational effort for marketers while improving consistency, repeatability, and speed to market for creative and audience experiments.</li><br><li>Define growth funnel KPIs and instrumentation; partner with analytics to measure and provide marketer access to lift, conversion, CAC, LTV, and retention– delivering actionable insights for continuous iteration.</li><br><li>Enable a high-velocity experimentation program (e.g., A/B, multivariate, holdouts) to help marketers validate ideas quickly, make data-informed decisions, and scale winners across surfaces (app, web, email, push, retailer e-commerce).</li><br></ul><br><p><br><br></p><br><h2><strong>About You</strong></h2><br><p><br><br></p><br><h3>Minimum Qualifications</h3><br><p>&nbsp;</p><br><ul><br><li>8+ years of product management experience building and shipping software products.</li><br><li>3+ years driving growth or marketing technology products at scale in e-commerce, marketplaces, or advertising/marketing platforms.</li><br><li>Hands-on experience running A/B and multivariate experiments end to end using experimentation platforms and interpreting results with statistical rigor.</li><br><li>Proven track record building internal or marketer-facing tools from 0→1 and iterating post-launch based on user feedback and data.</li><br><li>Experience leading cross-functional teams across Engineering, Design, Marketing, and Data Science to deliver complex, multi-surface initiatives.</li><br><li>Bachelor’s degree in a relevant field (e.g., Computer Science, Engineering, Statistics, Economics) or equivalent practical experience.</li><br></ul><br><p><br><br></p><br><h3>Preferred Qualifications</h3><br><p>&nbsp;</p><br><ul><br><li>Direct experience partnering with brand and retailer marketing teams and design organizations to translate campaign strategies into product capabilities.</li><br><li>Expertise mapping and optimizing consumer journey flows across app, web, email, and push, including lifecycle and retention programs.</li><br><li>Fluency in growth funnel analytics (acquisition, activation, retention, monetization) and building KPI frameworks that align teams on outcomes.</li><br><li>Experience integrating with marketing and retail ecosystems such as CDPs and ESPs (e.g., Segment, Braze, Iterable, Salesforce Marketing Cloud) and ad/attribution tools.</li><br><li>Background building AI-assisted workflows for creative generation, audience selection, or campaign automation.</li><br><li>Comfort operating in an ambiguous, fast-changing environment with a bias for rapid experimentation and iterative delivery.</li><br></ul><br><p>&nbsp;</p><br><p>#LI-Remote</p><br><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p><span>Instacart provides highly market-competitive compensation and benefits in each location where our employees work. This role is remote and the base pay range for a successful candidate is dependent on their permanent work location. Please review our Flex First remote work policy </span><a href="https://instacart.careers/flex-first/">here</a>.</p><br><p><span>Offers may vary based on many factors, such as candidate experience and skills required for the role. </span><span>Additionally, this role is eligible for a new hire equity grant as well as annual refresh grants. Please rea</span><span>d more about our benefits offerings </span><a href="https://instacart.careers/taste-of-instacart/"><span>here</span></a><span>. <br><br></span><span>For US based candidates, the base pay ranges for a successful candidate are listed below.</span></p></div><div class="title">CA, NY, CT, NJ</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$189,000</span><span class="divider">—</span><span>$233,000 USD</span></div></div><div class="pay-input"><div class="title">WA</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$181,000</span><span class="divider">—</span><span>$223,500 USD</span></div></div><div class="pay-input"><div class="title">OR, DE, ME, MA, MD, NH, RI, VT, DC, PA, VA, CO, TX, IL, HI</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$174,000</span><span class="divider">—</span><span>$214,000 USD</span></div></div><div class="pay-input"><div class="title">All other states</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$158,000</span><span class="divider">—</span><span>$194,000 USD</span></div></div></div><br></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/instacart-senior-product-manager-marketing-experiences-growth">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/instacart-senior-product-manager-marketing-experiences-growth</a></p>
</description>

</p>

<div class=""><br><div class="content-intro"><p><strong>We're transforming the grocery industry</strong></p><br><p><span class="im">At Instacart, we invite the world to share love through food because we believe everyone should have access to the food they love and more time to enjoy it together. Where others see a simple need for grocery delivery, we see exciting complexity and endless opportunity to serve the varied needs of our community. We work to deliver an essential service that customers rely on to get their groceries and household goods, while also offering safe and flexible earnings opportunities to Instacart Personal Shoppers.</span></p><br><p>Instacart has become a lifeline for millions of people, and we’re building the team to help push our shopping cart forward. If you’re ready to do the best work of your life, come join our table.</p><br><p><strong>Instacart is a Flex First team </strong></p><br><p>There’s no one-size fits all approach to how we do our best work. Our employees have the flexibility to choose where they do their best work—whether it’s from home, an office, or your favorite coffee shop—while staying connected and building community through regular in-person events. <a href="https://instacart.careers/remote/">Learn more about our flexible approach to where we work.</a></p></div><br><p>&nbsp;</p><br><p><strong>Overview</strong></p><br><p>Every year, people across the world spend nearly one trillion dollars on groceries. It’s an industry that’s been around for centuries. Food itself, however, has been a constant in people’s lives since the beginning of time. Yes, sustenance is essential, but it’s also much more than that. Food can be a part of a daily ritual or a special moment that resonates with people on a meaningful and emotional level. It can be a much-needed break in a long day, a taste that brings back memories, a creative experiment, a shared meal with loved ones, or even comfort during a hard time. Whether it’s a special occasion or an everyday occurrence, it should always be easy for people to get the ingredients they need.</p><br><p>The Instacart Design Team is dedicated to making grocery shopping effortless for everyone and finding solutions to large-scale opportunities that will forever change the way people feed themselves and their loved ones. We’re a four sided marketplace and design for the needs of Consumer, Shoppers, Retailers, and Advertisers.</p><br><p>The Instacart Design team focuses on designing, building &amp; landing multi-platform product experiences that make grocery shopping effortless and create economic opportunity for our shoppers. The team crafts solutions for large-scale challenges that will change the way people feed themselves and their loved ones.&nbsp;</p><br><p>&nbsp;</p><br><p><strong>About the Role</strong></p><br><p>The Staff Content Designer, Model Design for CoreX is one of our highest-impact roles where you'll shape how AI models interact with users across Instacart's core consumer experiences. You will view the model as the product itself, striking a delicate balance between maximizing the model's capabilities, reading between the lines in user queries to understand how best to help, and upholding user trust.</p><br><p>You'll embed with our Agentic design team and be part of the team reimagining the online grocery experience. You will collaborate closely with researchers to understand, predict, and design model behavior, while partnering with product managers, engineers, and designers across the company to ensure we're creating agentic experiences that solve and anticipate our customers' needs. This role requires exceptional taste, creativity, and writing skills combined with deep technical intuition to craft AI interactions that delight users and feel truly helpful.</p><br><p>As a general standard for all our designers and leaders, we are looking for people who thrive on building a strong design culture, lead with empathy and collaboration, and are committed to pushing the boundaries of quality and innovation in everything we ship. You'll be joining us in defining and evolving the newly established model design function at Instacart.</p><br><p>&nbsp;</p><br><p><strong>About the Job</strong></p><br><ul><br><li>Work hand-in-hand with research teams to anticipate user needs and design AI behaviors that feel natural, helpful, and delightful across Instacart's grocery shopping experiences.</li><br><li>Build alignment with cross-functional partners—including product, engineering, and design teams—to establish a unified conversational voice that resonates with customers throughout their journey.</li><br><li>Drive continuous improvement of our AI systems by synthesizing insights from user testing and designing rigorous and useful evals to identify high-impact opportunities.</li><br><li>Design and refine system prompts that enable personalized, scalable interactions, directly shaping how our AI assistants understand context, respond to needs, and create seamless shopping experiences.</li><br><li>Develop innovative approaches to gathering training data that elevates model quality and ensures our AI truly understands the nuances of grocery shopping.</li><br><li>Own the full lifecycle of content initiatives—from initial design through launch, measurement, and optimization—ensuring every iteration drives meaningful product outcomes.</li><br><li>Establish and uphold Instacart's distinctive voice across all AI interactions, ensuring consistency with our content standards while making every word count.</li><br><li>Balance multiple workstreams simultaneously, maintaining momentum and quality while navigating competing priorities and deadlines with independence and sound judgment.</li><br><li>Set the standard for design excellence, actively mentoring team members and elevating craft across the organization through your work and leadership.</li><br></ul><br><p><strong>About You</strong></p><br><p>Minimum Qualifications</p><br><ul><br><li>12+ years creating content for consumer digital products, with a portfolio that demonstrates mastery in content design, narrative development, and establishing design standards. Must include at least 2 years of direct experience designing AI model interactions.</li><br><li>Natural storyteller with refined taste and strong writing instincts who creates user experiences that surprise and delight. Your expertise spans language, design methodology, and content systems, enabling you to distill complexity into clarity.</li><br><li>Deep knowledge of how information architecture and visual-verbal design work together to create coherent product experiences.</li><br><li>Proven expertise in prompt engineering that drives personalization at scale. You go beyond surface-level conversational polish—you architect the underlying instructions that determine how AI systems think, respond, and adapt to individual user contexts.</li><br><li>Technical fluency to understand how data composition, training approaches, and prompt modifications influence AI behavior and output quality.</li><br><li>Strategic thinker who bridges user research, product goals, and business objectives to create language frameworks and UX copy that solve real problems.</li><br><li>Self-directed operator who thrives in ambiguous, fast-moving environments, making smart tradeoffs and maintaining high standards without close supervision.</li><br><li>Compelling communicator who builds buy-in for your vision through well-crafted presentations, interactive prototypes, and clear connections to company strategy.</li><br><li>Passionate about developing others, consistently modeling excellence and providing guidance that helps teammates grow their craft.</li><br><li>Energized by open-ended challenges that require you to establish structure, rally stakeholders, and chart a clear path forward where none existed before.</li><br><li>Deeply empathetic and self-aware, with genuine commitment to creating experiences that work for diverse global audiences.</li><br></ul><br><p>You might thrive in this role if you:</p><br><ul><br><li>Find energy at the intersection of language, technology, and human behavior—particularly in pioneering how people and AI collaborate in everyday contexts.</li><br><li>Embrace a test-and-learn mindset, readily exploring new directions while having the discipline to abandon approaches that don't deliver results.</li><br><li>Engage thoughtfully with complex, sometimes abstract questions about user intent and AI behavior, while keeping the team focused on practical outcomes.</li><br></ul><br><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p><span>Instacart provides highly market-competitive compensation and benefits in each location where our employees work. This role is remote and the base pay range for a successful candidate is dependent on their permanent work location. Please review our Flex First remote work policy </span><a href="https://instacart.careers/flex-first/">here</a>.</p><br><p><span>Offers may vary based on many factors, such as candidate experience and skills required for the role. </span><span>Additionally, this role is eligible for a new hire equity grant as well as annual refresh grants. Please rea</span><span>d more about our benefits offerings </span><a href="https://instacart.careers/taste-of-instacart/"><span>here</span></a><span>. <br><br></span><span>For US based candidates, the base pay ranges for a successful candidate are listed below.</span></p></div><div class="title">CA, NY, CT, NJ</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$233,000</span><span class="divider">—</span><span>$246,000 USD</span></div></div><div class="pay-input"><div class="title">WA</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$223,000</span><span class="divider">—</span><span>$235,000 USD</span></div></div><div class="pay-input"><div class="title">OR, DE, ME, MA, MD, NH, RI, VT, DC, PA, VA, CO, TX, IL, HI</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$213,000</span><span class="divider">—</span><span>$225,000 USD</span></div></div><div class="pay-input"><div class="title">All other states</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$194,000</span><span class="divider">—</span><span>$205,000 USD</span></div></div></div><br></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/instacart-staff-content-designer-model-design">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/instacart-staff-content-designer-model-design</a></p>
</description>

    <item>
      <title>Descript: Product Manager, API & Platform</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> San Francisco, CA or Remote, US
</p>

<div class="job__description body"><div><h3>About the role</h3><br><p>Automated video editing is an emerging category, and we're positioned to define it. Media companies want to turn thousands of podcast episodes into social clips. Marketing teams want to automatically create product demos for every release. Agencies want to process client content in bulk with consistent branding. And they want to do all of that at scale.</p><br><p>As the Product Manager for this 0 to 1 area, you'll build and own the platform that makes this all possible. You'll create APIs that let developers programmatically import media, run AI-powered edits, and export content. In essence, turning Descript's already powerful editing capabilities into infrastructure that media businesses can depend on.</p><br><h3>What you’ll do</h3><br><ul><br><li>Own the API and developer experience that lets teams create content workflows at scale</li><br><li>Launch integrations that unlock new use cases: MCP wrappers, no-code workflow platforms, and strategic partner integrations</li><br><li>Work closely with our Agentic AI team to influence what editing capabilities we build and how they're exposed through the API</li><br><li>Define and grow this business line by shaping positioning, pricing, and go-to-market strategy with Sales and Marketing teams</li><br></ul><br><h3>Who you are</h3><br><ul><br><li><strong>You’ve shipped technical products before:</strong>&nbsp;You have 5 or more years of product management experience shipping internal APIs, developer platforms, and foundational systems that enable other teams</li><br><li><strong>You build things from scratch:</strong> Building a brand new product means venturing into the unknown, and you find that energizing rather than scary. You've taken products from 0 to 1, figured out ambiguous problem spaces, and created the playbook to make it successful.</li><br><li><strong>You start with the customer</strong>: Plenty of “AI products” start with the technology and they all suck. You care deeply about understanding customers, and have experience in doing customer discovery and defining features that solve real problems.</li><br><li><strong>You are funny, creative, maybe kind of weird</strong>: Ok, this isn’t a hard requirement but Descript is kind of a quirky place and the people who love it tend to&nbsp;<em>like</em>&nbsp;that about working here. So, just want to drop a hint early on. Also, the sense of humor is important because even though we take our work seriously it’s still just, like, video creation and editing. We aren’t flying rockets into space so let’s all have a good time.</li><br></ul><br><p>The base salary range for this role is $171,000 - $235,000/year. Final offer amounts will carefully consider multiple factors, including prior experience, expertise, and location, and may vary from the amount above.&nbsp;</p><br><p>#LI-Remote</p></div><div><h2 class="p-security">About Descript</h2><br><p class="p-security">Descript is building a simple, intuitive, fully-powered editing tool for video and audio — an editing tool built for the age of AI. We are a team of 150&nbsp;and the backing of some of the world's greatest investors (<a href="https://www.descript.com/blog/article/all-new-descript-backed-by-openai-startup-fund">OpenAI</a>, <a href="https://www.a16z.com/">Andreessen Horowitz</a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://redpoint.com/">Redpoint Ventures</a>, <a href="https://medium.com/spark-capital/welcome-descript-a6caddb91039">Spark Capital</a>).&nbsp;</p><br><p class="p-security">Descript is the special company that's in possession of both product market fit and the raw materials (passionate user community, great product, large market) for growth, but is still early enough that each new employee has a measurable influence on the direction of the company.</p><br><p class="p-security">Benefits include a generous healthcare package, 401k matching program, catered lunches, and flexible vacation time.&nbsp;<a href="https://tours.momentumvirtualtours.com/tours/WtZKwedwv">Our headquarters</a> are located in the Mission District of San Francisco, CA. We're hiring for a mix of remote roles and hybrid roles.&nbsp; For those who are remote, we have a handful of opportunities throughout the year for in person collaboration.&nbsp; For our hybrid roles, we're flexible, and you're an adult—we don't expect or mandate that you're in the office every day. We do believe there are valuable and serendipitous moments of discovery and collaboration that come from working together in person.&nbsp;</p><br><p class="p-security">Descript is an equal opportunity workplace—we are dedicated to equal employment opportunities regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity, or Veteran status. We believe in actively building a team rich in diverse backgrounds, experiences, and opinions to better allow our employees, products, and community to thrive.&nbsp;</p></div></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/descript-product-manager-api-platform">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/descript-product-manager-api-platform</a></p>
</description>
