    <item>
      <title>Contentsquare: Staff Product Designer (UI-Led)</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Barcelona
</p>

<div class="content"><div class="section-wrapper page-full-width"><div class="section page-centered"><div><span>Contentsquare is the all-in-one experience intelligence platform designed to be easily used by anyone who cares about digital journeys. With our flexible and scalable platform, organizations quickly get a deep understanding of their customers’ whole online journey.</span></div><div><br></div><div><span>We are a global leader in the experience analytics space, with a growing presence across 15 offices worldwide. We’re here to stay—and we’re looking for team members who are excited to drive impact and help us scale even further.</span></div><div><br></div><div><span>Our aim is to create an inclusive workplace where everyone learns and succeeds. Contentsquare has built a community of individuals who are daring, understanding, and deliberate. We invite you to join us in making the complex simpler—for our customers, their customers, and each other.</span></div><div><br></div><div><i><span>Important note: Be careful of scammers pretending to be from Contentsquare. We will never ask for money or contact you through random texts. For more information, visit our careers blog.</span></i></div><div><br></div><div><span>We’re looking for a Staff Product Designer with exceptional UI craft and strong product thinking to shape the next generation of Contentsquare’s interfaces. You’ll work on our most complex problems: cross-product workflows, data-heavy views and AI-assisted insights. You will set a new bar for clarity, speed, and quality at scale.</span></div><div><br></div><div>About the role:</div><div><br></div><div><span>Contentsquare is moving fast: unifying multiple products, increasing automation, and shifting from analytics to actionable intelligence. This role is a key part of our evolution.</span></div><div><br></div><div><span>As a Staff Product Designer, you’ll work on foundational initiatives: unified navigation, cross-product filters, AI insight surfaces, automated actions, and new interface patterns for agentic features. You’ll translate complexity into clarity, and you’ll set the visual and interaction standards for where the platform is heading. </span></div><div><br></div><div><span>You’ll work directly with the AI teams, data science, engineering, platform PMs, and design systems to define how users understand, trust, and act on intelligence from the system. </span></div><div><br></div><div><span>This is a hands-on IC role for someone who wants to shape the future of the platform by doing. </span></div><div><br></div><div><span>You’ll lead the craft on our most strategic areas. You’ll design elegant, scalable UI for complex datasets, insights, and actions. You’ll partner with engineering and product early, and stay close through delivery to ensure the final build meets the standard you set. You’ll raise the level of UI quality across the organisation by example and by coaching others, without managing people.</span></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>What you will do</h3><ul class="posting-requirements plain-list"><ul><li><b>Product Craft &amp; Execution: </b></li><div><br></div><li>Own end-to-end design for high-impact areas across the CSQ suite (examples include: dashboards, insights workflows, segmentation, filters, session replay, zoning, and AI-driven actions). </li><li>Shape UI patterns that work across multiple products and states, reducing complexity and inconsistency. </li><li>Translate large, messy datasets into clear, usable interfaces that feel fast and intentional. </li><li>Design dashboards, metric layers, segmentation tools, and filtering systems that scale. </li><li>Bring AI features to life with simple, intuitive interactions that support trust and decision-making. </li><li>Pair with engineers to ensure pixel-perfect execution in React+Tailwind using our in-house design system.</li><li>Use data, quant and qual, to refine ideas and validate decisions.</li><div><br></div><li><b>Leadership &amp; Influence: </b></li><div><br></div><li>Set the bar for design craft across the organisation.</li><li>Coach senior and mid-level designers in visual design, interaction thinking, and clarity of communication.</li><li>Work closely with the design system to evolve shared patterns and elevate implementation quality.</li><li>Lead cross-functional initiatives where the brief is ambiguous and the stakes are high.</li><div><br></div><li><b>Collaboration &amp; Ways of Working: </b></li><div><br></div><li>Work deeply with PMs, engineers, data scientists, and AI teams to define problems and shape solutions.</li><li>Bring clarity to prioritisation by framing trade-offs and showing what “good” looks like.</li><li>Communicate openly and frequently, keeping teams aligned on decisions and rationale.</li></ul></ul></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>What we're looking for</h3><ul class="posting-requirements plain-list"><ul><li>A portfolio showing world-class UI craft, with examples of complex, data-heavy product work.</li><li>Strong interaction design skills and understanding of systems, flows, and hierarchy.</li><li>Experience with SaaS products, preferably enterprise or analytics.</li><li>Ability to take an ambiguous problem and bring structure, clarity, and direction.</li><li>Comfort working in multi-disciplinary teams and navigating multiple stakeholders.</li><li>Track record of lifting the craft of an entire design team.</li><li>Strong facilitation skills and a track record of driving and leading cross-functional initiatives.</li><li>Good mix of customer empathy and entrepreneurial pragmatism.</li><li>Track record of discovery projects and customer validation that fueled product strategy and innovation.</li><div><br></div><div>Nice to have:</div><li>Experience with design systems at scale.</li><li>Experience designing for AI features (suggestions, automation, agents, or pattern generation).</li><li>Familiarity with B2B analytics, experimentation, or observability tools.</li></ul></ul></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><b><span>Why you should join Contentsquare</span></b></div><div><span>We invest in our people through career development, mentorship, social events, philanthropic activities, and competitive benefits. We are always assessing the perks we offer to ensure we’re aligned with the employees' needs.</span></div><div><br></div><div><span>Here are a few we want to highlight:</span></div><div><span>-  Virtual onboarding, Hackathon, and various opportunities to interact with your team and global colleagues both on and offsite each year</span></div><div><span>- Work flexibility: hybrid and remote work policies</span></div><div><span>- Generous paid time-off policy (every location is different)</span></div><div><span>- Lifestyle allowance</span></div><div><span>- A Culture Crew in every country we’re based in to coordinate regular activities for employees to get to know each other and bond outside of work</span></div><div><span>- Every full-time employee receives stock options, allowing them to share in the company’s success</span></div><div><span>- We have multiple Employee Resource Groups, that offer a safe space for individuals who share common identities, life experiences, or allyship to connect, support one another, and passionately advocate for the issues close to their hearts</span></div><div><span>- And more benefits tailored to each country</span></div><div><br></div><div><span><i>Contentsquare is an equal opportunity employer. Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to sex, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, race, color, religion, national origin, disability, protected veteran status, age, or any other characteristic protected by law.</i></span></div><div><br></div><div><span><i>Your personal data is used by Contentsquare for recruitment purposes only. Read our </i></span><a href="https://contentsquare.com/privacy-center/job-candidate-privacy-notice/"><span><i>Job Candidate Privacy Notice</i></span></a><span><i> to find out more about data protection at Contentsquare and your rights. You can exercise your rights by using our dedicated Data Subject Rights Portal </i></span><a class="postings-link" href="https://contentsquare.com/privacy-center/data-subject-request-portal/"><span><i>here</i></span></a><span><i>.&nbsp;</i></span></div><div><br></div><div><span><i>Your personal data will be securely stored in our hosting provider’s data center in Oregon (US west). We have implemented appropriate transfer mechanisms under applicable data protection laws.</i></span></div><div><br></div><div><i>Contentsquare may use AI-assisted tools to help review and screen applications. All decisions involving hiring are made by human reviewers, and your personal data will be processed in accordance with our&nbsp;</i><a href="https://contentsquare.com/fr-fr/privacy-center/job-candidate-privacy-notice/"><i>Candidate Privacy Policy</i></a><i>.</i></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div class="text-small italic text-gray-700">We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.</div></div></div></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/contentsquare-staff-product-designer-ui-led">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/contentsquare-staff-product-designer-ui-led</a></p>
</description>

    </item>
    <item>
      <title>Monarch Money: Product Engineer, Mobile (Senior/Staff/Principal)</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Remote (US)
</p>

<h3><strong>About Us:</strong></h3><p>Monarch is a powerful, all-in-one personal finance platform designed to help make the complexity of finances feel simple again. Since launching in 2021, we’ve become the top-recommended personal finance app by users and experts. Our goal? To take the stress out of finances so our members can focus on what truly matters.</p><p>We are a team of do-ers led by experienced entrepreneurs who are passionate about helping our members reach their financial goals. We are hyper focused on building a product people love and continuing to evolve based on user feedback.</p><p>As a fully remote company (even before COVID!), we welcome applicants from almost anywhere. Our team collaborates synchronously mostly from 9 AM – 2 PM PT and embraces asynchronous work to stay connected across time zones.</p><p>Join us on our mission to transform lives by <strong>simplifying money, together.</strong></p><p><strong>The Role:</strong></p><p>Monarch is seeking a mobile-focused product engineer to join our team as we scale our personal finance platform. You'll own the mobile experience end-to-end—from architecting new features to optimizing mobile performance—directly impacting how a million users manage their financial lives every day. </p><p><strong>What You’ll Do:</strong></p><ul><li><p>Partner closely with Product and Design to build and improve Monarch's core product features on mobile platforms (iOS/android). Example features include: Budgeting, Goals, Assistant</p></li><li><p>Establish mobile engineering best practices on the team, code quality standards, and development processes that enable rapid iteration while maintaining product reliability</p></li><li><p>Mentor your fellow engineering peers </p></li><li><p>Help shape our longer-term mobile technical roadmaps</p></li></ul><p><strong>What You’ll Bring: </strong></p><ul><li><p>4+ years of mobile development experience, with at least 2 years using React Native/TypeScript, plus working knowledge of native iOS (Swift) or Android (Kotlin)</p></li><li><p>You consider yourself "product-centric" and take pride in building something people love</p></li><li><p>You have superb written and verbal communication skills, with both technical and non-technical teammates</p></li><li><p>Strong ownership mentality-you see projects through from initial spec to production monitoring</p></li></ul><p><strong>Nice to Haves:</strong></p><ul><li><p>Experience building fintech or consumer financial products</p></li><li><p>Full-stack web engineering experience (React, Python)</p></li><li><p>Background in performance optimization and mobile app analytics</p></li><li><p>Previous experience at a high-growth startup (Series A-C)</p></li></ul><p><strong>Typical Process (May vary depending on role):</strong></p><ul><li><p>Recruiter Video Call </p></li><li><p>Hiring Manager Video Call</p></li><li><p>Technical assessment (Video call)</p></li><li><p>Virtual “onsite” round consisting of 2-4 additional rounds</p></li><li><p>Reference Checks  </p></li><li><p>Offer! </p><p>#LI-DNI</p></li></ul><h3><strong>Benefits&nbsp;:</strong></h3><ul><li><p>Work wherever you want! As a <strong>fully</strong> remote company with no central office, we want you to work wherever you are happiest and most productive. Whether that’s out of your home, a co-working space, or elsewhere.</p></li><li><p>Competitive cash and equity compensation in a hyper growth, early stage company .</p></li><li><p>Stipend to set-up your ideal working environment.</p></li><li><p>Competitive Benefit Plans for employees based on your location (e.g. in the US we offer: Medical, dental and vision benefits and the ability to contribute to a 401k plan).</p></li><li><p>Unlimited PTO.</p></li><li><p>3 day weekend every month! We take off the “First Friday” every month to focus on rest, recuperation, or just having fun!</p></li></ul><p>We are an equal opportunity employer and value diversity. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, or disability status.</p>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/monarch-money-product-engineer-mobile-senior-staff-principal">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/monarch-money-product-engineer-mobile-senior-staff-principal</a></p>
</description>

    <item>
      <title>Sosafe: Director of Product Management (Remote)</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Dublin
</p>

<p>We’re looking for a<strong> Director of Product Management</strong> to lead our Product Management team and drive product strategy and execution across our portfolio.</p><p>You’ll manage a remote-first, distributed team of six Senior and Staff PMs across core product areas and shared platform capabilities, working closely with Engineering, Design, Data &amp; Insights, Product Operations, and GTM. This role leads the team to shape product strategy and translate it into ambitious but credible roadmaps, with clear trade-offs that drive measurable outcomes and high-confidence execution.</p><p>The <strong>VP of Product</strong> sets company-level product vision and strategic intent. This <strong>Director</strong> role owns product strategy development across the portfolio and ensures that intent is realised through disciplined planning, strong PM craft, and effective cross-functional delivery. The role sets clear decision frameworks while empowering PMs to own problem definition, solution shape, and day-to-day trade-offs. Portfolio decisions explicitly balance customer value, commercial impact, and engineering investment.</p><p></p><p><strong>Here's how you'll make a difference:</strong></p><ul><li><p>Lead the development of product strategy across the portfolio, and translate it into aligned quarterly roadmaps, OKRs, and execution plans.</p></li><li><p>Plan and sequence work in close partnership with Engineering leadership, balancing customer impact, feasibility, and long-term platform health.</p></li><li><p>Lead, coach, and develop a high-performing, empowered team of Product Managers.</p></li><li><p>Elevate and codify PM craft across discovery, delivery, and outcomes, with clear standards for problem framing, success metrics, and post-launch learning.</p></li><li><p>Shorten experimentation cycles through better problem framing and scope discipline, enabling faster learning without increasing delivery risk.</p></li><li><p>Partner closely with GTM to prioritise and deliver product capabilities that drive revenue, retention, and competitive differentiation, with clear expectations on timing and trade-offs.</p></li><li><p>Work in close partnership with Design to ensure strong discovery, experience coherence, and high product quality.</p></li><li><p>Drive coherence and consistency across historically siloed products.</p><p></p></li></ul><p><strong>What makes you a great fit:</strong></p><ul><li><p>Senior product leadership experience in B2B SaaS, with people management experience required.</p></li><li><p>Strong stakeholder collaboration, influence, and alignment skills.</p></li><li><p>Ability to define and evolve portfolio-level strategy, making explicit trade-offs under uncertainty.</p></li><li><p>Experience partnering with cross-functional leadership in organisations undergoing growth and change.</p></li><li><p>Strong bias for action and a build-test-learn culture grounded in sound judgement.</p></li><li><p>Ambitious, outcome-oriented mindset with strategic clarity.</p></li><li><p>Comfort operating in regulated, privacy-centric enterprise environments.</p></li></ul><p></p><p><strong>What we offer*</strong></p><ul><li><p>Work/Life balance: Flexible hours, 33 vacation days</p></li><li><p>Wellbeing and financial support: Access to Open Up, corporate discounts</p></li><li><p>Connection &amp; community: Virtual events, collaborative team activities, and opportunities for local meet-ups</p></li><li><p>And the list goes on: Tech equipment, referral bonuses, dog-friendly HQ</p></li></ul><p><em>*Perks and benefits listed above are for full-time employees and may vary slightly by office location. These are just a sample — you'll learn more during the interview process.</em></p><p></p><p><strong>About Us</strong></p><p>At SoSafe, we’re on a mission to make the digital world safer by addressing the human factor in cybersecurity. As one of the fastest-growing security awareness scale-ups worldwide, we leverage behavioural science and data-driven learning to empower people against cyber threats. Our Human Risk Management approach helps organisations turn their employees into their strongest line of defence.</p><p>Backed by leading VCs like Highland Europe and Global Founders Capital, we’re rapidly expanding across the globe. We’re looking for team players who want to drive meaningful change in cybersecurity, take ownership of their work, and grow with us.</p><p>If you thrive in a vibrant, purpose-driven environment that values innovation, diversity, and collaboration, then this is the place for you!</p>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/sosafe-director-of-product-management-remote">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/sosafe-director-of-product-management-remote</a></p>
</description>

    <item>
      <title>Glückliche Gäste: Backend Engineer (TypeScript/Node.js)  DevOps Mindset (m/w/d)</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Remote, hybrid
</p>

<div class="description-wrapper description-wrapper-shown" lang="de"><br><br><h5 class="detail-block-title">Deine Rolle</h5><br><div class="detail-block-description"><br>                        Für die FoodGenius Labs GmbH suchen wir einen Backend Engineer mit ausgeprägtem DevOps-Mindset.<br>Du entwickelst Backend-Services und technische Komponenten für FoodGenius und sorgst dafür, dass diese zuverlässig gebaut, ausgerollt, betrieben und weiterentwickelt werden.<br>&nbsp;<br>Dabei endet Deine Verantwortung nicht beim Commit: Du denkst in Deployments, Umgebungen und Betriebsszenarien. Du baust Software so, dass sie in Produktion stabil läuft – arbeitest dabei eng mit unserem Platform-Engineering zusammen, das den 24x7-Plattformbetrieb verantwortet.<br>&nbsp;<br>Du bewegst Dich bewusst an der Schnittstelle zwischen Entwicklung und Betrieb und hast Freude daran, Dinge zu automatisieren, technische Zusammenhänge zu verstehen und Systeme ganzheitlich zu betrachten.<br>                    </div><br><br><br><h5 class="detail-block-title">Das wirst Du tun</h5><br><div class="detail-block-description"><br><ul><li>Entwicklung von Backend-Services und technischen Komponenten mit TypeScript / Node.js</li><li>Arbeit an produktionsnahen Systemen mit PostgreSQL, APIs und serviceorientierten Architekturen</li><li>Containerisierung von Anwendungen mit Docker</li><li>Mitarbeit an CI/CD-Pipelines (GitLab) und Automatisierung von Build- und Deployment-Prozessen</li><li>Deployments und Betrieb eigener Services in Kubernetes-Umgebungen</li><li>Entwicklung und Betrieb von Software auf unterschiedlichen Zielsystemen:<br>&nbsp; &nbsp; • &nbsp; &nbsp;Server- und Cloud-Umgebungen<br>&nbsp; &nbsp; • &nbsp; &nbsp;kundennahen Edge-Systemen (z. B. Raspberry Pi)<br>&nbsp; &nbsp; • &nbsp; &nbsp;lokalen Entwicklungs-Setups auf macOS</li><li>Mitarbeit an KI-gestützten Funktionen und Integrationen:<br>&nbsp; &nbsp; • &nbsp; &nbsp;Nutzung und Einbindung von KI-APIs<br>&nbsp; &nbsp; • &nbsp; &nbsp;Aufbau technischer Schnittstellen (z. B. agentenbasierte Konzepte, MCP-artige<br>&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp;Architekturen)<br>&nbsp; &nbsp; • &nbsp; &nbsp;Fokus auf Integration und Anwendung, kein zwingendes Modelltraining</li><li>Enge Zusammenarbeit mit Produkt, Platform Engineering, Head of Engineering und Scrum Master</li></ul><br></div><br><br><br><h5 class="detail-block-title">Das bringst Du mit</h5><br><div class="detail-block-description"><br><ul><li>Mehrjährige Erfahrung in der Backend-Softwareentwicklung</li><li>Sehr gute Kenntnisse in TypeScript und Node.js</li><li>Sicherer Umgang mit Linux als Entwicklungs- und Laufzeitumgebung</li><li>Sehr gutes Verständnis von Docker und containerisierten Anwendungen</li><li>Erfahrung mit Kubernetes im Sinne von Deployment und Betrieb eigener Workloads</li><li>Erfahrung mit relationalen Datenbanken, idealerweise PostgreSQL</li><li>Praxis mit CI/CD, bevorzugt GitLab</li><li>Starkes Automatisierungs- und Betriebsverständnis („You build it, you run it“ – im Team)</li><li>Erfahrung oder Interesse an:<br>• Hosting- und Cloud-Umgebungen (z. B. Hetzner)<br>• Edge-/Kundensystemen (z. B. Raspberry Pi)<br>• KI-gestützten Anwendungen und deren technischer Integration</li><li>Nice to have: erste Berührung mit KI-Modelltraining oder tiefergehenden ML-Konzepten</li><li>Strukturierte Arbeitsweise, technischer Anspruch und Lust, Dinge wirklich zu verstehen</li><li>Sehr gute Deutschkenntnisse</li></ul><br></div><br><br><br><h5 class="detail-block-title">Das bieten wir Dir</h5><br><div class="detail-block-description"><br><div><ul><li>Maximale Flexibilität beim Arbeitsort: 100 % Remote, Hybrid oder 100 % vor Ort in St. Wendel</li><li>Arbeit an realen, produktiven Systemen mit echtem Impact</li><li>Klare Rollenverteilung zwischen Produktentwicklung und Plattformbetrieb</li><li>Enge Zusammenarbeit mit erfahrenen Engineering-Rollen</li><li>Raum für technische Gestaltung und Weiterentwicklung</li><li>Weiterbildungsmöglichkeiten und berufliche Entwicklung.</li><li>Ein faires und angemessenes Gehalt, das Deiner Qualifikation und Erfahrung entspricht.</li><li>30 Tage Urlaub, damit Du Dich ausreichend erholen und neue Energie tanken kannst.</li><li>Regelmäßige Firmenevents wie z. B. ein Sommerfest, bei denen Teamgeist und gemeinsamer Spaß im Vordergrund stehen.</li><li>Ein motiviertes, freundliches Team, das Zusammenarbeit und Austausch schätzt und fördert.</li></ul></div><div><br></div><br></div><br><br><br><h5 class="detail-block-title">Bewerbung</h5><br><div class="detail-block-description"><br><h6><br></h6>Wenn Du Lust hast, unser Team zu bereichern und die Zukunft unserer Produkte mitzugestalten, freuen wir uns auf Deine Bewerbung. Bewirb Dich bitte über unser Jobportal:<br>&nbsp;<br>https://gluecklichegaeste.jobs.personio.de<br>&nbsp;<br>Glückliche Gäste GmbH – wir machen Ernährung einfach und gesund.<br>                        </div><br><br><br><h5 class="detail-block-title">Über uns</h5><br><div class="detail-block-description"><br>                        Wir sind vier Unternehmen unter einem Dach. Uns verbindet ein gemeinsamer Anspruch und ein klares Motto: <strong>Wir schaffen Wissen, Werkzeuge und Bewusstsein für eine wirtschaftliche, nachhaltige und gesunde Gesellschaft.</strong><br>Jedes Unternehmen löst dabei ein anderes Stück des großen Puzzles – von Ernährung im Alltag über Gastro-Software bis hin zur Dienstplanung im Gesundheitswesen.<br><br><strong>Glückliche Gäste GmbH</strong><br>Die Glückliche Gäste GmbH entwickelt branchenspezifische Lösungen, digitale Innovationen und individuelle Konzepte – mit starkem Fokus auf Gastronomie und Food-Service. Dazu gehören unter anderem Marken- und Konzeptarbeit, digitale Bestell- und Shop-Lösungen, POS-/Kassen-Themen, Schulungen und praxisnahe Unterstützung entlang des operativen Geschäfts. <span>&nbsp;</span><br><br><strong>uninu GmbH</strong><br>uninu ist eine smarte Ernährungs-App, die Menschen im Alltag unterstützt – bewusst, effizient und alltagstauglich. Im Zentrum steht ein KI-gestützter Ernährungsbegleiter: Kalorientracking per Foto, Barcode-Scan oder Eingabe, Nährwertanalyse sowie Unterstützung per Chat, vollautomatische Pläne für schnelles und gesundes Essen. Ergänzt wird das durch personalisierte Funktionen (z. B. Berücksichtigung von Unverträglichkeiten) und eine Rezeptwelt, die auf Routinen statt Verzicht ausgelegt ist. <span>&nbsp;</span><br><br><strong>FoodGenius Labs GmbH</strong><br>FoodGenius ist eine KI gestützte „All-in-one“-Lösung für Restaurant- und Lieferservice-Management: Bestellannahme, Kassensystem, KI-Telefonannahme, WhatsApp Bestellungen, Online-Shop und vieles mehr. Besonders stark ist FoodGenius dort, wo im Alltag Zeit verloren geht: bei Transparenz über Prozesse und bei der intelligenten Organisation von Lieferungen, inklusive Touren- und Routenplanung. <span>&nbsp;</span><br><br><strong>Personal.Manager Software GmbH</strong><br>Personal.manager digitalisiert Dienst- und Personalplanung im Gesundheitswesen – mit dem Ziel, Planung fairer, effizienter und verlässlicher zu machen. Die Software adressiert typische Klinik-Herausforderungen wie Schichtplanung, Abwesenheiten, mobile Nutzbarkeit und Integrationen (z. B. SAP-gestützte Abrechnungsvorbereitung) und stellt dabei den Menschen in den Mittelpunkt: weniger Konflikte, mehr Planbarkeit, mehr Zeit für Versorgung. <span>&nbsp;</span><br><br><strong>Unser gemeinsamer Nenner: Technologie, die Menschen entlastet und Qualität erhöht – zu Hause, in der Küche, im Betrieb und in der Klinik. Genau dafür bauen wir unsere Produkte.</strong><br></div><br><br></div>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Budapest, Bartók Béla út, Hungary
</p>

<div><div><p class="googlejobs-paragraph--empty"></p><h2 class="title">Company Description</h2></div><div class="wysiwyg"><p>Hiflylabs is a dynamic team of 250+ data and tech professionals based in Budapest, delivering cutting-edge solutions in data engineering, data science, artificial intelligence, and application development. With over a decade of expertise, we empower businesses worldwide with tailored, hands-on strategies for Data Warehousing, Business Intelligence, and Data Analytics.</p><p>Our strength lives in our people. Through our mentoring system, we cultivate professional growth and innovation.</p><p>Explore more about us through our<a href="https://hiflylabs.com/"> Website</a>,<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/hiflylabs/"> LinkedIn</a>, and<a href="https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCYY3oUYe_V4ohlJAsXtmeNw"> YouTube</a>!</p></div><div><p class="googlejobs-paragraph--empty"></p><h2 class="title">Job Description</h2></div><div class="wysiwyg"><p><strong>What Will You Do?</strong></p><ul><li><p><strong>Lead AI-driven transformation</strong> – Act as a thought leader in financial services, shaping enterprise-wide Data &amp; AI strategies with a strong focus on Generative AI (GenAI).</p></li><li><p><strong>Bridge AI and Business</strong> – Define AI-powered banking solutions that align technology advancements with customer needs and business objectives.</p></li><li><p><strong>Guide C-Level Stakeholders </strong>– Establish strong relationships with senior banking executives, guiding them through AI adoption, regulatory considerations, and value-driven implementations.</p></li><li><p><strong>Own the AI Product Vision </strong>– Drive the end-to-end development of GenAI solutions, collaborating with cross-functional teams including data engineers, ML experts, and business leaders.</p></li><li><p><strong>Define Roadmaps &amp; Execution Strategies </strong>– Oversee project scopes, planning, and execution, ensuring that AI solutions deliver measurable impact.</p></li><li><p><strong>Deliver AI &amp; Data Solutions </strong>– Support data visualization, model development, and AI application rollouts, ensuring seamless integration into banking ecosystems.</p></li><li><p><strong>Enhance Hiflylabs' AI Offerings</strong> – Lead research and strategy development for new GenAI solutions in financial services, contributing to go-to-market strategies.</p></li></ul></div><div><p class="googlejobs-paragraph--empty"></p><h2 class="title">Qualifications</h2></div><div class="wysiwyg"><p><strong>What You Need to Apply:</strong></p><ul><li><p>4-5 years of experience in<strong> AI-driven product management, consulting, or financial services.</strong></p></li><li><p>Expertise in <strong>AI &amp; data analytics</strong>, with experience deploying <strong>Generative AI</strong> solutions.</p></li><li><p>Strong <strong>strategic thinking</strong>, problem-solving, and decision-making skills.</p></li><li><p>Experience engaging with <strong>C-level executives</strong> and senior stakeholders.</p></li><li><p>Ability to translate business challenges into <strong>AI-powered opportunities</strong>.</p></li><li><p>Advanced <strong>presentation and storytelling skills</strong> for AI solutions.</p></li><li><p>Proficiency in English (written &amp; spoken).</p></li><li><p>High adaptability, proactive mindset, and a passion for AI innovation.</p></li></ul><p><strong>Nice to Have:</strong></p><ul><li><p>Experience at <strong>Big 4 consulting firms</strong> or as a strategic advisor in financial services.</p></li><li><p>Domain knowledge beyond banking (e.g., <strong>telecom, healthcare, retail, energy</strong>).</p></li><li><p>Hands-on experience with <strong>Machine Learning, NLP, or GenAI tools.</strong></p></li><li><p>Familiarity with <strong>data visualization tools</strong> (Power BI, Tableau, Looker).</p></li><li><p>Understanding of <strong>data governance, AI ethics, and regulatory frameworks.</strong></p></li></ul></div><div><p class="googlejobs-paragraph--empty"></p><h2 class="title">Additional Information</h2></div><div class="wysiwyg"><p><strong>Why Join Hiflylabs?</strong></p><p><strong>Our Promise to You:</strong></p><ul><li><p><strong>Innovative AI Projects –</strong> Work on cutting-edge AI solutions across global markets.</p></li><li><p><strong>Empowered Work Culture – </strong>We trust you to take ownership and drive impact.</p></li><li><p><strong>Flexible Work Environment –</strong> Hybrid and remote-friendly opportunities.</p></li><li><p><strong>Professional Growth – </strong>Access to mentorship, training, and international AI engagements.</p></li><li><p><strong>Strong Community –</strong> Be part of a vibrant, collaborative, and fun-loving team.</p></li></ul><p>Ready to revolutionize AI in financial services? Apply now and let's shape the future together!</p></div></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/hiflylabs-senior-ai-consultant-genai-product-owner">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/hiflylabs-senior-ai-consultant-genai-product-owner</a></p>

      <title>Titan Ai: Full-Stack Developer, AI Applications</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> United States
</p>

<p>Titan is building the AI platform for banking – creating the models and agents that will define the industry. Led by a team of former CTOs with multiple exits, we're seeking a Full-Stack Developer to build and scale the applications that bring AI into banks' daily workflows.</p><p></p><p><strong>What you’ll do</strong></p><ul><li><p>Develop and scale products that bring large language models (LLMs) and machine learning capabilities to banks</p></li></ul><ul><li><p>Design, implement, and scale backend services and APIs that power the platform, ensuring reliability and high performance</p></li></ul><ul><li><p>Build interfaces and APIs connecting backend logic with modern web or mobile clients</p></li></ul><ul><li><p>Work on scalability, load balancing, and performance tuning of web server backends with evolving workloads</p></li></ul><p></p><p><strong>Required qualifications</strong></p><ul><li><p>Strong proficiency in Python backend development (FastAPI preferred; Django or Flask acceptable)</p></li></ul><ul><li><p>Experience with TypeScript and React (Bonus: experience with radix-ui, lucide-react, zustand, or React Router)</p></li></ul><ul><li><p>Hands-on experience with SQL databases (PostgreSQL, MySQL, or similar)</p></li></ul><ul><li><p>Proficient with modern CSS frameworks like TailwindCSS</p></li></ul><ul><li><p>Experience deploying production applications on AWS or Azure, with familiarity in containerization (Docker) and CI/CD pipelines</p></li></ul><ul><li><p>Knowledge of Kubernetes and infrastructure-as-code tools (Terraform)</p></li></ul><ul><li><p>Background working with AI engineers or data science teams</p></li></ul><p></p><p><strong>What we offer</strong></p><ul><li><p>Competitive compensation (salary + meaningful, pre-Series A equity) </p></li><li><p>Remote-first culture with opportunity for in-person collaboration</p></li><li><p>Unlimited PTO</p></li><li><p>Medical, dental, and vision coverage (100% of employee premiums paid by Titan)</p></li></ul><p></p><p><strong>Why Titan</strong></p><p>We're building the AI platform for banking because many of the two million people employed by 4,000+ banks in the United States cannot safely and securely use bleeding edge AI tools at work. Moreover, none of them are using AI tools purpose-built for banking in their daily workflows. We are changing that. </p><p>We are creating secure, bank-native AI infrastructure and applications that meet the needs of modern banking and financial services. Our platform includes:</p><ul><li><p>Titan Foundry: Secure gateway to top AI models for bank employees</p></li></ul><ul><li><p>Banking-Reasoning Models: Our flagship small language models purpose-built for financial services, trained by ex-regulators and banking leaders</p></li></ul><ul><li><p>Banking Agents: Configurable AI application layer with expertise in lending, compliance, underwriting, and operations</p></li></ul><p>Our small team consists of former founders, CTOs, engineers, operators, and regulators from places like Goldman Sachs, KeyBank, and the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency. We have built and sold companies to top 25 U.S. banks. </p><p>If you’re a high-agency individual who loves tackling complex problems in an emerging space, we want to hear from you!</p>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/titan-ai-full-stack-developer-ai-applications">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/titan-ai-full-stack-developer-ai-applications</a></p>
</description>

      <title>Samsara: Senior Sales Strategy Manager, New Product</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Remote - Chicago
</p>

<p><strong>About This Role</strong></p><br><p>This role will join the Sales Strategy team to drive strategic initiatives aligned to supporting topline revenue growth strategies for some of our new product launches. Sales Strategy plays a critical role in organizing our cross-functional stakeholders to drive the outcomes we need in our global markets as well as leading the most complex, mission-critical priorities to grow the business, and our new products are central to how we will continue to deliver more value to our customers by helping them solve their toughest challenges.</p><br><p>This role will be cross-functional, working closely with leadership from across the business to develop long-term sales strategies, assess market needs &amp; gaps in current products, systems, etc., align on cross-functional investments and AOP annual planning, and manage in-year execution and track progress over time.</p><br><p><strong>You should apply if:</strong></p><br><ul><br><li>You want to impact the industries that run our world: Your efforts will result in real-world impact – helping to keep the lights on, get food into grocery stores, reduce emissions, and most importantly, ensure workers return home safely.</li><br><li>You are the architect of your own career: If you put in the work, this role won’t be your last at Samsara. We set up our employees for success and have built a culture that encourages rapid career development, countless opportunities to experiment and master your craft in a hyper growth environment.</li><br><li>You’re energized by our opportunity: The vision we have to digitize large sectors of the global economy requires your full focus and best efforts to bring forth creative, ambitious ideas for our customers.</li><br><li>You want to be with the best: At Samsara, we win together, celebrate together and support each other. You will be surrounded by a high-calibre team that will encourage you to do your best.&nbsp;</li><br></ul><br><p><strong>In this role, you will: </strong><strong><br></strong></p><br><ul><br><li>Lead the GTM sales strategy and execution for one or more of our new product launches, joining one of our New Product Pods (cross-functional teams fully focused on ensuring each new product is successful and scales)</li><br><li>Own an end-to-end strategic understanding of what it will take to make priority new products successful and coordinate New Product Pod efforts and executive messaging</li><br><li>Lead mission-critical new product strategic initiatives in support of Samsara’s long term growth; work cross functionally to structure problems, develop hypotheses, conduct analyses to turn data into meaningful insights, and drive solutions and actionable recommendations and results through a rigorous, data-driven process</li><br><li>Bring the voice of the customer to the organization: understand and draw insights from key market, industry, customer trends, and customer/partner feedback to provide insight and guide investment decisions across Field Operations and other GTM functions</li><br><li>Develop strategic and business cases working with cross-functional teams outlining business opportunity, rationale, and operational plans to grow new products</li><br><li>Uncover areas within the business to drive performance improvements to unlock productivity and improve execution</li><br><li>Support 3 year and annual planning needs, including generating insights to inform investment of resources for new products and ensure Samsara is accelerating new product growth&nbsp;</li><br><li>Present to Samsara leadership on topics related to new product growth</li><br><li>Collaborate with Sales, Product, Marketing, and other GTM functions, and build trusted relationships across organizations and functions and create "connective tissue" between cross-functional teams</li><br><li>Champion, role model, and embed Samsara’s cultural principles (Focus on Customer Success, Build for the Long Term, Adopt a Growth Mindset, Be Inclusive, Win as a Team) as we scale globally and across new offices</li><br></ul><br><p><strong>Minimum requirements for the role:</strong></p><br><ul><br><li>6-10 years of experience in Consulting, Finance, Business Operations, Sales Strategy &amp; Operations or other analytical role</li><br><li>Kind and collaborative orientation who is energized by working with a lot of different types of people from many teams</li><br><li>Highly organized with exceptional attention to detail and the ability to manage multiple projects on a tight deadline</li><br><li>Strong analytical and logical reasoning skills; deep sense of curiosity&nbsp;</li><br><li>Experience in building trusting relationships and influencing others (incl. executive audiences)</li><br><li>Self-starter who thrives and can multitask in fast-paced and often ambiguous environments; enthusiastic about improving efficiencies. Bias for action</li><br><li>Strong presentation skills, able to convey complex ideas in a clear, concise manner both verbally and in writing, comfortable in business and technical discussions. Ability to synthesize a broad set of information into a cohesive narrative</li><br></ul><br><p><strong>Preferred qualifications for the role:</strong></p><br><ul><br><li>MBA a plus</li><br><li>Experience working with large data sets and leveraging DataBricks, BigQuery, SQL, or similar</li><br><li>Experience leveraging AI tools to deliver at an accelerated pace (Cursor, ChatGPT, Gong, etc.)</li><br><li>Experience in GTM Strategy, with focus on new products</li><br><li>Spanish speaking a plus</li><br></ul><br><p class="p1">#LI-Remote</p>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/samsara-senior-sales-strategy-manager-new-product">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/samsara-senior-sales-strategy-manager-new-product</a></p>

<p>

</p>

<p>We are looking for a full-stack engineer who has gone all-in on agentic-first workflows. You let Claude Code rip. You let it write, refactor, and ship. But you have the years of experience to review what it produces, catch what it misses, and pop into the IDE when it matters.</p>

Pre-seed with top-tier investors, small elite team, aggressive roadmap. Second-time pet care founders who built one of the largest pet care companies in the country.</p>
<p>Full-time role with salary + equity. Send a short bio and examples of recent agentic-first work to pat@wonder.dog</p>

    <item>
      <media:content url="https://wwr-pro.s3.amazonaws.com/logos/0171/4739/logo.gif" type="image/png"/>
      <title>Chooose: Engagement Manager (US - ET)</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description><img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/4739/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" />

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> IL / TX / MA / NY / MD / FL / PA
    <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://vonq.io/48v73K0">https://vonq.io/48v73K0</a>
</p>

<p>
</p><p>Chooose builds software to enable the lower carbon fuel value chain.</p>
<p>Companies like Delta Air Lines, Cathay Pacific, British Airways, and Microsoft use the Chooose platform to build, operate, and scale their lower carbon fuel programs (typically referred to as Sustainable Aviation Fuel, or SAF), and to advance voluntary and compliance carbon management initiatives.</p>
<p>With offices in Miami and Oslo, and remote employees across the US and Europe, Chooose is relentlessly focused on delivering enterprise software products to enable our customers to drive lower carbon fuel adoption. The company has raised $50M from leading venture capital and strategic investors.</p>
<p>
</p><h3>The role</h3>
As an<em> </em>Engagement Manager at Chooose, you will partner with our enterprise customers in the aviation and energy sectors, enabling them to build and operate their SAF programs. In close collaboration with the Chooose Customer organization, you will own day-to-day relationships with our largest customers in your assigned region, supporting customers across their entire experience with the Chooose platform, from implementation to solution go-live and beyond.
<p>&nbsp;</p>
<p>

</p><p><strong>This is a remote role that must be based in Illinois, Texas, Massachusetts, New York, Pennsylvania, Maryland, or Florida</strong></p>

<p></p>What you'll do
<ul><li>Own total responsibility for a portfolio of key enterprise customers within the aviation, energy, and logistics sectors.</li><li>Become the expert on the customer's SAF program. Thoroughly understand the customer’s program objectives, and guide how the customer leverages the Chooose platform to reach these objectives.</li><li>Cultivate high-trust relationships with key stakeholders across our customer organizations (from Sustainability to Fuel Procurement) and function as the customer's trusted advisor.</li><li>Drive customer success. Assess, clarify, and validate customer needs and new commercial expansion opportunities on an ongoing basis. Proactively qualify and champion these needs and opportunities internally, with an emphasis on gathering and delivering structured product feedback.</li><li>Maintain a balanced approach and multiple perspectives. Enable commercial growth while considering Chooose's commitment to enabling long-term, high-integrity climate action.</li><li>Manage complex software deployments. Supported by an assigned Technical Implementation Manager and other key resources, oversee the implementation of complex decarbonization programs including a range of climate solutions from Sustainable Aviation Fuel to carbon offsets and removals.</li><li>Refine our playbook. Drive continuous improvement across Technical Implementation, Customer Operations, and Customer Success functions.</li><li>Collaborate with multiple Chooose teams to execute the operational tasks needed to achieve program objectives on time and with high quality.</li><li>Proactively and continually educate yourself on the carbon-related requirements and market trends impacting our customers and the sectors in which we operate.</li></ul>
What you bring to the table• Bachelor's or Master's degree from an accredited institution, ideally in the hard sciences.<br>• Minimum of 4 years of demonstrated success in management consulting, SaaS implementation, enterprise project management, or similar.<br>• Experience in enterprise software organizations relating to carbon markets, fuel markets, or carbon accounting is a plus.<br>• Technical capability. You enjoy helping customers solve business and technical problems, and are comfortable with technical and highly configurable SaaS solutions. Previous experience with API integrations and enterprise-grade SaaS solutions is a plus.<br>• You listen carefully and authentically care about solving customer problems.<br>• Polished presentation skills and are comfortable discussing technical and commercial topics with external stakeholders.<br>• Self-directed problem solver who takes initiative<br>Flexible with work hours for global customer support.<br>• You're willing to be flexible with your work hours to support your colleagues and accommodate our global customers.<br>• You’re open to frequent travel on short notice.<br>• You have superior verbal and written communication skills in English. Spanish is a plus.<br>• Must be based in Illinois, Texas Massachusetts, New York, Pennsylvania, Maryland, or Florida<p>
</p><h3>The interview process</h3>
<p>At Chooose, we prioritize transparency throughout our interview process. If your qualifications look like a fit, we’ll begin with a few introductory conversations where you'll have the chance to discuss your experience and learn more about our company. The second phase varies depending on the role and will involve a practical exercise for you to show your work. You’ll receive written instructions for the exercise in advance, and we’ll then schedule a time to discuss. The third and final phase consists of a one-on-one conversation with a member of our executive team. The process should take approx. 4-6 weeks. While we strive to keep to this timeline, the occasional adjustment may occur; we’re focused on ensuring enough time to get to know one another.</p>
<p><strong>Pay, perks, &amp; more</strong></p>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
<p>We offer a competitive salary, a comprehensive benefits package including medical, dental, and vision insurance, voluntary 401k contributions, paid parental leave, a robust PTO package, the option to participate in our employee equity program, flexible work hours, and access to 'Spaces' coworking space.</p>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
<p>We value diversity and believe forming teams in which everyone can be their authentic self is key to our success. We encourage people from underrepresented backgrounds and different industries to apply.</p>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
<p><strong>Compensation will be based on experience and skill, commensurate with market rates, and will include both salary and equity in Chooose.</strong></p>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
<p><strong>Chooose is an equal opportunity employer and does not discriminate based on race, color, religion (creed), gender, gender expression, age, national origin (ancestry), disability, marital status, sexual orientation, or military status. We are committed to providing an inclusive and welcoming environment to our employees and welcome input from candidates and employees on how we can enhance our inclusiveness.</strong></p>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
<p><em>Prerequisite for Employment: Chooose may request to conduct background checks on prospective applicants to verify the information provided in the CV, transcripts, and other documentation. This background check may be carried out by our partner and will not be conducted without the applicant's prior consent. Prospective applicants will receive more information about this.</em></p>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/chooose-engagement-manager-us-et">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/chooose-engagement-manager-us-et</a></p>
</description>

      <title>act digital: Full-stack Developer (SP)</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Warsaw, Poland
</p>

<div><div><p class="googlejobs-paragraph--empty"></p><h2 class="title">Company Description</h2></div><div class="wysiwyg"><p>Our mission as a company providing IT services is to provide our clients all over the world with the best solutions. We manage to do this by analyzing the needs of our clients and matching them to the skills and aspirations of our employees. Therefore, one of our main motivations is to provide each Employee and Consultant with a satisfying experience. Joining us means being part of a community with diverse personalities. Start your adventure with act digital!</p></div><div><p class="googlejobs-paragraph--empty"></p><h2 class="title">Job Description</h2></div><div class="wysiwyg"><p>The project integrates the Charge app into the electric vehicle ecosystem for a leading German car manufacturer. It ensures seamless interaction between various Charge Point Operators (CPOs) and end-users, focusing on real-time synchronization of charging station data (availability, power) and delivering a smooth experience from locating a charger to invoicing.</p></div><div><p class="googlejobs-paragraph--empty"></p><h2 class="title">Qualifications</h2></div><div class="wysiwyg"><ul><li><p><strong>3+ years of professional experience</strong> as a Full Stack or Backend/Frontend Developer.</p></li><li><p>Strong experience with <strong>Java</strong> and <strong>Spring Boot.</strong></p></li><li><p>Solid frontend development skills using <strong>React.</strong></p></li><li><p>Experience working with <strong>cloud platforms</strong> and <strong>microservices architecture.</strong></p></li><li><p>Familiarity with <strong>message brokers</strong> (e.g., Kafka, RabbitMQ) and <strong>NoSQL databases.</strong></p></li><li><p>Good understanding of <strong>REST API design</strong>, development, and testing practices.</p></li><li><p><strong>English proficiency at a B2 level.</strong></p></li></ul></div><div><p class="googlejobs-paragraph--empty"></p><h2 class="title">Additional Information</h2></div><div class="wysiwyg"><ul><li>Work model:&nbsp;<strong>Remote</strong></li><li>Type of contract:<strong>&nbsp;B2B</strong></li><li>Rate:&nbsp;<strong>up to 150 PLN/H net + VAT</strong></li></ul><p><strong>We offer</strong></p><ul><li>Access to local and international projects - Clients from France, Germany, Portugal, UK, and Benelux.</li><li>Professional development support - trainings, technical certificates, conference participation, foreign language classes, and soft skills trainings are subsidized for up to 2 000 PLN.</li><li>Bonus for recommending Candidates starting from 6 000 up to 10000 PLN.</li><li>Fully paid Medicover healthcare card.</li><li>Psychological support program WellBee.</li><li>Multisport card.</li><li>Regular integration events and gifts.</li><li>Long-term cooperation.</li><li>Relocation Program.</li></ul><div></div><p><em>If You applied for this position the Controller of your personal will be&nbsp; ACT DIGITAL POLSKA Sp. z o.o., with its registered office at </em>Przyokopowa 31, 01-208 Warsaw<em>. The personal data provided by you will be processed for the purpose of the recruitment process and&nbsp;for future recruitment processes. You will have the right too choose one or both options on next page.</em></p><p><em>You have the right to access the content of your data, request their rectification, erasure, restriction of processing, the right to data portability, the right to object to the processing of your data and the right to lodge a complaint to the President of the Personal Data Protection Office.</em></p></div></div>

      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Augsburg, München, Remote, Hamburg
</p>

<div class="description-wrapper description-wrapper-shown" lang="de"><br><br><h5 class="detail-block-title">Was wir machen</h5><br><div class="detail-block-description"><br><strong>Ready to go digital? Mit uns?</strong><br>Wir sind ein junges Technologieunternehmen aus Augsburg, das Organisationen dabei unterstützt, ihre Prozesse digital und nachhaltig zu automatisieren. Mit einem klaren Fokus auf modernen Open-Source-Technologien wie Camunda, Spring Boot und React entwickeln wir Software, die echten Mehrwert schafft. Dabei denken wir End-to-End, arbeiten eng mit unseren Kunden zusammen und setzen auf Technologien, die echten Nutzen bringen. Wir gestalten Digitalisierung, die bleibt!<br><br><br></div><br><br><br><h5 class="detail-block-title">Deine Aufgaben</h5><br><div class="detail-block-description"><br><ul><li>Entwicklung und Implementierung von webbasierten, verteilten Business-Anwendungen mit Java, Spring Boot sowie TypeScript und React.</li><li>Verantwortung für den gesamten Software-Entwicklungsprozess – von der Architektur über die Implementierung bis hin zum Rollout.</li><li>Enge Zusammenarbeit mit den Verantwortlichen von externen Schnittstellen, um eine nahtlose Integration der verschiedenen Systemkomponenten zu gewährleisten.</li><li>Gestaltung, Optimierung und Bereitstellung von REST-APIs für interne und externe Systeme.</li><li>Durchführung von Code-Reviews, Testing und Qualitätssicherung.</li><li>Automatisierung von DevOps-Prozessen und Continuous Integration/Continuous Deployment (CI/CD).</li><li>Überwachung, Sicherstellung und Verbesserung der Performance und Skalierbarkeit der Anwendungen im Betrieb.</li><li>Analyse, Planung und Umsetzung von technischen Anforderungen und Lösungen in enger Abstimmung mit den Kunden.</li></ul><br></div><br><br><br><h5 class="detail-block-title">Dein Profil</h5><br><div class="detail-block-description"><br><ul><li>Abgeschlossenes Studium in Informatik, Wirtschaftsinformatik oder eine vergleichbare Qualifikation.</li><li>Mehrjährige praktische Erfahrung in der Entwicklung von Full-Stack-Anwendungen, insbesondere mit Java und Spring Boot sowie React und TypeScript.</li><li>Erfahrung mit relationalen Datenbanken und SQL (primär PostgreSQL).</li><li>Grundkenntnisse im Bereich DevOps und in der Nutzung von CI/CD-Tools (GitHub Actions).</li><li>Erfahrung im Umgang mit Cloud-Technologien (Google Cloud Platform) und Kubernetes ist von Vorteil.</li><li>Fähigkeit, komplexe technische Anforderungen verständlich zu kommunizieren und pragmatische Lösungen zu entwickeln.</li><li>Selbstständige Arbeitsweise, hohe Eigeninitiative und Begeisterung für die kontinuierliche Weiterentwicklung von Technologien.</li><li>Fließende Deutsch- und Englischkenntnisse in Wort und Schrift.</li><li>Du übernimmst die Verantwortung für Projekte – von der Entwicklung der Architektur bis zum Rollout.</li></ul><br></div><br><br><br><h5 class="detail-block-title">Warum wir?</h5><br><div class="detail-block-description"><br><ul><li>4+1 Modell: 20 % deiner Arbeitszeit für Weiterbildung oder interne Projekte.</li><li>Remote-First: Arbeiten wann &amp; wo du willst + 30 Tage Urlaub + Workation im EU-Ausland möglich.</li><li>Work-Life-Balance: Flexible Arbeitszeiten, die zu deinem Leben passen.</li><li>Dein Setup: Mac, Linux oder Windows – du entscheidest, was du brauchst. Homeoffice-Ausstattung inklusive.</li><li>Teamkultur: Regelmäßige Teamevents, gemeinsame Workations.</li><li>Zusätzliche Benefits**:** 50 € steuerfreie Sachbezüge im Monat &amp; Zugang zu Corporate Benefits.</li></ul><br></div><br><br><br><h5 class="detail-block-title">Über uns</h5><br><div class="detail-block-description"><br><p>Wir begrüßen alle Bewerbungen – unabhängig von Geschlecht, Nationalität, ethnischer und sozialer Herkunft, Religion oder Weltanschauung, Behinderung, Alter sowie sexueller Orientierung und Identität. Entscheidend für uns sind Motivation, Qualifikation und Persönlichkeit.<br><br>Bei uns ist jeder, egal ob Werkstudent oder Geschäftsführer, gleichberechtigt und kann sich in alle Bereiche des Unternehmens einbringen.</p><br></div><br><br></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/miragon-full-stack-developer-m-w-d">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/miragon-full-stack-developer-m-w-d</a></p>

      <title>CloudDevs: Full-stack/Backend developers LLM focused.</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state>Delaware</state>
      <skills>Java, JavaScript, Node.js, Python, and Go</skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Contract</type>
      <description><img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0081/8410/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" />

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> San Francisco
    <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://clouddevs.com/">https://clouddevs.com/</a>
</p>

<p><strong>Location</strong> LATAMs (Americas) and Europe preffered.&nbsp;</p>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
<p>Do<strong>&nbsp;</strong>you want to shape the future of autonomous agents like OpenClaw?</p>
<p>We collaborate with leading AI organizations to train Large Language Models (LLMs) to function as proactive, multi-step agents. Our projects focus on teaching these systems how to design, coordinate, and optimize complex, real-world architectural workflows.</p>
<p>Whether you are a passionate orchestration guru or experienced software developer -- we want you to help us train the world's most advanced generative systems.</p>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
<p><strong>About the opportunity:</strong></p>
<ul class="list-disc list-inside">
<li>Outlier is looking for skilled software experts to help train generative AI models.</li>
<li>This freelance role is<strong>&nbsp;</strong>fully remote and offers flexible hours—you can contribute whenever it fits your schedule.</li>
</ul>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
<p><strong>You may contribute your expertise by…</strong></p>
<ul class="list-disc list-inside">
<li>Developing objective, verifiable criteria (rubrics) to evaluate system performance and ensure outputs meet strict functional requirements.</li>
<li>Reviewing system logs and "trajectories" to refactor code, improve execution paths, and reach a "Golden Path" of perfect reliability</li>
<li>Testing systems for vulnerabilities, including improper data exposure, unauthorized access escalations, and edge-case failures.</li>
</ul>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
<p><strong>We’re looking for people with…</strong></p>
<ul class="list-disc list-inside">
<li>2+ years of experience in backend engineering, AI automation, or complex systems integration</li>
<li>Proven ability to build and maintain production-grade software with modular separation (e.g., distinct services for data parsing, logic processing, and reporting)</li>
<li>Strong command of at least two major languages (e.g., Python, JavaScript, Go, or Java) and experience working with SQL databases</li>
<li>Practical experience building for live, non-mocked environments and handling multi-turn system interactions.</li>
<li>Outstanding attention to detail and the ability to provide clear, high-density technical feedback on complex system behaviors</li>
</ul>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
<p><strong>Nice to have…</strong></p>
<ul class="list-disc list-inside">
<li>Expertise building multi-stage coordination tasks where data acquisition leads to reasoned output</li>
<li>Hands on experience integrating agents with live tools such as Supabase, Gmail, and various APIs to solve real-world problems</li>
<li>High level of comfort implementing persistent state and session discovery using&nbsp;<strong>MEMORY.md</strong>&nbsp;to track agent progress.</li>
<li>Experience identifying subtle failures like privacy leaks, authority escalation, or indirect prompt injections.</li>
</ul>
<p>&nbsp;</p>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/clouddevs-full-stack-backend-developers-llm-focused">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/clouddevs-full-stack-backend-developers-llm-focused</a></p>
</description>

      <title>Treehouse Job Board: Electrical Design Lead</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Chicago, IL
</p>

<div class="ATS_htmlPreview"><p><b><strong>About Treehouse&nbsp;</strong></b></p><p><span>Treehouse is an electrical contractor committed to accelerating the decarbonization of the places we live and work. By operating as a centralized, end-to-end partner, Treehouse helps companies scale electrification programs and delivers seamless, delightful installation experiences for customers</span><span>.</span></p><p><br></p><p><b><strong>About the Role</strong></b></p><p><span>This role is ideal for a highly skilled Journeyman Electrician who is ready to move beyond the field and into design and enablement. The Electrical Design Lead is responsible for ensuring the electrical scope of every project is technically sound, code-compliant, and ready for execution. This role provides scoping oversight, supports pre-sale technical review, and helps prepare every job for a smooth, high-quality install. The ideal candidate combines deep field knowledge with design aptitude and strong communication skills to bridge gaps between design, scoping, and delivery.</span></p><p><br></p><p><b><strong>Responsibilities</strong></b></p><p><span>The Electrical Design Lead will:</span></p><ul><li><span>Provide technical design and scoping support by reviewing complex project scopes to ensure feasibility and compliance, supporting project scoping escalations, and creating or advising on diagrams and layout recommendations in partnership with drafters and permit designers</span></li><li><span>Act as the technical partner to sales by clarifying edge-case designs and customer constraints before proposal finalization, providing fast, high-confidence answers to questions on installation approach, and flagging risky or non-standard conditions early to prevent installation delays</span></li><li><span>Provide permitting and plan set guidance by reviewing permit plan sets for accuracy, providing field-informed feedback to improve diagram quality and jurisdictional alignment, and partnering with the Head Electrician and permitting team on AHJ-specific requirements or technical justifications</span></li><li><span>Provide support to installation teams by reviewing projects for completeness before handoff to installation operations and collaborating with install operations to flag projects that may require field reverification or Master Electrician input</span></li><li><span>Serve as knowledge management expert by creating technical FAQs, reference guides, and installation readiness checklists and contributing to scoping libraries and internal playbooks with field-proven best practices</span></li><li><span>Contribute to continuous improvement of installation process, tools and procedures by identifying opportunities for simplification and standardization, gaps in scoping logic and repeat issues.&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span></li></ul><p><br></p><p><b><strong>Minimum Qualifications</strong></b></p><p><span>Successful Electrical Design Lead candidates will demonstrate:</span></p><ul><li><span>Licensed Journeyman Electrician certification with at least 5 years hands-on residential experience</span></li><li><span>Knowledge and experience with NEC and the ability to interpret code for real-world scenarios</span></li><li><span>Experience working in a software-based environment, including comfortable use of G-suite and/or Microsoft Office.</span></li></ul><p><br></p><p><b><strong>Preferred Qualifications</strong></b></p><p><span>Additionally, successful Electrical Design Lead candidates may demonstrate:</span></p><ul><li><span>Experience in a startup or high-growth tech company environment</span></li><li><span>10 + years of hands-on residential experience, ideally in L2 EV charging, service upgrades, load management, and smart panels</span></li><li><span>Excellent written and oral communication skills</span></li><li><span>Comfort and experience reviewing phots, plans, and scopes in digital systems (HubSpot, Dropbox, Figma, etc)</span></li><li><span>Strong communication skills and ability to explain technical tradeoffs to non-technical teammates and customers</span></li><li><span>Strong attention to detail, but never at the the cost of slowing things down</span></li></ul><p><br></p><p><span>This role may be based in any of the following locations: Chicago, Denver, San Francisco, or Remote. The salary range for this position is $75,000 - $90,000 annually, plus equity. This is a good faith estimate of what Treehouse may pay for a new hire; actual pay may vary based on prevailing wages in geographic location and a candidate's knowledge, skills, abilities, related experience, education, certifications, and ability to meet required job qualifications.</span></p><p><br></p><p><b><strong>Featured benefits include:</strong></b></p><ul><li><span>Medical insurance</span></li><li><span>Vision insurance</span></li><li><span>Dental insurance</span></li><li><span>401(k)</span></li><li><span>Unlimited paid time off</span></li></ul></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/treehouse-job-board-electrical-design-lead">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/treehouse-job-board-electrical-design-lead</a></p>
</description>

      <title>Trace3: Sr. Cloud Solutions Architect | DevOps (Remote)</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Irvine, CA, United States
</p>

<div class="job__description body"><div><p></p><br><p>Who is <strong>Trace3</strong>?</p><br><p>Trace3 is a leading Transformative IT Authority, providing unique technology solutions and consulting services to our clients. Equipped with elite engineering and dynamic innovation, we empower IT executives and their organizations to achieve competitive advantage through a process of Integrate, Automate, Innovate.</p><br><p>Our culture at Trace3 embodies the spirit of a startup with the advantage of a scalable business. Employees can grow their career and have fun while doing it!</p><br><p>Trace3 is headquartered in Irvine, California. We employ more than 1,200 people all over the United States. Our major field office locations include Denver, Indianapolis, Grand Rapids, Lexington, Los Angeles, Louisville, Texas, San Francisco.&nbsp;&nbsp;</p><br><p><strong>Ready to discover the possibilities that live in technology?</strong></p><br><p>&nbsp;</p><br><p><strong>Come Join Us!</strong></p><br><p><strong>Street-Smart</strong>&nbsp;<strong>-&nbsp;<em>Thriving in Dynamic Times</em></strong></p><br><p>We are flexible and resilient in a fast-changing environment. We continuously innovate and drive constructive change while keeping a focus on the “big picture.” We exercise sound business judgment in making high-quality decisions in a timely and cost-effective manner. We are highly creative and can dig deep within ourselves to find positive solutions to different problems.</p><br><p><strong>Juice -&nbsp;<em>The “Stuff” it takes to be a Needle Mover </em></strong></p><br><p>We get things done and drive results. We lead without a title, empowering others through a can-do attitude. We look forward to the goal, mentally&nbsp;mapping out&nbsp;every checkpoint on the pathway to success, and visualizing what the final destination looks and feels like.</p><br><p><strong>Teamwork -&nbsp;<em>Humble, Hungry and Smart</em></strong></p><br><p>We are humble individuals who understand how our job impacts the company's mission. We treat others with respect, admit mistakes, give credit where it’s due and demonstrate transparency. We “bring the weather” by exhibiting positive leadership and solution-focused thinking. We hug people in their trials, struggles, and failures – not just their success. We appreciate the individuality of the people around us.</p><br><p>&nbsp;</p></div><div><p>About the role:</p><br><p>As the Senior Cloud Architect, you will be responsible for successfully designing cloud platform engineering solutions while focusing on consulting, project delivery oversight, and pre-sales activities. You will be a subject matter expert and trusted advisor, providing guidance and working closely with clients, partners, and other business units to ensure that consulting engagements meet their objectives. You will support pre-sales activities, such as reviewing requirements, creating level-of-effort estimates, proposals, and delivering proof of concepts.</p><br><p>What You'll do:</p><br><ul><br><li>Design, develop, and oversee implementation of consulting and hands-on services offerings for platform engineering.</li><br><li>Serve as a cloud native technical resource to determine the needs of our client’s businesses and recommend solutions across the broad cloud and platform engineering ecosystems.</li><br><li>Align solutions with standards and best practices working with cross-functional engineering and consulting teams.</li><br><li>Collaborate and communicate with the Sales and Account Management teams to ensure smooth and successful delivery and assist with the identification of additional services and sales opportunities within the customer’s environment.</li><br><li>Using your consulting background, establish strong and lasting relationships with key stakeholders and decision-makers in client organizations.</li><br><li>Contribute to the development of internal best practices as well as new innovative consulting and hands-on services offerings that we can take to market.</li><br><li>Develop and deliver proof of concepts to clients.</li><br><li>Support the Sales team by creating level-of-effort estimates and proposals.</li><br><li>Provide thought leadership in cloud native technologies, DevOps, and platform engineering.</li><br><li>Provide insights into the partner ecosystem, advancements and emerging technologies related to Platform Engineering, Automation and Observability.</li><br><li>Maintain enterprise use cases and stories to support our GTM, offerings and to represent the landscape.</li><br><li>Support Trace3’s Digital Consulting group with participation in Anchor Accounts, thought leadership to drive continuous engagement in our most strategic clients.</li><br></ul><br><p>Qualifications:</p><br><ul><br><li>Bachelor’s degree from an accredited university required or equivalent work experience.</li><br><li>Strong consulting background with preferably prior hands-on experience with cloud-native technologies, DevOps, and platform engineering.</li><br><li>Extensive experience with Kubernetes (K8s) technologies such as EKS, AKS, GKE, and OpenShift.</li><br><li>DevOps and DevSecOps ecosystem experience including CI/CD solutions, Jenkins, GitHub, Gitlab, Harness is strongly preferred.</li><br><li>Experience with observability solutions and Open Telemetry (OTEL).</li><br><li>Experience with BackStage and/or other internal developer portals a big plus.</li><br><li>Knowledge of K8s operators and solutions like Cilium and Crossplane.</li><br><li>AWS Certified Solution Architect and/or DevOps Engineer.</li><br><li>5+ years of experience with implementation and support of cloud compute, networking, and storage services.</li><br><li>Experience with cloud operations using native and third-party tools for monitoring and management.</li><br><li>Strong scripting skills in languages such as Python, Ruby, or GoLang.</li><br><li>Highly organized, detail-oriented, excellent time management skills and able to effectively prioritize tasks in a fast-paced, high-volume, and evolving work environment.</li><br><li>Ability to approach customer and sales requests in a proactive and consultative manner; listen and understand customer requests and needs and effectively deliver.</li><br><li>Effectively facilitate discussions, collaborate with team members, and proactively engage with client resources for tasks such as discovery, requirements analysis, data collection, and synthesis.</li><br><li>Create the necessary documentation such as architecture, test/QA, and as-built documentation.</li><br><li>Comfortable managing multiple and changing priorities, and meeting deadlines in an entrepreneurial environment.</li><br></ul></div><div class="job__pay-ranges"><div class="pay-range"><div class="description"><div class="body"><span>Actual salary will be based on a variety of factors, including location, experience, skill set, performance, licensure and certification, and business needs. The range for this position in other geographic locations may differ. Certain positions may also be eligible for variable incentive compensation, such as bonuses or commissions, that is not included in the base salary.</span></div></div><p class="body body--medium">Estimated Pay Range</p><p class="body">$190,000 - $225,000 USD</p></div></div><div><br><p><strong>The Perks</strong></p><br><ul><br><li>Comprehensive medical, dental and vision plans for you and your dependents</li><br><li>401(k) Retirement Plan with Employer Match, 529 College Savings Plan, Health Savings Account, Life Insurance, and Long-Term Disability</li><br><li>Competitive Compensation</li><br><li>Training and development programs</li><br><li>Stocked kitchen with snacks and beverages</li><br><li>Collaborative and cool culture</li><br><li>Work-life balance and generous paid time off</li><br></ul><br><p>&nbsp;</p><br><p><strong>Our Commitment</strong></p><br><p>At the core of Trace3's DNA is our people. We are a diverse group of talented individuals who understand the importance of teamwork and demonstrating leadership, character, and passion in all that we do.</p><br><p>We’re committed to fostering an inclusive workplace where everyone feels respected, valued, and empowered to grow. We recognize that embracing diversity drives innovation, improves outcomes, fosters collaboration, boosts teammate satisfaction, and builds a more inclusive culture.</p><br><p>As an equal opportunity employer, Trace3 bases all employment decisions based on individual qualifications, merit, and business requirements. We do not engage in discrimination on the basis of race, color, religion, sex (including gender identity, sexual orientation, and pregnancy), national origin, age (40 or older), disability, genetic information, or any other characteristic protected by federal, state, or local law.</p><br><p>Any demographic information provided is strictly voluntary, kept confidential in accordance with Equal Employment Opportunity (EEO) regulations, and will not be used in employment decisions, including hiring, promotions, or mentorship programs. We are committed to providing equal employment opportunities for all.</p><br><p>If you require a reasonable accommodation to complete the application process or participate in an interview, please email&nbsp;<a href="mailto:recruiting@trace3.com">recruiting@trace3.com</a>.</p><br><p>&nbsp;</p><br><p><strong>***To all recruitment agencies:</strong>&nbsp;Trace3 does not accept unsolicited agency resumes/CVs. Please do not forward resumes/CVs to our careers email addresses, Trace3 employees or any other company location. Trace3 is not responsible for any fees related to unsolicited resumes/CVs.</p></div></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/trace3-sr-cloud-solutions-architect-devops-remote">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/trace3-sr-cloud-solutions-architect-devops-remote</a></p>
</description>
