    <item>
      <title>Veeva Systems: Data Product Manager - Link Activity Data</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Germany - Berlin
</p>

<div class="content"><div class="section-wrapper page-full-width"><div class="section page-centered"><div><span>Veeva Systems is a mission-driven organization and pioneer in industry cloud, helping life sciences companies bring therapies to patients faster. As one of the fastest-growing SaaS companies in history, we surpassed $2B in revenue in our last fiscal year with extensive growth potential ahead.</span></div><div><br></div><div><span>At the heart of Veeva are our values: Do the Right Thing, Customer Success, Employee Success, and Speed. We're not just any public company – we made history in 2021 by becoming a&nbsp;</span><a href="https://medium.com/@peter.gassner/public-benefit-corporation-pbc-486e1e9508a6"><span>public benefit corporation</span></a><span>&nbsp;(PBC), legally bound to balancing the interests of customers, employees, society, and investors.</span></div><div><br></div><div><span>As a&nbsp;</span><a href="https://medium.com/@peter.gassner/work-anywhere-is-about-trusting-and-empowering-employees-ef1beba56590"><span>Work Anywhere</span></a><span>&nbsp;company, we support your flexibility to work from home or in the office, so you can thrive in your ideal environment.</span></div><div><br></div><div><span>Join us in&nbsp;</span><a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TaPSP8cCSKY&amp;ab_channel=Forbes"><span>transforming the life sciences industry</span></a><span>, committed to making a positive impact on its customers, employees, and communities.</span></div><div><br></div><div><b><span>The Role</span></b></div><div><br></div><div><span>Our vision for Veeva Link is to become the global leader in deep data for life sciences. It helps professionals to find the right people for, e.g., clinical trials, education programs, or advisory boards. This streamlined access helps to reduce the time-to-market of important drugs, conduct trials with the most relevant experts in the respective field, and spread information about new treatments to key people in the life science community. You can read more about Veeva Link on our product pages at </span><a class="postings-link" href="https://www.veeva.com/products/veeva-link/">https://www.veeva.com/products/veeva-link/</a><span>.</span></div><div><span>&nbsp;</span></div><div><span>We are seeking an experience Product Manager to lead our Link Activity data product. This is part of Link’s Internal Data Products which provide a central source of high-quality deep data for the Veeva Link suite of products. The Activity product is focused on ingesting, processing, tagging and delivering data for scientific and digital activities including but not limited to clinical trials, publications, guidelines and scientific events.</span></div><div><span>&nbsp;</span></div><div><span>The ideal candidate brings a combination of product management experience with a desire to build a diverse data product that forms a foundational element of the Link data ecosystem. You should be energized to work closely with a squad of data engineers, data operations and analysts to ensure successful delivery of high value features.</span></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>What You’ll Do</h3><ul class="posting-requirements plain-list"><ul><li>Define and prioritize the Link Activity data roadmap</li><li>Drive the development of data initiatives from ideation to delivery, ensuring product and customer success</li><li>Align product development and communicate feature releases with product stakeholders</li><li>Design and define requirements for product data model and delivery pipelines</li><li>Lead a squad of Data Engineers, Data Scientists, Data Curators &amp; Analysts</li><li>Become a subject matter expert for Link Activity data including clinical trials, scientific literature &amp; events, digital activity and more.</li><li>Collaborate with other Link Data Product Managers to facilitate cross-product alignment and consistency</li><li>Support internal teams on product queries and training</li></ul></ul></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>Requirements</h3><ul class="posting-requirements plain-list"><ul><li>5+ years of experience in Product Manager roles – software or data</li><li>Strong experience in product decision making</li><li>Ability to take ownership and prioritize roadmap whilst comfortable with being agile</li><li>Great technical skills to translate business requirements into engineering terms with ability to go into details where needed</li><li>Strong analytical or computer science skills</li><li>Team first mentality</li><li>Excellent written and oral communication skills and attention to detail</li></ul></ul></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>Nice to Have</h3><ul class="posting-requirements plain-list"><ul><li>Experience in building data products or data platforms (data models, data pipelines and delivery)</li><li>In depth knowledge of the Healthcare and Pharmaceutical domain</li><li>Understanding of NLP/NER or application of LLMs</li></ul></ul></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>Perks &amp; Benefits</h3><ul class="posting-requirements plain-list"><ul><li>Opportunity to work in a diverse and international workspace</li><li>Veeva 1% charitable giving program</li><li>Life insurance + pension fund</li><li>Fitness reimbursement</li></ul></ul></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><span>#RemoteGermany</span></div><div><br></div><div><span>Veeva’s headquarters is located in the San Francisco Bay Area with offices in more than 15 countries around the world.</span></div><div><br></div><div><span>As an equal opportunity employer, Veeva is committed to fostering a culture of inclusion and growing a diverse workforce. Diversity makes us stronger. It comes in many forms. Gender, race, ethnicity, religion, politics, sexual orientation, age, disability and life experience shape us all into unique individuals. We value people for the individuals they are and the contributions they can bring to our teams.</span></div><div><br></div><div><span>If you need assistance or accommodation due to a disability or special need when applying for a role or in our recruitment process, please contact us at&nbsp;</span><a href="mailto:talent_accommodations@veeva.com"><span>talent_accommodations@veeva.com</span></a><span>.</span></div></div></div></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/veeva-systems-data-product-manager-link-activity-data-1">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/veeva-systems-data-product-manager-link-activity-data-1</a></p>
</description>

    <item>
      <title>Carbmee: (Senior) Product Manager (all genders) | ClimateTech</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Berlin,Remote Bavaria,Remote Berlin
</p>

<p>Carbmee empowers organizations worldwide to systematically measure, manage, and reduce their carbon footprint. Backed by a recent €20M Series A funding from top VCs, we are one of the fastest-growing companies in European tech with offices in Berlin and Munich - proud to be at the forefront of climate innovation. Our platform leverages AI with millions of transactional data points to help enterprise customers tackle their most complex emissions challenges - far beyond compliance.</p><p><strong>Your Role &amp; Mission -</strong> You will be a key player in defining, developing, and refining our product to meet customer needs and drive the growth of our carbmee EIS™ platform, with a focus on integrating and leveraging AI-powered features. You’ll work closely with leadership and cross-functional teams to execute the product roadmap, drive go-to-market strategies, and ensure successful product launches, particularly for our AI-enhanced solutions.<br><br><strong>Your Background -</strong> If you're passionate about leveraging cutting-edge technology to accelerate climate action, have a strong understanding of the B2B enterprise SaaS field and have a data-driven mindset, we want to hear from you!</p><ul><li><p>Drive the end-to-end product strategy with a clear focus on data and process mining, while gradually introducing AI-powered features to enhance automation and insight generation</p></li><li><p>Translate complex customer and business needs into a product roadmap that balances long-term vision with immediate value</p></li><li><p>Collaborate closely with Engineering, Product Design, and Customer Success to deliver features from concept to launch, ensuring technical feasibility and strong user experience</p></li><li><p>Use product analytics, customer feedback, and market research to guide prioritization and continuous product improvements</p></li><li><p>Maintain alignment across internal stakeholders by clearly communicating priorities, trade-offs, and progress towards business goals</p></li></ul><ul><li><p>Extensive experience working as a Product Manager in software companies, especially B2B SaaS platforms</p></li><li><p>Working knowledge of AI/ML applications - ideally experience integrating or launching AI-powered features</p></li><li><p>Solid understanding of enterprise workflows (e.g. ERP, procurement, operations) and the ability to identify and solve process inefficiencies</p></li><li><p>Proven track record of translating business and user needs into scalable product solutions, balancing technical feasibility and customer value</p></li><li><p>Comfortable working closely with engineering teams, discussing technical constraints, and driving end-to-end product delivery</p></li><li><p>Strong analytical mindset with the ability to make data-informed decisions and evaluate product success through clear metrics</p></li><li><p>Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills - able to align internal teams and clearly present product strategies to non-technical audiences</p></li><li><p>Experience designing for technical or data-savvy end users with a strong sense for UX</p></li><li><p>A background in Computer Science, Data Science, or a related technical field is a plus</p></li><li><p>Thrive in fast-moving environments - you're hands-on, curious, and excited to help shape a product from the ground up<br><br></p></li></ul><p><em>Don't feel like you meet all the criteria? We get it: confidence can sometimes hold us back from applying for a job. We'll let you in on a little secret: there's no such thing as a 'perfect' candidate. Carbmee is a place where everyone can grow. So however you identify and whatever background you bring with you, please apply if this is a role that would make you excited to come into work on a Monday morning.</em></p><ul><li>Unique &amp; Powerful Mission - Join a fast-growing and ambitious tech company that is shaping the future of carbon management and fighting climate change</li><li>Compensation &amp; Rewards - a steep learning curve and ownership from day one. We offer an attractive compensation package, including virtual stock options</li><li>Health &amp; Wellbeing - Urban Sports Club subscription to stay healthy &amp; fit. 1:1 coaching sessions with Nilohealth for your mental well-being</li><li>Flexibility &amp; Work-Life Balance - a flexible hybrid or fully remote working culture with a lovely accessible office in Berlin-Mitte or the center of Munich</li><li>Team Culture - Our transparency, Humility, and Accountability values create a unique and supportive working environment. Be part of a multinational, motivated team that thinks work should be fun!</li><li>Connection &amp; Networking - from engaging workshops to regular team events, we offer plenty of opportunities to build meaningful connections, foster cross-functional relationships, and enhance collaboration</li><li>Trust &amp; Transparency - monthly All-Hands Meetings, weekly update newsletters, and Founders Q&amp;As. We keep you informed on current company numbers and goals</li></ul>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/carbmee-senior-product-manager-all-genders-climatetech">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/carbmee-senior-product-manager-all-genders-climatetech</a></p>
</description>

      <expires_at>Wed, 06 May 2026 18:03:24 +0000</expires_at>
      <guid>https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/carbmee-senior-product-manager-all-genders-climatetech</guid>

    </item>
    <item>
      <title>Ataccama: Senior Back-End Engineer (Java) - Product Foundation</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Brno, Czechia
</p>

<div class="content"><div class="section-wrapper page-full-width"><div class="section page-centered"><div><span>We are Ataccama, and we are on a mission to power a better future with data. Our product enables both technical and less technical ‘data people’ across their organizations to create high-quality, governed, safe, and reusable data products. It’s what made us a Leader in the Gartner Magic Quadrant® for Data Quality Solutions™, and what inspired Bain Capital Tech Opportunities to invest in our future growth.</span></div><div><br></div><div><span>Our vision is to be the leading AI-powered cloud data management company and to do that, we’re making Ataccama a great place to work and grow. Our people are located across the globe. They succeed by collaborating as a team and thrive in our company culture defined by these core values:</span></div><div><br></div><div><span>Challenging Fun</span></div><div><span>ONE Team</span></div><div><span>Customer Centric</span></div><div><span>Candid and Caring</span></div><div><span>Aim High</span></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>Your Challenge:</h3><ul class="posting-requirements plain-list"><ul><li>Build and maintain a truly complex self-service application for business users so they can work with data even without learning SQL or needing assistance from more technically-skilled colleagues.&nbsp;</li><li>Work on a well-established complex product with a big customer base.</li><li>Contribute to and own parts of advanced data management and processing services.</li><li>Improve and optimize existing solutions rather than designing it from scratch.</li><li>Make a product that contains all the features enterprise solutions must-have, while making it super-easy to use.</li><li>Take end-to-end ownership of the entire product, rather than just focusing on coding.</li></ul></ul></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>What You Will Do:</h3><ul class="posting-requirements plain-list"><ul><li>Understand data management and write solutions suitable for DM domains. This means designing scalable systems, ready to perform under huge amounts of data.</li><li>Contribute to customer satisfaction. In Ataccama, everyone is close to the customer and their problems, and can propose and drive changes to our product. You’ll need to work with microservices, messaging systems, and API designs covering different parts of the system.</li><li>Solve complex problems in data management, with an emphasis on performance.</li><li>Write clean, well-designed, documented, and testable code. We expect software engineers to understand and promote industry standards and best practices.</li><li>Take responsibility for your work, from code to production. We promote ownership of our work and expect you to deliver software that’s ready to deploy and run in cloud environments.</li><li>Take part in discussions and decisions impacting how our product is developed.</li><li>Be a team player who collaborates both within and outside the team.</li></ul></ul></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>Is This You?</h3><ul class="posting-requirements plain-list"><ul><li>You like solving problems and have a maker mindset</li><li>You see challenges as opportunities. You’re ready to jump in and find what works.</li><li>You’re not afraid of complex applications, and you don’t mind doing some research when engines require complex algorithms and data structures to work efficiently.</li><li>You enjoy constantly solving new challenges and being in contact with customers’ problems.</li><li>You are not afraid to take ownership of a whole competency. </li></ul></ul></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>Bonus Knowledge:</h3><ul class="posting-requirements plain-list"><ul><li>You have experience (or interest) in any of the following areas: Problem Solving, Complex Algorithms, Software Architecture, Databases, Cloud Operations, and/or Application Security/Identity Management.</li></ul></ul></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>Our Tech Stack:</h3><ul class="posting-requirements plain-list"><ul><li><b>Backend:</b> Java, Spring Boot, Kotlin, GraphQL, Python, jOOQ</li><li><b>Big data:</b> Spark, Redshift, Snowflake</li><li><b>Frontend:</b> TypeScript, React/Vue, Apollo, Nx, MobX, Styled Components</li><li><b>Storage:</b> Postgres, Elastic, Minio</li><li><b>Infrastructure: </b>GitLab CI/CD, Kubernetes, AWS, Azure</li></ul></ul></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>Your Team:</h3><ul class="posting-requirements plain-list"><ul><li>If you want to learn more about our Product &amp; Engineering structure, how it works, and why our teams are called Spaceports, you can take a look at our <a class="postings-link" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/martin-zahumensky-1085582/">Chief Product &amp; Technology Officer Martin Zahumensky’s</a> articles where he describes <a class="postings-link" href="https://medium.com/ataccama-spaceup">this and more in full detail</a>.</li></ul></ul></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>Work equipment</h3><ul class="posting-requirements plain-list"><ul><li>Company laptop</li><li>Company mobile phone + SIM card &amp; package of mobile data</li></ul></ul></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>Perks &amp; Benefits</h3><ul class="posting-requirements plain-list"><ul><li>Long-Term Incentive Program</li><li>"Bring Your Friend" referral program</li><li>Flexible working hours &amp; flexible working setup</li><li>The Global Family Support Program - A paid leave program to help all parents focus on the new addition to their family</li><li>2 sick days and 25 days of vacation,&nbsp; with the option to request additional Flexible Time-Off days when needed</li><li>Flexipass or Multisport card (after finishing your probation period)</li><li>Annual package for mental health support</li><li>Shared company cards for free entrance to Prague Zoo &amp; Botanical Garden</li><li>Company bikes, longboards, e-scooters</li><li>Online company language courses</li><li>Conference tickets to the best industry events of the year</li><li>Online courses &amp; company access to Udemy to hone your skills</li><li>Company library, where you can even suggest the best educational books for us to order</li><li>Kitchens stocked with fresh fruit and juice, teas, and the best coffee</li><div><br></div><li><i>While we highly value cooperation with all our business partners, we don’t accept unsolicited resumes from any sources other than directly from a candidate. We reserve the right not to pay any fee for sending an unsolicited offer containing the details or resume of a job candidate, even if the relevant candidate is employed by our company.&nbsp;</i></li></ul></ul></div></div></div></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/ataccama-senior-back-end-engineer-java-product-foundation">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/ataccama-senior-back-end-engineer-java-product-foundation</a></p>
</description>

    <item>
      <title>Celonis: Application Product Manager - Accounts Payable</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Bangalore, India
</p>

<div class="job__description body"><div><p>We're Celonis, the global leader in Process Mining technology and one of the world's fastest-growing SaaS firms. We believe there is a massive opportunity to unlock productivity by placing data and intelligence at the core of business processes - and for that, we need you to join us.</p></div><div><p><strong>The Team:</strong></p><br><p>The Celonis Finance team is a young team of product enthusiasts that focuses on developing best-in class Business Apps in the domain of Finance. Business Apps are purpose-built solutions created for a specific line of business, addressing most impactful pain points in their respective domain. The apps are best practice examples of how Celonis is used in new, innovative ways that push the boundaries of our platform. The team has a great balance of technical skills to build solutions paired with a customer focus and product management mindset to create meaningful products widely adopted across our customer base.</p><br><p>&nbsp;</p><br><p><strong>The Role:</strong></p><br><p>You will gain experience in the Finance and related processes and act as the interface between customers, our Go-To-Market and our Product &amp; Engineering teams, shaping the future of Celonis’ Business Apps in this domain. Take this chance to rethink the way companies run their Finance processes and help our customers to accelerate their value realization with Celonis.</p><br><p>&nbsp;</p><br><p><strong>The work you’ll do:</strong></p><br><ul><br><li>Work closely with customers to understand their pain points in Finance with a focus on Accounts Payable</li><br><li>Be involved in all steps within the product development lifecycle from ideation to product development to scaling solutions across all Celonis customers</li><br><li>Use the Celonis Process Intelligence Platform hands-on to develop new, innovative solutions in the area of Accounts Payable</li><br><li>Collaborate with platform product managers and engineers to guide and influence feature development of the platform</li><br><li>Work together with our UX team to define the user experience for our products</li><br></ul><br><p>&nbsp;</p><br><p>If you are passionate about Finance and Accounts Payable, the Celonis technology, and what it can do for our customers, here's your chance to directly contribute to taking our Celonis Process Intelligence Platform to the next level.</p><br><p>&nbsp;</p><br><p><strong>The qualifications you need:</strong></p><br><ul><br><li>3-5+ years of experience in Solution Engineering, Implementation Consulting, Business Analytics, Operations Research or comparable roles</li><br><li>Expert in data analysis including with tools native to the Celonis platform: SQL, PQL and Python</li><br><li>Experience with SAP, Oracle or other ERP systems and their respective Accounts Payable modules</li><br><li>Project management experience and excellent planning and organizational skills</li><br><li>Creativity in problem solving, solution-oriented, self-motivated, able to work independently and collaborate well within and outside the team</li><br><li>Excellent verbal and written communication skills and the willingness to work very closely with customers and cross-functional stakeholders</li><br><li>Very good knowledge of spoken and written English (German is a plus)</li><br></ul><br><p>&nbsp;</p><br><p><strong>What Celonis can offer you:</strong></p><br><ul><br><li>The unique opportunity to work within a new category of technology</li><br><li>Investment in your personal growth and skill development (ownership of projects, exposure to senior management, mentorship and buddy programs, guided learning paths, internal mobility opportunities)</li><br><li>Mental well-being support (mindfulness tools such as Headspace, flexible working hours, virtual events, and more)</li><br><li>A global and growing team of Celonauts from diverse backgrounds to learn from and work with</li><br><li>An open-minded culture with innovative, autonomous teams</li><br><li>Business Resource Groups to help you feel connected, valued and seen (Black@Celonis, Women@Celonis, Parents@Celonis, Pride@Celonis, Resilience@Celonis, and more)</li><br><li>A clear set of <a href="https://www.celonis.com/company/values/">company values</a> that guide everything we do: Live for Customer Value, The Best Team Wins, We Own It, and Earth Is Our Future</li><br></ul></div><div><p><strong>What Celonis Can Offer You:</strong></p><br><ul class="p-rich_text_list p-rich_text_list__bullet p-rich_text_list--nested"><br><li><strong>Pioneer Innovation:</strong>&nbsp;Work with the leading, award-winning process mining technology, shaping the future of business.</li><br><li><strong>Accelerate Your Growth:</strong>&nbsp;Benefit from clear career paths, internal mobility, a dedicated learning program, and mentorship opportunities.</li><br><li><strong>Receive Exceptional Benefits:</strong>&nbsp;Including generous PTO, hybrid working options, company equity (RSUs), comprehensive benefits, extensive parental leave, dedicated volunteer days, and&nbsp;<a class="c-link" href="https://careers.celonis.com/life-at-celonis/benefits">much more</a>.</li><br><li><strong>Prioritize Your Well-being:</strong>&nbsp;Access to resources such as gym subsidies, counseling, and well-being programs.</li><br><li><strong>Connect and Belong:</strong>&nbsp;Find community and support through dedicated inclusion and belonging programs.</li><br><li><strong>Make Meaningful Impact:</strong>&nbsp;Be part of a company driven by strong&nbsp;<a class="c-link" href="https://careers.celonis.com/life-at-celonis/values">values</a>&nbsp;that guide everything we do: Live for Customer Value, The Best Team Wins, We Own It, and Earth Is Our Future.</li><br><li><strong>Collaborate Globally:</strong>&nbsp;Join a dynamic, international team of talented individuals.</li><br><li><strong>Empowered Environment:</strong>&nbsp;Contribute your ideas in an open culture with autonomous teams.</li><br></ul><br><p><strong>About Us:</strong></p><br><p>Celonis makes processes work for people, companies and the planet. The Celonis Process Intelligence Platform uses industry-leading process mining and AI technology and augments it with business context to give customers a living digital twin of their business operation. It’s system-agnostic and without bias, and provides everyone with a common language for understanding and improving businesses. Celonis enables its customers to continuously realize significant value across the top, bottom, and green line. Celonis is headquartered in Munich, Germany, and New York City, USA, with more than 20 offices worldwide.</p><br><p>Get familiar with the Celonis Process Intelligence Platform by watching this <a href="https://academy.celonis.com/learn/video/discover-the-ems">video</a>.<strong><br></strong></p><br><p><strong>Celonis Inclusion Statement:</strong></p><br><p>At Celonis, we believe our people make us who we are and that “The Best Team Wins”. We know that the best teams are made up of people who bring different perspectives to the table. And when everyone feels included, able to speak up and knows their voice is heard - that's when creativity and innovation happen.<strong><br></strong></p><br><p><strong>Your Privacy:</strong></p><br><p>Any information you submit to Celonis as part of your application will be processed in accordance with Celonis’ <a href="https://www.celonis.com/careers/candidate-notices">Accessibility and Candidate Notices</a></p><br><p>By submitting this application, you confirm that you agree to the storing and processing of your personal data by Celonis as described in our <a href="https://www.celonis.com/careers/privacy-notice/">Privacy Notice for the Application and Hiring Process</a>.</p><br><p>Please be aware of common job offer scams, impersonators and frauds. Learn more <a href="https://www.celonis.com/careers/fraud-alert/">here</a>.</p></div></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/celonis-application-product-manager-accounts-payable">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/celonis-application-product-manager-accounts-payable</a></p>
</description>

    <item>
      <title>Instructure: Principal Product Specialist</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> US-Remote
</p>

<p>At Instructure, we believe in the power of people to grow and succeed throughout their lives. Our goal is to amplify that power by creating intuitive products that simplify learning and personal development, facilitate meaningful relationships, and inspire people to go further in their education and careers. We do this by giving smart, creative, passionate people  opportunities to create awesome.&nbsp;</p><p><br></p><p>And that's where you come in:</p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p>As a Principal Product Specialist within the Center of Excellence at Instructure, you will play a vital role in supporting our account and customer-facing teams throughout the entire customer lifecycle for your assigned category. You will act as a resource for sales, product, and customer success, ensuring a seamless experience for our clients. This role requires an in-depth understanding of our products and the product category you'll be representing. Your responsibilities will involve leveraging insights from various sources including product, marketing, product marketing, and customer needs to bolster sales strategies and optimize customer activation.</p>\n<p></p><p><br></p><b>What you will do:</b><ul><li>Go-to-Market Support: You will be a point of contact for sales and customer success teams for your assigned product category.</li><li>Customer Engagement: Support the building and maintaining of strong relationships with customers, serving as a point of contact for the CX organization, supporting their needs, inquiries, and providing expert guidance on the solutions offered by Instructure.</li><li>Sales Support: Collaborate closely with the sales team, providing product knowledge, sales materials, and strategic insights to help drive the sales process and meet revenue targets both at the market level and at times regional and account levels</li><li>Product Expertise: Develop a deep understanding of the products and services within your assigned category, keeping up-to-date with the latest updates, features, and industry trends.</li><li>Solution Development: Work alongside the product and product marketing teams to identify customer needs and develop tailored solutions that address these requirements.</li><li>Strategic Planning: Contribute and build sales strategies, offering insights and recommendations based on customer feedback and market trends.</li><li>Cross-functional Collaboration: Collaborate with various internal teams, including product development, marketing, and customer support, to align strategies and ensure a unified customer experience.</li></ul><p><br></p><b>What you will need to know/have:</b><ul><li>Proven experience in sales, product marketing, account management, or a customer success-related role.</li><li>Deep understanding of the product types in your category with strong content knowledge of and practical experience in assessment design, testing, and measurement in K-12, higher education, or the professional learning settings.&nbsp;</li><li>Ability to translate product information into a compelling value proposition for customers.</li><li>Strong problem-solving skills and a proactive approach to customer needs.</li></ul><p><br></p><b>It would be a bonus if you had:</b><ul><li>Familiarity or experience with Instructure products, including those in your category.</li><li>Experience in global markets</li></ul><p><br></p><b>Get in on all the awesome at Instructure!</b><ul><li>We offer competitive, meaningful benefits in every country where we operate. While they vary by location, here's a general idea of what you can expect:</li><li>Competitive compensation and participation in Instructure’s equity program</li><li>Flexible schedules and a remote-friendly culture, with hybrid or onsite work available in some regions for specific jobs.&nbsp;</li><li>Generous paid time off, including global holidays and our annual “Dim the Lights” company-wide shutdown from December 26 to December 31</li><li>Comprehensive wellness programs and mental health support</li><li>Annual learning and development stipends to support your growth</li><li>The technology and tools you need to do your best work—typically a Mac, with PC options available in some locations</li><li>Motivosity employee recognition program</li><li>A culture rooted in inclusivity, support, and meaningful connection</li></ul><p><br></p><p></p>\n<div>$160,000 - $180,000 a year</div><small><div>This range reflects our target hiring range, with flexibility based on experience, skills, and market factors.</div></small>\n<p>We’ve always believed in hiring the most awesome people and treating them right. We know that the more diverse we are, the more diverse our ideas will be — and when we openly welcome those ideas, our environment is better and our business is stronger.</p><p><br></p><p>At Instructure we participate in E-Verify and yes, in case you didn't catch it from the above, we are an Equal Opportunity Employer.</p><p><br></p><p>All Instructure employees are required to successfully pass a background check upon being hired.</p><p><br></p>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/instructure-principal-product-specialist">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/instructure-principal-product-specialist</a></p>
</description>

      <title>Workwize: Product Manager b2b SaaS</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Amsterdam
</p>

<div class="job__description body"><div><div class="sc-1fwbcuw-0 lkyDIV"><br><div><br><div><br><div><br><p><strong><span class="TextRun SCXW109631449 BCX4" lang="EN-US"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW109631449 BCX4">Are you a technically proficient Product Manager with a passion for </span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW109631449 BCX4">optimizing</span> <span class="NormalTextRun SpellingErrorV2Themed SCXW109631449 BCX4">operations</span><span class="NormalTextRun SpellingErrorV2Themed SCXW109631449 BCX4">operations</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW109631449 BCX4"> and driving scalable solutions? </span></span><span class="LineBreakBlob BlobObject DragDrop SCXW109631449 BCX4"><span class="SCXW109631449 BCX4">&nbsp;</span><br class="SCXW109631449 BCX4"></span></strong><span class="TextRun SCXW109631449 BCX4" lang="EN-US"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW109631449 BCX4">As a Product Manager at </span><span class="NormalTextRun SpellingErrorV2Themed SCXW109631449 BCX4">Workwize</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW109631449 BCX4">, you will be building out software products in our B2B SaaS product with our software and operations team.</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW109631449 BCX4"> If you excel at setting a clear product vision,</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW109631449 BCX4"> working with </span><span class="NormalTextRun ContextualSpellingAndGrammarErrorV2Themed SCXW109631449 BCX4">Engineers,</span> <span class="NormalTextRun ContextualSpellingAndGrammarErrorV2Themed SCXW109631449 BCX4"> shipping</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW109631449 BCX4"> products fast, </span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW109631449 BCX4">managing intricate technical features</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW109631449 BCX4">, </span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW109631449 BCX4">this role is made for you!</span></span></p><br><br><strong>At Workwize, we’re revolutionizing how businesses support their global teams.</strong><br>The rise of a global workforce has enabled companies to access a broader talent pool but has also brought logistical challenges, such as local vendor availability, timely laptop delivery, equipment management, and local retrieval and storage.<span class="Apple-converted-space">&nbsp;</span><br>Workwize’s SaaS platform, integrated with suppliers and warehouses worldwide, simplifies and automates the deployment, management, and retrieval of IT hardware for distributed teams. Currently, Workwize facilitates fast, local deliveries in 100+ countries, supporting the IT lifecycle for over 25,000 users and managing 100,000+ devices globally.</div><br><div>&nbsp;</div><br></div><br></div><br></div><br><div class="sc-1fwbcuw-0 lkyDIV"><br><div><br><p><strong><span><br>About the role:</span></strong><span>&nbsp;</span></p><br><p><span>As the Product Manager at Workwize, </span><span>with a strong technical background to join our product team at Workwize. In this role, you will be responsible for setting out a product vision for one of our Workwize products, and creating an incredible customer experience around it. You will work closely with Engineers and Operations team members, in a cross-functional team to set and execute a product vision that increases revenue for one of our products and creates a good experience. This role is crucial in managing and optimizing processes such as equipment onboarding, repair, retrieval, reselling, decommissioning, and storage for IT devices globally.</span>&nbsp;<br>&nbsp;<br>&nbsp;<br><strong><span>Key Responsibilities &amp; Competencies:</span></strong><span>&nbsp;</span></p><br><p><span>To succeed in this role, you’ll focus on excelling in the following key areas:</span><span>&nbsp;<br><br></span></p><br><ol><br><li><strong><span>Product Vision &amp; Strategy:</span></strong><span>&nbsp;</span></li><br></ol><br><ul><br><li><span>Define and execute a product vision focused on scalability, operational excellence, and efficiency.</span><span>&nbsp;</span></li><br></ul><br><ul><br><li><span>Prioritize and deliver features that enhance automation and streamline global operations.</span><span>&nbsp;</span></li><br></ul><br><p><span>&nbsp;</span></p><br><ol><br><li><strong><span>Collaboration &amp; Stakeholder Management:</span></strong><span>&nbsp;</span></li><br></ol><br><ul><br><li><span>Partner with Operations team members and cross-functional teams to align on solutions that improve both customer experience and operational efficiency.</span><span>&nbsp;</span></li><br></ul><br><ul><br><li><span>Regularly update stakeholders, including leadership, on product plans, progress, and outcomes.</span><span>&nbsp;</span></li><br></ul><br><p><span>&nbsp;</span></p><br><ol><br><li><strong><span>Data-Driven Decision Making:</span></strong><span>&nbsp;</span></li><br></ol><br><ul><br><li><span>Use data and KPIs to identify areas for improvement, guide feature prioritization, and track product performance.</span><span>&nbsp;</span></li><br></ul><br><p><span>&nbsp;</span></p><br><ol><br><li><strong><span>Speed &amp; Impact: Shipping High Impact Features Fast</span></strong><span>&nbsp;</span></li><br></ol><br><ul><br><li><span>You have a bias for action </span><span>&nbsp;</span></li><br></ul><br><ul><br><li><span>You look at making the right trade-offs between impact and effort to get to a high impact launch</span><span>&nbsp;</span></li><br></ul><br><p><span>&nbsp;</span></p><br><ol><br><li><strong><span>Customer Feedback Integration:</span></strong><span>&nbsp;</span></li><br></ol><br><ul><br><li><span>Continuously gather and incorporate feedback from internal teams and clients to ensure product updates meet operational goals and customer needs.</span><span>&nbsp;</span></li><br></ul><br><p><span>&nbsp;</span></p><br><p><span>&nbsp;</span></p><br><p><span>&nbsp;</span>&nbsp;</p><br><p><strong><span>Skills &amp; Qualifications:</span></strong><span>&nbsp;</span></p><br><p><span>&nbsp;</span></p><br><ul><br><li><span>Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Business, or Operations, with a proven deep understanding of Software Engineering.</span><span>&nbsp;</span></li><br></ul><br><ul><br><li><span><span>5+ years of working experience in the same or similar role</span></span><span>&nbsp;</span></li><br></ul><br><ul><br><li><strong><span><span>Experience in Product Management:</span></span></strong><span><span> Minimum of 3-5 years in a product management role within SaaS, preferably in operations or logistics-intensive environments. B2B SaaS experience is a plus.</span></span><span>&nbsp;</span></li><br><li><strong><span><span>Technical Proficiency:</span></span></strong><span><span> Ability to collaborate with development teams to scope technical solutions and oversee implementation.</span></span><span>&nbsp;<br><br></span></li><br><li><strong><span>Data Analytics &amp; Reporting:</span></strong><span> Strong understanding of data-driven decision-making and experience with analytics tools to track KPIs and identify operational inefficiencies.<br></span><span>&nbsp;</span></li><br><li><strong><span>Project Management Skills:</span></strong><span> Ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously, set priorities, and meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment.<br></span><span>&nbsp;</span></li><br><li><strong><span>Stakeholder Management &amp; Communication:</span></strong><span> Strong leadership skills with the ability to influence cross-functional teams and communicate effectively with both technical and non-technical stakeholders.</span>&nbsp;<br><span>&nbsp;</span></li><br></ul><br><p><span>&nbsp;</span>&nbsp;</p><br><p><strong><span>Our Team:</span></strong><span>&nbsp;</span></p><br><p><span>Join Workwize and be part of a team that’s reshaping the future of work. Our Operations team is key to ensuring that our platform remains efficient, scalable, and impactful. We value diversity, innovation, and the growth of our employees, offering a dynamic work environment where creativity and collaboration thrive. If you're ready to take on the challenge of improving global operations and making a lasting impact, we'd love to hear from you.</span><span>&nbsp;<br><br><br></span></p><br></div><br><div><br><p><strong>Workwize</strong><span class="Apple-converted-space">&nbsp;</span><strong>Offers</strong>:<span class="Apple-converted-space">&nbsp;</span></p><br></div><br><div><br><ul><br><li>Flexibility to work in a hybrid environment, balancing office and home settings.<span class="Apple-converted-space">&nbsp;</span></li><br></ul><br></div><br><div><br><ul><br><li>The best working setup, with all necessary tools and equipment provided.<span class="Apple-converted-space">&nbsp;</span></li><br></ul><br></div><br><div><br><ul><br><li>A vibrant, entrepreneurial work environment that encourages innovation and growth.<span class="Apple-converted-space">&nbsp;</span></li><br></ul><br></div><br><div><br><ul><br><li>Weekly team lunches and monthly surprise events to build team spirit and have fun along the way.<span class="Apple-converted-space">&nbsp;</span></li><br></ul><br></div><br></div><br><p>&nbsp;</p></div></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/workwize-product-manager-b2b-saas">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/workwize-product-manager-b2b-saas</a></p>

      <title>Elevated Leads Limited: Chrome Extension Developer — iGaming Product (New Build)</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state>Mosta</state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Contract</type>
      <description><img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/4710/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" />

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Malta
    <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://elevated.ltd/">https://elevated.ltd/</a>
</p>

<h1>Chrome Extension Developer — iGaming Product (New Build)</h1>
<h2>The Company</h2>
<p>Elevated Leads Limited operates established brands in the iGaming affiliate space, including CryptoCasinos.com and CryptoBetting.com. We have a team of 20 people and strong relationships with major operators and game developers across the industry.</p>
<p><strong>&nbsp;</strong></p>
<p>We're building a new product — a Chrome extension for the online casino space. The product is first-of-its-kind and currently in the planning stage. Full product details will be shared with shortlisted candidates after signing a standard NDA.</p>
<p><strong>&nbsp;</strong></p>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
<hr>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
<h2>The Role</h2>
<p>We're looking for a mid-to-senior developer to own this product technically from day one. This isn't task-by-task freelance work — you'll make architectural decisions, flag problems early, and ship something real alongside a small, experienced team.</p>
<p><strong>&nbsp;</strong></p>
<p>Contract role, 3-6 months initially, with strong potential to become long-term depending on product traction and fit.</p>
<p><strong>&nbsp;</strong></p>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
<hr>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
<h2>What We Need</h2>
<h3>Must-Have</h3>
<ul>
<li>
<p>Chrome Extension development with Manifest V3</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>JavaScript or TypeScript — strong, not just functional</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>DOM manipulation and content scripts — the extension interacts with third-party websites with varying front-end architectures</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Experience shipping a product — you've taken something from zero to live users, not just contributed to an existing codebase</p>
</li>
</ul>
<h3>Strong Preferences</h3>
<ul>
<li>
<p>Experience with data visualization (Chart.js, D3, Recharts, or similar)</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Backend capability (Node.js, Python, or similar — needed for later phases)</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Has published an extension on the Chrome Web Store before</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Familiarity with the iGaming industry is a plus but not required</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>&nbsp;</strong></p>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
<hr>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
<h2>How We Work</h2>
<ul>
<li>
<p>Communication: Async-first (Discord or similar), calls when needed</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Updates: Brief daily written updates on progress and blockers</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Code: Private GitHub repo, PR-based workflow</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Location: Fully remote — timezone flexibility, but some overlap with CET preferred</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Decision-making: You own technical decisions. We own product direction. Trade-offs are discussed together.</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>&nbsp;</strong></p>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
<hr>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
<h2>Compensation</h2>
<ul>
<li>
<p>Monthly contract: Salary is up for discussion depending on experience and location</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Performance bonus tied to KPI milestones</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Potential equity or revenue share for the right person who wants to grow with the product</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Budget for tools and services as needed</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>&nbsp;</strong></p>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
<hr>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
<h2>To Apply</h2>
<p>Send the following to sam@elevated.ltd:</p>
<p><strong>&nbsp;</strong></p>
<ol>
<li>
<p>A Chrome extension you've built — published or private, we just want to see your work</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>A brief note on your experience with content scripts that interact with third-party sites (injecting UI, reading page data, handling iframes)</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Your availability and rate expectations</p>
</li>
</ol>
<p><strong>&nbsp;</strong></p>
<p>No generic CVs. No cover letter templates. We'll respond to every serious application within a few days.</p>
<p><strong>&nbsp;</strong></p>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
<hr>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
<p><strong>&nbsp;</strong></p>
<p>Elevated Leads Limited — Malta</p>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/elevated-leads-limited-chrome-extension-developer-igaming-product-new-build">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/elevated-leads-limited-chrome-extension-developer-igaming-product-new-build</a></p>
</description>

      <title>8am: Product Designer | Growth</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Remote - US
</p>

<div class=""><br><div class="content-intro"><p><strong>It's a new day with a new opportunity at 8am!&nbsp;</strong></p></div><br><p><strong>About the role:</strong></p><br><p>As a Product Designer on the Growth team at 8am, you will help shape how new and existing customers discover value, adopt core capabilities, and expand their use of our platform. This role focuses on designing experiences that directly support customer acquisition, onboarding, engagement, retention, and revenue growth within a complex B2B fintech product.</p><br><p>You will take ownership of growth-focused initiatives such as first-time use, onboarding flows, feature discovery, in-product education, and upsell experiences. Working in close partnership with Product Managers, Engineers, and a Senior Product Designer, you will help translate growth strategy into thoughtful, user-centered solutions that balance business impact with clarity and usability.</p><br><p>This role is well suited for a designer who is comfortable operating in ambiguity, enjoys connecting user needs to business outcomes, and has experience designing for growth within complex, professional products.</p><br><p><strong>About us:</strong></p><br><p>At 8am, our vision is to power a world where professionals thrive. We start every day on a mission to empower professionals with the most trusted, innovative technology to deliver world-class outcomes for their clients and exceptional financial results for their business. They count on our purpose-built solutions to simplify operations, ensure compliance, and fuel profitable growth, so they can focus on their clients and do more of the work that matters.</p><br><p>Founded in 2005, 8am™ (formerly AffiniPay) is the professional business platform built to help legal, accounting, and other client-focused professionals run stronger, more profitable businesses. Today, more than 250,000 professionals across the U.S. trust 8am to help them work smarter, serve clients better, and unlock their full potential. We have been recognized as one of Inc 5000’s fastest growing companies in the U.S. for 13 years in a row, and as a result, our teams continue to grow as well!</p><br><p><strong>What you'll do:</strong></p><br><p><strong>Design for Growth and Customer Outcomes</strong></p><br><ul><br><ul><br><li>Design and iterate on experiences that support acquisition, activation, onboarding, engagement, retention, and expansion.</li><br><li>Own growth-related problem spaces such as first-time user experiences, feature discovery, in-product education, training modules, and upsell flows.</li><br><li>Translate growth hypotheses and product strategy into user-centered solutions that are measurable and impactful.</li><br><li>Partner with Product and Growth stakeholders to define success metrics and evaluate the effectiveness of shipped work.</li><br></ul><br></ul><br><p><strong>Partner Deeply with Product and Engineering</strong></p><br><ul><br><ul><br><li>Work closely with Product Managers to frame problems, explore solutions, and align design decisions with growth and business goals.</li><br><li>Collaborate with Engineers throughout the design and development process, providing clear intent, flows, and interaction details to support high-quality implementation.</li><br><li>Partner with a Senior Product Designer to align on approach, receive feedback, and elevate craft while maintaining ownership of your work.</li><br><li>Contribute meaningfully to cross-functional discussions, tradeoffs, and prioritization.</li><br></ul><br></ul><br><p><strong>Understand and Advocate for Professional Users</strong></p><br><ul><br><ul><br><li>Develop a strong understanding of professional users, their motivations, and their workflows within a B2B or B2B2C context.</li><br><li>Use research inputs, customer feedback, and product data to inform design decisions.</li><br><li>Design experiences that are intuitive, trustworthy, and respectful of users’ time in high-stakes, workflow-driven environments.</li><br></ul><br></ul><br><p><strong>Execute with Quality and Ownership</strong></p><br><ul><br><li><br><ul><br><li>Produce high-quality design deliverables across the lifecycle, including user flows, wireframes, prototypes, and polished UI.</li><br><li>Take ownership of your problem areas, proactively identifying opportunities to improve user experience and growth outcomes.</li><br><li>Communicate design rationale and tradeoffs clearly to cross-functional partners.&nbsp;</li><br></ul><br></li><br></ul><br><p><strong>Preferred Qualifications:</strong></p><br><ul><br><li>Experience designing in partnership with Growth, Marketing, or Revenue teams.</li><br><li>Familiarity with experimentation frameworks (A/B testing, funnel analysis, cohort analysis).</li><br><li>Experience designing in-product education, training, or enablement experiences.</li><br><li>Exposure to AI-assisted, automated, or intelligent workflows.</li><br><li>Experience working in regulated or high-trust environments (fintech, legal, healthcare).</li><br></ul><br><p><strong>About you:</strong></p><br><ul><br><li>4–7 years of product design experience, with a strong portfolio demonstrating product thinking, ownership, and measurable impact.</li><br><li>Experience designing for B2B or B2B2C products, ideally within SaaS, fintech, or other complex platforms.</li><br><li>Demonstrated experience designing for growth strategies such as onboarding, activation, retention, expansion, or monetization.</li><br><li>Comfort working in ambiguous problem spaces and iterating based on feedback, data, and constraints.</li><br><li>Strong interaction and visual design skills, with attention to usability and clarity.</li><br><li>High proficiency in Figma.</li><br><li>Clear and effective communicator who collaborates well with Product Managers and Engineers.</li><br><li>A proactive, ownership-oriented mindset with a desire to learn and impro</li><br><li><span>Demonstrated experience leveraging AI tools and technologies to improve workflows, enhance decision-making, or drive innovation.</span></li><br></ul><br><p><strong><strong>Additional Information</strong><br></strong>The annual salary range for this position is $120,000 to $140,000. The salary range for performing this role outside of the US / Austin / California may differ.&nbsp; 8am is committed to offering competitive, fair and commensurate compensation and has provided an estimated pay range for this role. Actual compensation may vary based on job-related knowledge, skills, experience and education.<strong><br><br></strong><strong>Why 8am:&nbsp;</strong></p><br><p>At 8am, our culture is shaped by the people who bring it to life every day. Together, we build a company rooted in continuous learning, genuine community, holistic wellness, and meaningful engagement—values that empower us as individuals and unite us as a team. Our culture is grounded in our core values:<em> Work Smart, Win Fast</em>; <em>Outshine Ordinary</em>, and <em>We Find a Way</em>. These values drive how we serve our customers and work with each other in a collaborative, inspiring, and empowering environment, every day.</p><br><p><strong>Here’s how we support our 8Team:</strong></p><br><ul><br><li><strong>Health Insurance Coverage: </strong>We offer our 8Team a variety of medical, dental, and vision plans, designed to fit your needs, including a 100% company-paid HDHP plan for employees.</li><br><li><strong>Financial perks: </strong>We offer a competitive compensation and benefits package including annual bonuses, equity options and 401(k) or RRSP if in Canada, with a company match for all team members.</li><br><li><strong>Time for what matters:</strong> Flexible Time Off, paid holidays, and a parental leave program for our new parents.</li><br><li><strong>Wellness:</strong> Wellness stipends, mental health support, and one-on-one nutrition coaching.</li><br><li><strong>Learning and Development:</strong> Continuous learning through <a href="http://8am.edu">8am.edu</a>, leadership programs, professional development funds, and individually focused talent development.</li><br><li><strong>Giving back to the communities around us:</strong> Participate in our charitable matching gift program, paid time off for volunteer service, and company-sponsored volunteer events (both local and virtually).</li><br><li><strong>Engagement:</strong> Virtual and in-person team-building events, quarterly award recognition through our Rise &amp; Shine Award of Excellence Program, and our peer-to-peer appreciation platform.</li><br></ul><br><p>At 8am, we don’t just offer benefits - we create an environment where people can thrive, grow, and make a real impact every day.</p><br><p><strong>Diversity, equity &amp; inclusion at 8am:</strong></p><br><p>At 8am, we recognize that innovation occurs with a strong team of people who are diverse in background, personality, talent and ideas. Experience comes in many forms and ensuring a diverse and inclusive workplace where we continue to learn from each other is an integral part of our culture. We are committed to creating a welcoming and transparent environment for all that embraces those differences through education, equal access to opportunities and information, inclusionary programs, and community outreach.&nbsp;</p><br><p><strong>Security advisory:</strong></p><br><p>Our hiring teams at 8am are dedicated to recruiting top talent that share our passion for serving the professional services industry through innovative financial technology.&nbsp; As such, our Talent Acquisition Team only follows legitimate hiring practices.&nbsp; We will always communicate with our candidates using emails with the 8am domain and will never ask for sensitive/personal data during the application process.&nbsp; All interviews take place over phone call, Zoom/Google Meet or in person.&nbsp; All offers are communicated verbally by our Talent Acquisition Specialists with a written offer letter as a follow up.&nbsp;</p><br><p>&nbsp;</p><br></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/8am-product-designer-growth">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/8am-product-designer-growth</a></p>
</description>

      <title>Stripe: Staff Product Manager, Link Consumer Product</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> SF, SEA, NY, Remote-US
</p>

<h2>Who we are</h2><br><h3>About Stripe</h3><br><p><span>Stripe is a financial infrastructure platform for businesses. Millions of companies—from the world’s largest enterprises to the most ambitious startups—use Stripe to accept payments, grow their revenue, and accelerate new business opportunities. Our mission is to increase the GDP of the internet, and we have a staggering amount of work ahead. That means you have an unprecedented opportunity to put the global economy within everyone’s reach while doing the most important work of your career.</span></p><br><h3>About the Link team</h3><br><p>The way we buy is evolving: new payment methods, new purchase modalities, and new kinds of money.&nbsp;</p><br><p>In the very immediate future we’ll be purchasing with AI agents, and they’ll almost inevitably become fully headless operating on our behalf and spending our money. Stablecoins are on the cusp of becoming mainstream and unlocking huge new capabilities for consumers. And at the same time being able to securely and simply share your reputation and identity become essential as robots operate on our behalf and money moves instantly.</p><br><p>We are building Link for this future. Link is the wallet for the internet, for what’s next.</p><br><p>Link is already used by over 200m consumers worldwide and growing exceptionally rapidly.&nbsp;</p><br><h2>What you’ll do</h2><br><p>You will be responsible for building the Link App experience on web and native: building the wallet product consumers need to feel confident, excited and inspired by all the new ways payments and identity are changing online.&nbsp;</p><br><p>You will be a champion of our consumers’ experience and end-to-end owner of many core consumer features. You will be building new products and features to make Link a world-class consumer brand. This will include working with Engineering, Design, GTM and others to help define, build and scale new and existing products. You will be expected to help define our consumer strategy, working directly with Link leadership, and gathering insights from our consumers and data.</p><br><h3>Responsibilities</h3><br><ul><br><li>Deeply understand user needs by spending time with consumers as well as Engineering, GTM and Operations teams, and by observing patterns and trends across their feedback and the market.</li><br><li>Be the voice of the consumers both within Link and more broadly at Stripe.</li><br><li>Work closely with our customers, product teams, and cross functional partners to build a comprehensive and frictionless experience for Link consumers.</li><br><li>Help set an ambitious roadmap for product development and expansion of Link’s capabilities.</li><br><li>Discover new parts of our business and lead them from nascent stages to maturity.</li><br><li>Set the pace, prioritization and execution for the team.</li><br><li>Collaborate with stakeholders across the organization such as Engineering, Design, Data Science, Marketing, Sales, Account Management, and Operations.</li><br></ul><br><h2><strong>Who you are</strong></h2><br><p>You are a technical PM with a high degree of autonomy and drive. You feel tremendous ownership over the products you create. You are probably already exploring how AI can help you ship products faster and how it’ll change the role of product management (we certainly are); likely you’re already using AI tools to ship your own products even just as demos and prototypes (like us you probably have half a dozen side-projects that never quite got finished). You know that the only thing that really matters is getting impactful, well crafted products into the hands of users.&nbsp;</p><br><p>We’re looking for someone who meets the minimum requirements to be considered for the role. If you meet these requirements, you are encouraged to apply. The preferred qualifications are a bonus, not a requirement.</p><br><h3>Minimum requirements</h3><br><ul><br><li>Brings 8+ years of experience in a product or other technical role</li><br><li>Has experience working on world-class consumer products at scale. Has a high-level of taste, judgment and design empathy. Is able to use data and insights rigorously to analyze the performance of products.</li><br><li>Brings a desire for continuous product improvement and can optimize for shipping a portfolio of small, medium, and large releases.</li><br><li>Has managed high-stakes external partnerships, e.g. agreeing on milestones and executing on an integration into your product.&nbsp;</li><br><li>Has strong written and verbal communication skills with a talent for precise articulations of customer problems.</li><br><li>Takes an ownership mindset and works on whatever it takes to solve problems and delight consumers.</li><br><li>Can put themselves in the shoes of consumers and be a steward of crafting great experiences.</li><br><li>Can dig deep into the data, think from first principles, and deliver the right results. Can write and use SQL as needed.</li><br><li>Has the ability to thrive with a high level of autonomy and responsibility.</li><br></ul><br><h3><strong>Preferred qualifications</strong></h3><br><ul><br><li>Experience working on consumer financial products.</li><br><li>Conducting product market research and building buy-in for product ideas from internal stakeholders and leadership.</li><br><li>Experience building brand new products or working in a startup environment.</li><br><li>Experience working with GTM teams to bring a new product to market.</li><br><li>&nbsp;</li><br></ul>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/stripe-staff-product-manager-link-consumer-product">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/stripe-staff-product-manager-link-consumer-product</a></p>
</description>

    <item>
      <title>Grafana Labs: Staff Product Marketing Manager | Germany | Remote</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Germany (Remote)
</p>

<div class="job__description body"><div><p>Grafana Labs is a remote-first, open-source powerhouse. There are more than 20M users of Grafana, the open source visualization tool, around the globe, monitoring everything from beehives to climate change in the Alps. The instantly recognizable dashboards have been spotted everywhere from a NASA launch and Minecraft HQ to Wimbledon and the Tour de France. Grafana Labs also helps more than 3,000 companies -- including Bloomberg, JPMorgan Chase, and eBay -- manage their observability strategies with the Grafana LGTM Stack, which can be run fully managed with <a href="https://grafana.com/products/cloud/">Grafana Cloud</a> or self-managed with the <a href="https://grafana.com/products/enterprise/">Grafana Enterprise Stack</a>, both featuring scalable metrics (<a href="https://grafana.com/oss/mimir/">Grafana Mimir</a>), logs (<a href="https://grafana.com/oss/loki/">Grafana Loki</a>), and traces (<a href="https://grafana.com/oss/tempo/">Grafana Tempo</a>).</p><br><p>We’re scaling fast and staying true to what makes us different: an open-source legacy, a global collaborative culture, and a passion for meaningful work. Our team thrives in an innovation-driven environment where transparency, autonomy, and trust fuel everything we do.</p><br><p>You may not meet every requirement, and that’s okay. If this role excites you, we’d love you to raise your hand for what could be a truly career-defining opportunity.</p></div><div><p><strong>The Opportunity:</strong></p><br><p>We are looking for an experienced product marketer to join as a key member of the Grafana Labs Product Marketing team. In this role, you will be responsible for creating Go-To-Market programs that effectively position the value of Grafana Labs and its products to solve the needs of target customers. You will show how our products and solutions — as well as our open source strategy — help prospects and customers achieve their goals.&nbsp;</p><br><p>As a Staff Product Marketing Manager, you will be in charge of the messaging and positioning across key personas and product areas. You’ll work closely with both product management and enablement to help buyers buy (and sellers sell) our value.</p><br><p>Product Marketing lives within the Product org rather than the Marketing org at Grafana Labs, and we are thinking differently about product marketing. Rather than purely executing launches or campaigns, we want PMMs to teach Product Managers and Engineers in our org how to think about growth and demand, and to codify product marketing knowledge in tools and processes that anyone in the organization can use.</p><br><p>Grafana Labs is a fast-paced and growing organization. As such, this role requires both strategic and planning skills as well as hands-on tactical execution (blogs, webinar outlines, video scripts, etc).</p><br><p><strong>What You'll Be Doing:</strong></p><br><ul><br><li>Actively partner with and teach Product Managers to define product value, messaging, and go-to-market strategy, from competitive positioning to sales enablement collateral.</li><br><li>Partner with product management, engineering and various go-to-market functions to create materials that help customers evaluate and adopt our products: reference architectures, implementation guides, detailed product information.</li><br><li>Own and manage the launch of new products/features relevant to target buyers</li><br><li>Conduct internal and customer research to understand pain points, competition and opportunities</li><br><li>Teach go-to-market and sales teams how to gain value from our products: clearly define the capabilities of our products and the value they provide, deliver training and enablement, ensure customer facing teams are able to effectively engage with customers, partners, and prospects.</li><br><li>Own customer lifecycle campaigns (competitive positioning, retention, upsell/cross-sell) to strategically shape marketing programs and drive growth across the entire customer journey.</li><br></ul><br><p><strong>What Makes You a Great Fit:</strong></p><br><ul><br><li>6+ years of relevant experience (product marketing, solutions marketing, product management)</li><br><li>Experience with marketing and selling to a technical audience</li><br><li>A passion for open source, cloud native, and infrastructure technologies&nbsp;</li><br><li>Proven ability to take on complex projects and efficiently drive them from start to finish</li><br><li>Ability to clearly articulate the value of technical products to customers and sellers alike</li><br><li>Experience leading product or feature launches autonomously as well as part of a team</li><br><li>Comfort working with a variety of internal and external stakeholders in complicated processes</li><br><li>Strong product and technical curiosity that translate to clear packaging, positioning, and messaging</li><br><li>Demonstrated quantitative analytical skills for analyzing campaign performance, evaluating lifecycle metrics, and making data-driven recommendations.</li><br><li>Exceptional writing and communication skills</li><br><li>A high “say-do” ratio in executing and delivering impact&nbsp;</li><br></ul><br><p><strong>What you’ll bring to the role</strong></p><br><p>You’ll bring a passion for quality, pride in the strategic impact of your work, and the ability to thrive in a fast-paced environment.</p><br><p><strong>Compensation &amp; Rewards:</strong></p><br><p>In Germany, the Base compensation range for this role is <span>109,709</span> EUR - <span>131,651</span> EUR. Actual compensation may vary based on level, experience, and skillset as assessed throughout the interview process. All of our roles include Restricted Stock Units (RSUs), giving every team member ownership in Grafana Labs' success. We believe in shared outcomes—RSUs help us stay aligned and invested as we scale globally.</p><br><p><span>&nbsp;</span></p></div><div><div><br><p><em>*Compensation ranges are country specific.
