    <item>
      <title>Grafana Labs: Staff Product Marketing Manager | Sweden | Remote</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Sweden (Remote)
</p>

<div class="job__description body"><div><p>Grafana Labs is a remote-first, open-source powerhouse. There are more than 20M users of Grafana, the open source visualization tool, around the globe, monitoring everything from beehives to climate change in the Alps. The instantly recognizable dashboards have been spotted everywhere from a NASA launch and Minecraft HQ to Wimbledon and the Tour de France. Grafana Labs also helps more than 3,000 companies -- including Bloomberg, JPMorgan Chase, and eBay -- manage their observability strategies with the Grafana LGTM Stack, which can be run fully managed with <a href="https://grafana.com/products/cloud/">Grafana Cloud</a> or self-managed with the <a href="https://grafana.com/products/enterprise/">Grafana Enterprise Stack</a>, both featuring scalable metrics (<a href="https://grafana.com/oss/mimir/">Grafana Mimir</a>), logs (<a href="https://grafana.com/oss/loki/">Grafana Loki</a>), and traces (<a href="https://grafana.com/oss/tempo/">Grafana Tempo</a>).</p><br><p>We’re scaling fast and staying true to what makes us different: an open-source legacy, a global collaborative culture, and a passion for meaningful work. Our team thrives in an innovation-driven environment where transparency, autonomy, and trust fuel everything we do.</p><br><p>You may not meet every requirement, and that’s okay. If this role excites you, we’d love you to raise your hand for what could be a truly career-defining opportunity.</p></div><div><p></p><br><p><strong>The Opportunity:</strong></p><br><p>We are looking for an experienced product marketer to join as a key member of the Grafana Labs Product Marketing team. In this role, you will be responsible for creating Go-To-Market programs that effectively position the value of Grafana Labs and its products to solve the needs of target customers. You will show how our products and solutions — as well as our open source strategy — help prospects and customers achieve their goals.&nbsp;</p><br><p>As a Staff Product Marketing Manager, you will be in charge of the messaging and positioning across key personas and product areas. You’ll work closely with both product management and enablement to help buyers buy (and sellers sell) our value.</p><br><p>Product Marketing lives within the Product org rather than the Marketing org at Grafana Labs, and we are thinking differently about product marketing. Rather than purely executing launches or campaigns, we want PMMs to teach Product Managers and Engineers in our org how to think about growth and demand, and to codify product marketing knowledge in tools and processes that anyone in the organization can use.</p><br><p>Grafana Labs is a fast-paced and growing organization. As such, this role requires both strategic and planning skills as well as hands-on tactical execution (blogs, webinar outlines, video scripts, etc).</p><br><p><strong>What You'll Be Doing:</strong></p><br><ul><br><li>Actively partner with and teach Product Managers to define product value, messaging, and go-to-market strategy, from competitive positioning to sales enablement collateral.</li><br><li>Partner with product management, engineering and various go-to-market functions to create materials that help customers evaluate and adopt our products: reference architectures, implementation guides, detailed product information.</li><br><li>Own and manage the launch of new products/features relevant to target buyers</li><br><li>Conduct internal and customer research to understand pain points, competition and opportunities</li><br><li>Teach go-to-market and sales teams how to gain value from our products: clearly define the capabilities of our products and the value they provide, deliver training and enablement, ensure customer facing teams are able to effectively engage with customers, partners, and prospects.</li><br><li>Own customer lifecycle campaigns (competitive positioning, retention, upsell/cross-sell) to strategically shape marketing programs and drive growth across the entire customer journey.</li><br></ul><br><p><strong>What Makes You a Great Fit:</strong></p><br><ul><br><li>6+ years of relevant experience (product marketing, solutions marketing, product management)</li><br><li>Experience with marketing and selling to a technical audience</li><br><li>A passion for open source, cloud native, and infrastructure technologies&nbsp;</li><br><li>Proven ability to take on complex projects and efficiently drive them from start to finish</li><br><li>Ability to clearly articulate the value of technical products to customers and sellers alike</li><br><li>Experience leading product or feature launches autonomously as well as part of a team</li><br><li>Comfort working with a variety of internal and external stakeholders in complicated processes</li><br><li>Strong product and technical curiosity that translate to clear packaging, positioning, and messaging</li><br><li>Demonstrated quantitative analytical skills for analyzing campaign performance, evaluating lifecycle metrics, and making data-driven recommendations.</li><br><li>Exceptional writing and communication skills</li><br><li>A high “say-do” ratio in executing and delivering impact&nbsp;</li><br></ul><br><p><strong>What you’ll bring to the role</strong></p><br><p>You’ll bring a passion for quality, pride in the strategic impact of your work, and the ability to thrive in a fast-paced environment.</p><br><p><strong>Compensation &amp; Rewards:</strong></p><br><p>In Sweden, the Base compensation range for this role is <span>878,578</span> SEK - <span>1,054,294</span> SEK. Actual compensation may vary based on level, experience, and skillset as assessed throughout the interview process. All of our roles include Restricted Stock Units (RSUs), giving every team member ownership in Grafana Labs' success. We believe in shared outcomes—RSUs help us stay aligned and invested as we scale globally.</p><br><p><span>&nbsp;</span></p></div><div><div><br><p><em>*Compensation ranges are country specific. If you are applying for this role from a different location than listed above, your recruiter will discuss your specific market’s defined pay range &amp; benefits at the beginning of the process.</em></p><br><p><strong>Why You’ll Thrive at Grafana Labs:</strong></p><br><ul><br><li><strong>100% Remote, Global Culture -&nbsp;</strong>As a remote-only company, we bring together talent from around the world, united by a culture of collaboration and shared purpose.</li><br><li><strong>Scaling Organization</strong> – Tackle meaningful work in a high-growth, ever-evolving environment.</li><br><li><strong>Transparent Communication</strong> – Expect open decision-making and regular company-wide updates.</li><br><li><strong>Innovation-Driven</strong> – Autonomy and support to ship great work and try new things.</li><br><li><strong>Open Source Roots</strong> – Built on community-driven values that shape how we work.</li><br><li><strong>Empowered Teams</strong> – High trust, low ego culture that values outcomes over optics.</li><br><li><strong>Career Growth Pathways</strong> – Defined opportunities to grow and develop your career.</li><br><li><strong>Approachable Leadership</strong> – Transparent execs who are involved, visible, and human.</li><br><li><strong>Passionate People</strong> – Join a team of smart, supportive folks who care deeply about what they do.</li><br><li><strong>In-Person onboarding </strong>- We want you to thrive from day 1 with your fellow new ‘Grafanistas’ to learn all about what we do and how we do it.&nbsp;</li><br><li><strong>Balance is Key</strong> - We operate a global annual leave policy of 30 days per annum. 3 days of your annual leave entitlement are reserved for Grafana Shutdown Days to allow the team to really disconnect. <em>*We will comply with local legislation where applicable.</em></li><br></ul><br><p><strong>Equal Opportunity Employer:</strong> We will recruit, train, compensate and promote regardless of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, disability, age, veteran status, and all the other fascinating characteristics that make us different and unique. We believe that equality and diversity builds a strong organization and we’re working hard to make sure that’s the foundation of our organization as we grow.</p><br><p><em>Grafana Labs may utilize AI tools in its recruitment process to assist in matching information provided in CVs to job postings. The recruitment team will continue to review inbound CVs manually to identify alignment with current openings.</em></p><br><p>#LI-Remote</p><br></div><br><div><em>For information about how your personal data is used once you’ve applied to a job, check out our .&nbsp;</em></div><br><div>&nbsp;</div></div></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/grafana-labs-staff-product-marketing-manager-sweden-remote">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/grafana-labs-staff-product-marketing-manager-sweden-remote</a></p>

    <item>
      <title>Boulevard: Staff Product Designer, Platform</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Remote - USA
</p>

<div class="job__description body"><div><p><strong>Who is Boulevard? </strong></p><br><p>Boulevard provides the first and only client experience platform for appointment-based, self-care businesses. We empower our customers to give their clients more of the magical moments that matter most.</p><br><p>Before launching in 2016, our founders spent months interviewing salon managers and working behind front desks to understand their pain points so we could design a modern, user-friendly platform that meets the unique needs of their business. Our roots may be in hair salons, but we are built for the broader self-care industry, including many types of salons, spas, medspa, barbershops, and more. Our technology not only helps our customers survive but thrive. Take a look at&nbsp;<a class="css-tgpl01" href="https://www.joinblvd.com/">how we (and YOU) can make that happen</a>.&nbsp;</p><br><p>We have an insatiable curiosity and embrace experimentation. We believe that simple solutions require the most sophistication, and we design each and every detail to maximize potential, power, and impact. Do our values match? Read through <a class="css-tgpl01" href="https://www.joinblvd.com/about">our story and what we value the most</a>.</p><br><p>Our team values and celebrates our diverse backgrounds. Being open about who we are and what we do allows us to do the best work of our lives. We believe in equal opportunity for all, and you should too.</p></div><div><h3>Come Do the Best Work of Your Life at Boulevard</h3><br><p>Boulevard is the Client Experience Platform purpose-built for appointment-based, self-care businesses. As we continue to move upmarket, support increasingly complex franchise businesses, and expand internationally, our platform must scale with flexibility, reliability, and intelligence at its core.</p><br><p>That’s where the Platform Design team comes in.</p><br><p>The Platform pod builds the foundational systems that power everything at Boulevard — including identity, payments, permissions, APIs, data, and extensibility. As a Staff Product Designer, Platform, you’ll operate at a highly strategic level, shaping the core concepts, patterns, and frameworks that enable our product to scale across customer segments, geographies, and future use cases — while staying deeply usable and human.</p><br><p>This is a high-impact role for a designer who thrives in ambiguity, thinks in systems, and wants to influence not just features, but how an entire product platform evolves.</p><br><h3>What You’ll Do</h3><br><ul><br><li>Lead platform-level design strategy in close partnership with Product and Engineering, defining success metrics and ensuring work ladders up to long-term company goals.<br><br></li><br><li>Design foundational concepts, patterns, and frameworks that enable scalability, flexibility, and extensibility across Boulevard’s ecosystem.<br><br></li><br><li>Help evolve the platform to support:<br><br></li><br><ul><br><li>Upmarket customers with more complex workflows, permissions, and operational needs<br><br></li><br><li>Multi-location businesses, balancing centralized control with local flexibility<br><br></li><br><li>International expansion, including localization, regional requirements, and scalable global patterns<br><br></li><br></ul><br><li>Translate highly complex technical and system-level problems into clear, intuitive, and trustworthy user experiences.<br><br></li><br><li>Partner closely with engineers to guide implementation, ensuring design intent is preserved in production.<br><br></li><br><li>Act as a design leader and multiplier — raising the quality bar, influencing peers, and contributing to design culture, standards, and best practices.<br><br></li><br><li>Collaborate with other designers to evolve Boulevard’s design system to support platform complexity and future growth.<br><br></li><br><li>Explore and help define how Boulevard can be at the forefront of leveraging AI to enhance the BLVD experience — from internal tooling to customer-facing workflows — with a strong focus on trust, clarity, and real customer value.<br><br></li><br></ul><br><h3>What You’ll Need to Thrive</h3><br><ul><br><li>Strong systems thinking — comfort designing for scale, flexibility, and long-term evolution rather than one-off solutions.<br><br></li><br><li>Deep understanding of the full, iterative design process, including research, journey mapping, content design, wireframing, prototyping, testing, and high-fidelity execution.<br><br></li><br><li>Proven ability to partner closely with Product and Engineering, especially on technically complex initiatives.<br><br></li><br><li>Comfort operating in ambiguity and helping teams find clarity in fast-moving, evolving environments.<br><br></li><br><li>A strong point of view balanced with openness to feedback and iteration.<br><br></li><br><li>Ability to focus on outcomes over outputs, shipping thoughtfully while maintaining a high quality bar.<br><br></li><br><li>Proficiency with modern design and collaboration tools (e.g., Figma).</li><br></ul><br><h3>Why This Role Matters</h3><br><p>This role will help define how Boulevard scales — not just what we build next, but how we build for growth, complexity, and the future. The decisions you make will ripple across teams, products, and customers, shaping the foundation of the BLVD platform for years to come.</p><br><h3>How We’ll Take Care of You</h3><br><p>Your starting total cash compensation for this role is between $128,800 and $184,000, depending on skills, experience, and market factors. This range is subject to change, and there is always room for growth and advancement at Boulevard.</p></div><div><p>In addition to the wonderful people you’ll get to work with&nbsp;and challenging projects that’ll push you - Boulevard is here to make sure you’re always at the top of your game emotionally, mentally, and physically.&nbsp;</p><br><ul><br><li><br><p> We’ve got you covered with a 401(k) match plus dental, medical, vision, and life insurance.&nbsp;</p><br></li><br><li><br><p> Take a break whenever you need with our flexible vacation day policy.&nbsp;</p><br></li><br><li><br><p> Fully remote so you can choose where you want to work. You’ll receive a work from home stipend every month.&nbsp;</p><br></li><br><li><br><p> Family planning resources and specialized support programs.&nbsp;</p><br></li><br><li><br><p> Equity: get ahead on the ground floor and grow with Boulevard.&nbsp;</p><br></li><br><li><br><p> Boulevard Bucks Learning and Development program allows employees to explore businesses in the market we serve.</p><br></li><br></ul><br><p>&nbsp;</p><br><p> We recommend following <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/boulevard/">our official LinkedIn page</a> to stay up to date on all things Boulevard life!</p><br><p><em>Boulevard Labs, Inc. is an Equal Opportunity Employer committed to hiring a diverse workforce and sustaining an inclusive culture. All employment decisions at Boulevard Labs, Inc. are based on business needs, job requirements, and individual qualifications, without regard to race, color, religion, marital status, age, national origin, ancestry, physical or mental disability, medical condition, pregnancy, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, veteran status, or any other status protected under federal, state, or local law.</em></p></div></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/boulevard-staff-product-designer-platform">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/boulevard-staff-product-designer-platform</a></p>
</description>

    <item>
      <title>Grafana Labs: Staff Product Marketing Manager | United Kingdom | Remote</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> United Kingdom (Remote)
</p>

<div class="job__description body"><div><p>Grafana Labs is a remote-first, open-source powerhouse. There are more than 20M users of Grafana, the open source visualization tool, around the globe, monitoring everything from beehives to climate change in the Alps. The instantly recognizable dashboards have been spotted everywhere from a NASA launch and Minecraft HQ to Wimbledon and the Tour de France. Grafana Labs also helps more than 3,000 companies -- including Bloomberg, JPMorgan Chase, and eBay -- manage their observability strategies with the Grafana LGTM Stack, which can be run fully managed with <a href="https://grafana.com/products/cloud/">Grafana Cloud</a> or self-managed with the <a href="https://grafana.com/products/enterprise/">Grafana Enterprise Stack</a>, both featuring scalable metrics (<a href="https://grafana.com/oss/mimir/">Grafana Mimir</a>), logs (<a href="https://grafana.com/oss/loki/">Grafana Loki</a>), and traces (<a href="https://grafana.com/oss/tempo/">Grafana Tempo</a>).</p><br><p>We’re scaling fast and staying true to what makes us different: an open-source legacy, a global collaborative culture, and a passion for meaningful work. Our team thrives in an innovation-driven environment where transparency, autonomy, and trust fuel everything we do.</p><br><p>You may not meet every requirement, and that’s okay. If this role excites you, we’d love you to raise your hand for what could be a truly career-defining opportunity.</p></div><div><p></p><br><p><strong>The Opportunity:</strong></p><br><p>We are looking for an experienced product marketer to join as a key member of the Grafana Labs Product Marketing team. In this role, you will be responsible for creating Go-To-Market programs that effectively position the value of Grafana Labs and its products to solve the needs of target customers. You will show how our products and solutions — as well as our open source strategy — help prospects and customers achieve their goals.&nbsp;</p><br><p>As a Staff Product Marketing Manager, you will be in charge of the messaging and positioning across key personas and product areas. You’ll work closely with both product management and enablement to help buyers buy (and sellers sell) our value.</p><br><p>Product Marketing lives within the Product org rather than the Marketing org at Grafana Labs, and we are thinking differently about product marketing. Rather than purely executing launches or campaigns, we want PMMs to teach Product Managers and Engineers in our org how to think about growth and demand, and to codify product marketing knowledge in tools and processes that anyone in the organization can use.</p><br><p>Grafana Labs is a fast-paced and growing organization. As such, this role requires both strategic and planning skills as well as hands-on tactical execution (blogs, webinar outlines, video scripts, etc).</p><br><p><strong>What You'll Be Doing:</strong></p><br><ul><br><li>Actively partner with and teach Product Managers to define product value, messaging, and go-to-market strategy, from competitive positioning to sales enablement collateral.</li><br><li>Partner with product management, engineering and various go-to-market functions to create materials that help customers evaluate and adopt our products: reference architectures, implementation guides, detailed product information.</li><br><li>Own and manage the launch of new products/features relevant to target buyers</li><br><li>Conduct internal and customer research to understand pain points, competition and opportunities</li><br><li>Teach go-to-market and sales teams how to gain value from our products: clearly define the capabilities of our products and the value they provide, deliver training and enablement, ensure customer facing teams are able to effectively engage with customers, partners, and prospects.</li><br><li>Own customer lifecycle campaigns (competitive positioning, retention, upsell/cross-sell) to strategically shape marketing programs and drive growth across the entire customer journey.</li><br></ul><br><p><strong>What Makes You a Great Fit:</strong></p><br><ul><br><li>6+ years of relevant experience (product marketing, solutions marketing, product management)</li><br><li>Experience with marketing and selling to a technical audience</li><br><li>A passion for open source, cloud native, and infrastructure technologies&nbsp;</li><br><li>Proven ability to take on complex projects and efficiently drive them from start to finish</li><br><li>Ability to clearly articulate the value of technical products to customers and sellers alike</li><br><li>Experience leading product or feature launches autonomously as well as part of a team</li><br><li>Comfort working with a variety of internal and external stakeholders in complicated processes</li><br><li>Strong product and technical curiosity that translate to clear packaging, positioning, and messaging</li><br><li>Demonstrated quantitative analytical skills for analyzing campaign performance, evaluating lifecycle metrics, and making data-driven recommendations.</li><br><li>Exceptional writing and communication skills</li><br><li>A high “say-do” ratio in executing and delivering impact&nbsp;</li><br></ul><br><p><strong>What you’ll bring to the role</strong></p><br><p>You’ll bring a passion for quality, pride in the strategic impact of your work, and the ability to thrive in a fast-paced environment.</p><br><p><strong>Compensation &amp; Rewards:</strong></p><br><p>In the United Kingdom, the Base compensation range for this role is £<span>103,958</span> - £<span>124,750</span>. Actual compensation may vary based on level, experience, and skillset as assessed throughout the interview process. All of our roles include Restricted Stock Units (RSUs), giving every team member ownership in Grafana Labs' success. We believe in shared outcomes—RSUs help us stay aligned and invested as we scale globally.</p><br><p></p></div><div><div><br><p><em>*Compensation ranges are country specific. If you are applying for this role from a different location than listed above, your recruiter will discuss your specific market’s defined pay range &amp; benefits at the beginning of the process.</em></p><br><p><strong>Why You’ll Thrive at Grafana Labs:</strong></p><br><ul><br><li><strong>100% Remote, Global Culture -&nbsp;</strong>As a remote-only company, we bring together talent from around the world, united by a culture of collaboration and shared purpose.</li><br><li><strong>Scaling Organization</strong> – Tackle meaningful work in a high-growth, ever-evolving environment.</li><br><li><strong>Transparent Communication</strong> – Expect open decision-making and regular company-wide updates.</li><br><li><strong>Innovation-Driven</strong> – Autonomy and support to ship great work and try new things.</li><br><li><strong>Open Source Roots</strong> – Built on community-driven values that shape how we work.</li><br><li><strong>Empowered Teams</strong> – High trust, low ego culture that values outcomes over optics.</li><br><li><strong>Career Growth Pathways</strong> – Defined opportunities to grow and develop your career.</li><br><li><strong>Approachable Leadership</strong> – Transparent execs who are involved, visible, and human.</li><br><li><strong>Passionate People</strong> – Join a team of smart, supportive folks who care deeply about what they do.</li><br><li><strong>In-Person onboarding </strong>- We want you to thrive from day 1 with your fellow new ‘Grafanistas’ to learn all about what we do and how we do it.&nbsp;</li><br><li><strong>Balance is Key</strong> - We operate a global annual leave policy of 30 days per annum. 3 days of your annual leave entitlement are reserved for Grafana Shutdown Days to allow the team to really disconnect. <em>*We will comply with local legislation where applicable.</em></li><br></ul><br><p><strong>Equal Opportunity Employer:</strong> We will recruit, train, compensate and promote regardless of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, disability, age, veteran status, and all the other fascinating characteristics that make us different and unique. We believe that equality and diversity builds a strong organization and we’re working hard to make sure that’s the foundation of our organization as we grow.</p><br><p><em>Grafana Labs may utilize AI tools in its recruitment process to assist in matching information provided in CVs to job postings. The recruitment team will continue to review inbound CVs manually to identify alignment with current openings.</em></p><br><p>#LI-Remote</p><br></div><br><div><em>For information about how your personal data is used once you’ve applied to a job, check out our .&nbsp;</em></div><br><div>&nbsp;</div></div></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/grafana-labs-staff-product-marketing-manager-united-kingdom-remote">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/grafana-labs-staff-product-marketing-manager-united-kingdom-remote</a></p>
</description>

    <item>
      <title>Bounteous: Principal Product Lead  MarTech AI</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Dallas, TX
</p>

<div class="content"><div class="section-wrapper page-full-width"><div class="section page-centered"><div>Bounteous is a premier end-to-end digital transformation consultancy dedicated to partnering with ambitious brands to create digital solutions for today’s complex challenges and tomorrow’s opportunities. With uncompromising standards for technical and domain expertise, we deliver innovative and strategic solutions in Strategy, Analytics, Digital Engineering, Cloud, Data &amp; AI, Experience Design, and Marketing.</div><div><br></div><div>Our Co-Innovation methodology is a unique engagement model designed to align interests and accelerate value creation. Our clients worldwide benefit from the skills and expertise of over 4,000+ expert team members across the Americas, APAC, and EMEA. By partnering with leading technology providers, we craft transformative digital experiences that enhance customer engagement and drive business success.</div><div><br></div><div>We are seeking a high-impact Principal Product Leader to serve as the visionary architect and chief evangelist for our AI-powered B2B MarTech suite. This is not a role for a traditional "feature manager." We need a growth-minded owner who can bridge the gap between cutting-edge Generative AI and enterprise-scale revenue impact. You will define the roadmap, own the product’s commercial success, and evangelize the future of AI-driven personalization to the world’s most sophisticated marketing organizations.</div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>Information Security Responsibilities</h3><ul class="posting-requirements plain-list"><ul><li>Promote and enforce awareness of key information security practices, including acceptable use of information assets, malware protection, and password security protocols</li><li>Identify, assess, and report security risks, focusing on how these risks impact the confidentiality, integrity, and availability of information assets</li><li>Understand and evaluate how data is stored, processed, or transmitted, ensuring compliance with data privacy and protection standards (GDPR, CCPA, etc.)</li><li>Ensure data protection measures are integrated throughout the information lifecycle to safeguard sensitive information</li></ul></ul></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>Core Pillars of Responsibility</h3><ul class="posting-requirements plain-list"><ul><li>1. Product Evangelism &amp; Market Leadership</li><li> The Voice of AI: Act as the primary technical and strategic spokesperson for our AI suite. You will translate LLM complexities into a "value-first" narrative for C-suite stakeholders and enterprise clients.&nbsp;Customer Advocacy: Drive product-led growth (PLG) by deeply understanding the "jobs to be done" for modern marketers and turning those insights into compelling market stories.&nbsp;Thought Leadership: Represent the product in industry forums and executive briefings, positioning our AI capabilities (RAG, content automation, predictive modeling) as the gold standard in MarTech.&nbsp;</li><div><br></div><li>2. Strategic Roadmap &amp; Visionary Ownership</li><li> The North Star: Own the multi-year product vision. You aren't just shipping features; you are building a proprietary AI ecosystem that redefines content generation and personalization.&nbsp;High-Stakes Prioritization: Balance aggressive innovation with technical feasibility, ensuring the roadmap focuses on high-growth levers that drive ROI and enterprise retention.&nbsp;Governance &amp; Ethics: Lead the charge on ethical AI, ensuring our roadmap adheres to global data privacy (GDPR, CCPA) while maintaining a competitive edge.&nbsp;</li><div><br></div><li>3. Product Growth &amp; Lifecycle Velocity</li><li> Growth Mechanics: Identify untapped opportunities within the MarTech stack (CDP, CRM, Creative Ops) to expand the product’s footprint and increase "stickiness" within enterprise workflows.&nbsp;Agile Experimentation: Lead a culture of "fail fast, scale faster." Use pilots and MVPs to validate AI models, then rapidly operationalize them for global scale.&nbsp;Commercial Impact: Define and own the KPIs that matter: Product-Qualified Leads (PQLs), adoption velocity, and AI-attributed revenue growth.</li></ul></ul></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>Key Qualifications</h3><ul class="posting-requirements plain-list"><ul><li>The AI Expert: You have a deep, intuitive understanding of LLMs, RAG, and NLP frameworks. You don't just know what they are; you know how to monetize them.&nbsp;</li><li>The MarTech Veteran (nice to have): You’ve spent years navigating the Adobe/Salesforce/CDP ecosystems and know exactly where AI can disrupt traditional marketing silos.&nbsp;</li><li>The Strategic Communicator: You possess the rare ability to command a room of engineers in the morning and a room of CMOs in the afternoon.&nbsp;The Growth Mindset: You have a proven track record of taking products from "experimental pilot" to "enterprise-wide adoption.</li></ul></ul></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div>$160,000 - $175,000 a year</div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div>We invite you to stay connected with us by subscribing to our monthly job openings alert <a class="postings-link" href="https://www.bounteous.com/careers/#contact-us-footer">here</a>.</div><div><br></div><div>Bounteous is proud to be an equal opportunity employer. Bounteous does not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, sex, gender identity, sexual orientation, age, physical or mental disability, national origin, veteran status, or any other status protected under federal, state, or local law.&nbsp;Bounteous is willing to sponsor eligible candidates for employment visas.&nbsp;</div><div><br></div><div><b>#BI-Remote</b></div><div><b>#LI-Remote</b></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div class="text-small italic text-gray-700">We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.</div></div></div></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/bounteous-principal-product-lead-martech-ai">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/bounteous-principal-product-lead-martech-ai</a></p>
</description>

    <item>
      <media:content url="https://wwr-pro.s3.amazonaws.com/logos/0123/5852/logo.gif" type="image/png"/>
      <title>EngagedMD: Staff Software Engineer</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country>🇺🇸 United States of America</country>
      <state>District of Columbia</state>
      <skills>GraphQL, Node.js, React, and TypeScript</skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description><img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0123/5852/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" />

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Washington, DC
    <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://engaged-md.com">https://engaged-md.com</a>
</p>

<p>You’re an experienced engineer with exceptional skill and leadership ability, capable of making an impact across our product ecosystem. We’re EngagedMD and we have a patient journey application used by more than 3 million users nationwide and internationally since its launch. We continue to see enormous growth and adoption from medical clinics across multiple markets. This is an exciting opportunity to join us in our mission to help carers carry on caring.&nbsp;</p>
<p>You will have the opportunity to architect backend infrastructure and develop new features for our customers while also closely collaborating with our Platform, Product and Customer Success teams.</p>
<p>This fully remote role reports to our Director of Engineering and candidates are required to reside in the United States. This role requires legal authorization to work in the United States. EngagedMD is unable to sponsor current H1B visa holders for this role.&nbsp;</p>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
<p><strong>What You’ll Do</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>Design, build and maintain backend services and APIs using TypeScript and modern Node.js frameworks</li>
<li>Lead system design efforts for new and existing platforms, including service decomposition, data modeling, scalability and reliability considerations</li>
<li>Own complex backend domains end-to-end, from initial architecture through implementation, deployment and long-term maintenance</li>
<li>Drive technical direction and standards across the backend stack, including coding practices, service boundaries, observability, error handling and performance</li>
<li>Make pragmatic architectural tradeoffs that balance delivery speed with system quality and long-term maintainability</li>
<li>Collaborate closely with product, frontend, and infrastructure teams to deliver scalable, reliable product capabilities</li>
<li>Identify and proactively address technical debt, scalability bottlenecks, security concerns and operational risks</li>
<li>Mentor and support engineers through code reviews, design discussions and hands-on technical guidance</li>
<li>Contribute to incident response, root-cause analysis and improvements to system resiliency</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>Technical Focus Areas</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>TypeScript and Node.js backend development</li>
<li>API design (REST, GraphQL, or equivalent)</li>
<li>Databases, schema design and data consistency</li>
<li>Distributed systems fundamentals (scalability, fault tolerance, eventual consistency)</li>
<li>Cloud-based deployments and production operations</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>What You’ll Bring</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>8+ years of professional software engineering experience, with significant backend focus</li>
<li>Deep expertise in TypeScript and building production backend services</li>
<li>Strong system design skills, with experience designing and evolving large-scale or business-critical systems</li>
<li>Proven ability to operate autonomously and make sound technical decisions in ambiguous environments</li>
<li>Experience balancing long-term architectural quality with short-term delivery needs</li>
<li>Strong communication skills; able to clearly explain technical concepts to engineers and non-engineers</li>
<li>A mission-driven orientation to all you do&nbsp;</li>
<li>Ability to thrive in a small, fast-paced organization&nbsp;</li>
<li>Bachelor’s degree or equivalent career experience&nbsp;</li>
</ul>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
<p><strong>It’s Also Nice If You…</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>Have at least a passing familiarity with the fertility industry and/or experience in healthtech with a focus on patient journey software</li>
<li>Have successfully worked remotely with distributed teams in the past</li>
</ul>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
<p><strong>What We Offer</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>Competitive compensation and equity</li>
<li>Medical, dental, and vision coverage heavily subsidized by the company</li>
<li>Open Paid Time Off</li>
<li>Paid family and medical leave</li>
<li>Generous paid holidays</li>
<li>401(k) retirement savings plan&nbsp;</li>
</ul>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
<p><em>EngagedMD is an equal opportunity employer. We’re committed to diversity, equity, and inclusion. We believe our company and products are made better by the varied perspectives of our employees, each of whom we seek to empower and support in their individuality. We hire our team members on the basis of merit, qualifications, and the needs of our business in order to best achieve our mission to help carers carry on caring. Pursuant to this commitment, EngagedMD will ensure that persons with disabilities are provided reasonable accommodations for the hiring process. If reasonable accommodation is needed, please contact&nbsp;</em><a href="mailto:peopleops@engagedmd.com"><em>peopleops@engagedmd.com</em></a>.</p>
<p><br><br></p>
<p><strong>About EngagedMD</strong></p>
<p>At EngagedMD, we embrace a mission-driven culture where committed individuals come together to make a real impact in healthcare. Our core values of integrity, collaboration, impact, recognition and growth inform how we work together. They also make possible our culture of belonging and excellence where our team members can be themselves, grow professionally, do their best work, and be rewarded for it. Join us today in our mission to help carers carry on caring.</p>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/engagedmd-staff-software-engineer">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/engagedmd-staff-software-engineer</a></p>
</description>

    <item>
      <media:content url="https://wwr-pro.s3.amazonaws.com/logos/0171/4585/logo.gif" type="image/png"/>
      <title>Aktor AI: (Senior) AI Solutions Engineer</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state>Attikḯ</state>
      <skills>Artificial Intelligence (AI), AI Consulting, Prompt Engineering, Architecture, AI Agents, and Agentic AI</skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description><img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/4585/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" />

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Athens, Greece
    <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://aktor.ai">https://aktor.ai</a>
</p>

<p>We are hiring a <strong>(Senior) AI Solutions Engineer</strong> to join our AI engineering team remotely and help us build, harden, and scale AI agents.</p>
<h1>The Role</h1>
<p>This is a hands-on engineering role at the frontier of AI-augmented software development. You will design, build, and ship production AI agents, but the way you build them may look different from what you’re used to.</p>
<p>Our engineers work heavily with AI coding assistants and autonomous agent tooling. The craft has shifted: writing every line yourself matters less than knowing&nbsp;<strong>what good looks like</strong>. Making sound architectural decisions, maintaining quality standards, and steering AI-generated output toward well-structured, maintainable systems. You will spend more time thinking, reviewing, and deciding than typing.</p>
<p>That said, you still need strong engineering fundamentals. You can’t evaluate what you don’t understand. The best engineers in this new paradigm are the ones who know&nbsp;<em>when the AI is wrong</em>&nbsp;and can articulate&nbsp;<em>why</em>.</p>
<h1>What You’ll Do</h1>
<p>•&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;<strong>Build and ship AI agents&nbsp;</strong>end-to-end: from scoping and prototyping through optimisation and production rollout.</p>
<p>•&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;<strong>Architect for reliability:&nbsp;</strong>design observability, logging, guardrails, evaluation pipelines, cost controls, and human-in-the-loop flows.</p>
<p>•&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;<strong>Integrate with enterprise systems:&nbsp;</strong>build connectors and retrieval pipelines to data stores, APIs, and line-of-business applications.</p>
<p>•&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;<strong>Review and elevate:&nbsp;</strong>review AI-generated code and designs with a critical eye. Challenge what doesn’t meet the bar, accept what does.</p>
<p>•&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;<strong>Own quality:&nbsp;</strong>write and maintain evaluation datasets, define accuracy targets, and treat failure modes as first-class engineering concerns.</p>
<p>•&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;<strong>Document clearly:&nbsp;</strong>produce designs, runbooks, and technical documentation that others can follow.</p>
<h1>What We’re Looking For</h1>
<h2>Engineering Judgment Over Stack Knowledge</h2>
<p>We care far less about which specific frameworks you’ve used and far more about whether you make good decisions. Technologies change fast; judgment compounds.</p>
<p>•&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;<strong>Strong software engineering fundamentals.&nbsp;</strong>You understand how systems are built, how they break, and how to keep them simple.</p>
<p>•&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;<strong>Experience with LLM-based systems&nbsp;</strong>in production or near-production settings (agents, RAG, automation, orchestration).</p>
<p>•&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;<strong>A product-minded approach.&nbsp;</strong>You think about what you’re building and why, not just how. You understand that the goal is a working solution that serves a business need.</p>
<p>•&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;<strong>Architectural taste.&nbsp;</strong>You can look at a system design, whether you wrote it or an AI generated it, and tell whether it’s sound, over-engineered, or cutting corners that will cost you later.</p>
<p>•&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;<strong>Comfort with ambiguity.&nbsp;</strong>AI systems don’t behave like deterministic code. You’re comfortable with probabilistic outputs, evaluation-driven development, and iterative refinement.</p>
<h2>Levels</h2>
<p><strong>Engineer</strong>&nbsp;(typically 2–5 years total; 1+ with AI systems)</p>
<p>•&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Ships features and integrations independently.</p>
<p>•&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Implements evaluation datasets, prompt engineering, and observability.</p>
<p>•&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Contributes to design discussions and follows established guidelines.</p>
<p><strong>Senior Engineer</strong>&nbsp;(typically 6–10+ years; 2+ leading AI deliveries)</p>
<p>•&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Leads end-to-end implementations and makes architecture choices.</p>
<p>•&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Designs data/retrieval schemas, instrumentation, and cost/latency budgets.</p>
<p>•&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Sets quality bars and mentors teammates.</p>
<p>Nice to Have:</p>
<p>Experience with agent orchestration frameworks, vector/graph databases, Postgres/Redis, tracing/observability platforms, Azure, or ERP integrations. Specific tools are flexible; equivalent experience is welcome.</p>
<h2>Professional Qualities</h2>
<p>•&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;<strong>High ownership and follow-through.&nbsp;</strong>You don’t wait to be told what to do next. You see what needs doing and you do it.</p>
<p>•&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;<strong>Pragmatic and quality-conscious.&nbsp;</strong>You use the simplest approach that solves the problem well. You don’t gold-plate, but you also don’t take shortcuts that create future pain, especially when the cost of doing it right is marginal.</p>
<p>•&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;<strong>Reliability-first mindset.&nbsp;</strong>You treat guardrails, evaluation, and failure handling as core engineering work, not afterthoughts.</p>
<p>•&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;<strong>Clear communicator.&nbsp;</strong>You write crisp messages, document decisions, and can explain technical trade-offs plainly.</p>
<p>•&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;<strong>Dedicated and self-driven.&nbsp;</strong>You’re comfortable with autonomy and manage your own time effectively. You’re the kind of person who, when something is running, keeps an eye on it, not because someone asked, but because you care about the outcome.</p>
<h1>What We Offer</h1>
<p>•&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Competitive compensation and benefits.</p>
<p>•&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; The opportunity to build production AI agents used by real businesses, measured by tangible KPIs.</p>
<p>•&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; A modern, AI-native engineering environment where you’ll work with cutting-edge tooling daily.</p>
<p>•&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Autonomy to shape engineering standards and best practices.</p>
<p>•&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Career growth with executive visibility in a large, impact-oriented group.</p>
<h1>Hiring Process</h1>
<p>1.&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;<strong>Initial interview</strong>: a structured conversation to understand your experience, thinking, and motivations.</p>
<p>2.&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;<strong>Paid collaborative project</strong>: instead of a contrived take-home test, you’ll work on a real-scope assignment alongside other candidates over a ~2-week window, so you can fit it around your schedule. Top contributions will be awarded cash prizes. This is the core of our evaluation. We want to see how you work, not just how you talk about working.</p>
<p>3.&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;<strong>Final interview</strong>: a conversation with the CEO of Aktor AI and the Head of Solution Delivery.</p>
<p><em>Our hiring process uses AI-assisted tools for application screening and includes an AI-powered interview stage. All decisions are made by people.</em></p>
<h1>Details</h1>
<p>•&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;<strong>Location:&nbsp;</strong>100% Remote, in Europe or Asia.</p>
<p>•&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;<strong>Reports to:&nbsp;</strong>Head of Solution Delivery</p>
<p>•&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;<strong>Collaboration:&nbsp;</strong>You’ll work closely with the Athens-based engineering and solution delivery teams asynchronously, with regular video check-ins.</p>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/aktor-ai-senior-ai-solutions-engineer">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/aktor-ai-senior-ai-solutions-engineer</a></p>
</description>

      <title>LeadUp AI: Full-Stack Developer (Junior)</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country>🇦🇷 Argentina, 🇧🇷 Brazil, 🇨🇱 Chile, 🇨🇴 Colombia, 🇨🇷 Costa Rica, 🇩🇴 Dominican Republic, 🇪🇨 Ecuador, 🇬🇹 Guatemala, 🇲🇽 Mexico, 🇳🇮 Nicaragua, 🇵🇦 Panama, 🇵🇪 Peru, 🇵🇾 Paraguay, 🇸🇻 El Salvador, and 🇺🇾 Uruguay</country>
      <state>California</state>

      <description><img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/4579/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" />

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> United States
    <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://www.leadupgym.com">http://www.leadupgym.com</a>
</p>

<h2>The Role</h2>
<p>You build the majority of the user-facing application. You work from a detailed specification and follow patterns set by the senior developer. AI coding tools are a core part of your workflow.</p>
<p>This is a fast-moving environment. You’ll have clear specs, but priorities will shift as the product meets real users. We need someone who treats that as normal.</p>
<p>Why this is different from most junior roles: You're not joining a 50-person engineering team where you'll spend six months on a button. You work directly with the senior developer and the CTO - both hands-on builders. You'll get real code reviews, real architectural conversations, and real mentorship. The product is being built now, with pilot clients coming within months. Your code ships to actual users, fast.</p>
<h2>What You’ll Do</h2>
<ul>
<li>
<p>Build the full user-facing web application: dashboards, reports, settings, onboarding</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Build admin views: user management, configuration, aggregate data</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Implement supporting systems: notifications, emails, exports</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Write tests against defined error scenarios</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Contribute to database schema design alongside the senior developer and the CTO</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Daily sync with senior developer; PR review on every merge</p>
</li>
</ul>
<h2>Required</h2>
<ul>
<li>
<p>1–3 years of professional development experience (internships and freelance count)</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>React (or Next.js) for frontend, Python for backend (FastAPI experience is a strong plus)</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Basic PostgreSQL: can write queries, understands joins, can contribute to schema design</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Active AI coding tool user (Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot) — part of your daily workflow</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Can read a spec and ship features without hand-holding</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Comfortable with changing priorities</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Asks questions when unclear rather than guessing</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Solid written and spoken English</p>
</li>
</ul>
<h2>Preferred</h2>
<ul>
<li>
<p>FastAPI experience</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Tailwind CSS, responsive design</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Authentication flows (OAuth, JWT)</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Dashboard or report-style interfaces</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Portfolio or GitHub showing end-to-end projects</p>
</li>
</ul>
<h2>Why Join</h2>
<p>You won’t guess what to build. Detailed spec. Your creativity goes into quality and speed.</p>
<p>You’ll learn from strong people. Senior developer sets patterns. CTO works hands-on with the team.</p>
<p>Your work ships fast. Pilot clients within months. Real users, real feedback.</p>
<p>Ground floor. The product is being built now. If it succeeds, you were there from the beginning.</p>
<h2>Process</h2>
<p>1. Application review</p>
<p>2. Technical conversation with the CTO</p>
<p><strong>3. Offer. If the interview goes well, we move fast</strong></p>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/leadup-ai-full-stack-developer-junior">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/leadup-ai-full-stack-developer-junior</a></p>

      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state>Nevada</state>
      <skills>PHP and React</skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description><img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/2344/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" />

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Remote
    <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://onthegosystems.com">http://onthegosystems.com</a>
</p>

<p><strong>OnTheGoSystems</strong> is a profitable $12M fully remote company behind WPML, one of the most popular WordPress plugins in the world, powering over 1,5 million production websites and serving over 250,000 customers globally.</p>
<p>We’re looking for a&nbsp;<strong>Senior Full-Stack Developer</strong> with strong technical judgment, the ability to dive deep into complex problems and domains, and the ownership mindset to drive solutions from definition to production impact, using AI as a practical tool to support effective engineering work.</p>
<p>You’ll design and build solutions used by customers worldwide, engage directly with real users, and continuously improve both functionality and user experience.</p>
<p><strong>What You’ll Do</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>Own features end-to-end: from problem definition to production impact</li>
<li>Use AI to understand, generate, review, and refine code efficiently</li>
<li>Make architectural decisions and consider system-wide impact</li>
<li>Identify gaps in requirements and define the right behavior</li>
<li>Handle selected support cases that require a developer’s perspective, working directly with clients.</li>
<li>Turn real user problems into product and UX/UI improvements</li>
<li>Continuously improve what you build based on real usage</li>
<li>Build a deep understanding of complex product and technical domains, identify root causes behind difficult problems, and work with the team to deliver clear, practical solutions.</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>Indicators You’re a Good Fit</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>You take responsibility for outcomes, not just task completion</li>
<li>You work well with evolving requirements and take the initiative to define solutions</li>
<li>You balance system-level thinking with a strong sense of how product and technical decisions affect the user experience.</li>
<li>You can guide and validate AI-generated code effectively</li>
<li>You’re comfortable engaging with users to resolve issues, digging into technical problems, and fixing root causes</li>
<li>You proactively identify problems and improve both product and UX</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>Technical Requirements</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>Strong experience with PHP and JavaScript</li>
<li>Solid experience with React (Redux is good to have)</li>
<li>Experience with databases and system design</li>
<li>Automated testing (PHPUnit or similar)</li>
<li>End-to-end testing experience</li>
<li>Git and version control</li>
<li>WordPress experience (good-to-have)</li>
</ul>
<p>The role is about&nbsp;<strong>owning problems</strong>,&nbsp;<strong>shaping solutions</strong>, and making the product better in&nbsp;<strong>real-world</strong> usage.</p>
<p>If you’re looking for a role where you<strong>&nbsp;own real outcomes</strong>&nbsp;and operate at a&nbsp;<strong>higher level than traditional development</strong>, we’d love to hear from you.</p>
<p><strong>Apply today to join OnTheGoSystems!</strong></p>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/onthegosystems-full-stack-php-developer-1">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/onthegosystems-full-stack-php-developer-1</a></p>
</description>

    <item>
      <title>Moxie: Staff product engineer (fullstack) (IC-4)</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Remote - US
</p>

<p>At Moxie, we empower ambitious aesthetic entrepreneurs to build profitable, independent practices—without burnout, overwhelm, or guesswork. In just a few years, we’ve grown from an idea to a global, remote-first team of more than 140 people, supporting hundreds of practices nationwide.</p><p>Our purpose is simple: <strong>to unlock sustainable success for aesthetic entrepreneurs, at every stage of their journey.</strong></p><h1><strong>Staff product engineer (fullstack)</strong></h1><p></p><p><strong>Remote, Full-time<br></strong> <strong>Location:</strong> Fully Remote (Work from Home)<br> <strong>Working hours:</strong> Core overlap with 9 AM – 5 PM EST (flexible schedules between 7 AM – 8 PM EST)</p><p></p><h2><strong>About Moxie</strong></h2><p>Moxie empowers aesthetic industry professionals to become successful entrepreneurs. We provide a sophisticated SaaS platform that simplifies the operational complexities of running MedSpas, enabling nurses and medical professionals to launch, operate, and grow their businesses across the country.</p><p>Hundreds of customers rely on <strong>Moxie Suite</strong> to run their MedSpas end-to-end: scheduling, medical purchasing, payments and invoicing, bookkeeping, analytics, and more. Our platform is built primarily in <strong>TypeScript and Python</strong>, using <strong>React, Next.js, GraphQL, Django, and AWS</strong>, and integrates with vendors like <strong>Stripe, Twilio, Datadog, Meta</strong>, and others.</p><p>We are a well-funded, fast-growing company and are building a team of engineers who care deeply about product quality, system design, and long-term scalability.</p><p></p><h2><strong>The Role</strong></h2><p>We are looking for a <strong>Staff product engineer (fullstack)</strong> to serve as a senior technical leader across the Moxie platform. This is a high-impact, hands-on role focused on <strong>architectural ownership, cross-team technical leadership, and execution of complex, business-critical initiatives</strong>.</p><p>This role is intentionally flexible in where ensure depth:</p><ul><li><p>You should bring <strong>deep expertise in at least one half of the stack</strong> (frontend <em>or</em> backend)</p></li><li><p>You should also have <strong>working experience across the full stack</strong>, enabling effective collaboration, design, and execution end to end</p></li><li><p>Candidates with <strong>deep expertise across both frontend and backend</strong> are a strong plus, but not required<br></p></li></ul><p>You will work across frontend and backend systems, partner closely with product and engineering leadership, and help scale both our technology and our engineering organization. While this role does not have direct people management responsibilities, it carries significant influence over technical direction, standards, and best practices.</p><p></p><h2><strong>Key Responsibilities</strong></h2><h3><strong>Technical Leadership &amp; Architecture</strong></h3><ul><li><p>Own and evolve major parts of Moxie’s frontend and backend architecture, balancing short-term delivery with long-term scalability, reliability, and developer velocity.</p></li><li><p>Lead technical design and architectural reviews for complex, cross-cutting initiatives.</p></li><li><p>Identify systemic risks and technical bottlenecks, and proactively drive solutions that improve platform stability and performance.</p></li><li><p>Help define and maintain engineering standards, patterns, and best practices across teams.<br></p></li></ul><h3><strong>Fullstack Development</strong></h3><ul><li><p>Act as a hands-on technical leader, working on the highest-impact and highest-complexity problems across the stack.</p></li><li><p>Drive architecture and implementation primarily in your area of deep expertise (frontend or backend), while contributing meaningfully across the full stack as needed.</p></li><li><p>Design and implement performant, scalable frontend experiences using React, TypeScript, GraphQL, and Next.js.</p></li><li><p>Build and evolve backend systems in Python and Django, integrating with internal services and third-party vendors.</p></li><li><p>Ensure systems are observable, reliable, and operable in production.<br></p></li></ul><h3><strong>Cross-Team Collaboration</strong></h3><ul><li><p>Partner with product, design, and engineering leadership to translate business goals into clear technical strategies and execution plans.</p></li><li><p>Drive alignment across teams on shared abstractions, APIs, and platform-level initiatives.</p></li><li><p>Serve as a trusted technical advisor, helping teams make sound tradeoffs under real-world constraints.<br></p></li></ul><h3><strong>Mentorship &amp; Engineering Excellence</strong></h3><ul><li><p>Mentor and coach engineers at multiple levels, helping them grow in system design, technical judgment, and ownership.</p></li><li><p>Raise the technical bar through thoughtful code reviews, design feedback, and knowledge sharing.</p></li><li><p>Contribute to a culture of high-quality execution, continuous improvement, and accountability.</p></li></ul><p></p><h2><strong>Qualifications</strong></h2><h3><strong>Required</strong></h3><ul><li><p>8+ years of experience building and scaling complex software systems with meaningful ownership of production systems.</p></li><li><p><strong>Deep expertise in at least one of the following:</strong></p><ul><li><p><strong>Frontend:</strong> React, TypeScript, GraphQL, Next.js, and frontend architecture at scale</p></li><li><p><strong>Backend:</strong> Python, Django, API design, data modeling, and backend architecture at scale<br></p></li></ul></li><li><p><strong>Working proficiency across the full stack</strong>, with the ability to contribute, review, and design beyond your primary area of expertise.</p></li><li><p>Proven track record of owning and driving large technical initiatives from concept through production.</p></li><li><p>Experience operating systems in production, including deployments, incident response, and performance monitoring.</p></li><li><p>Strong analytical and systems-thinking skills, with the ability to reason about tradeoffs and long-term impact.</p></li><li><p>Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English (C1 or higher).<br></p></li></ul><h3><strong>Nice to Have</strong></h3><ul><li><p>Deep expertise across <strong>both</strong> frontend and backend</p></li><li><p>Experience with <strong>Hasura</strong></p></li><li><p>Experience with <strong>Vercel</strong></p></li><li><p>Experience with <strong>AWS</strong></p></li><li><p>Experience working in regulated or compliance-sensitive domains (e.g., healthcare, fintech)<br></p></li></ul><h2><strong>Our Stack</strong></h2><ul><li><p><strong>Frontend:</strong> React, TypeScript, Next.js</p></li><li><p><strong>API:</strong> REST, GraphQL, Hasura</p></li><li><p><strong>Backend:</strong> Python, Django</p></li><li><p><strong>Data:</strong> PostgreSQL</p></li><li><p><strong>Hosting &amp; Testing:</strong> Vercel, AWS</p></li><li><p><strong>CI/CD:</strong> GitHub Actions</p></li><li><p><strong>Version Control:</strong> Git, GitHub</p></li><li><p><strong>AI / LLM Tooling:</strong> Claude Code, Gemini, Cursor, CodeRabbit, Glean, Codex</p></li></ul><p></p><p>At Moxie, we believe in creating a workplace where everyone feels valued, trusted, and included. Our team lives by our values: <strong>act as owners, give more than we take, move with speed and care, and simplify and learn every day.</strong></p><p>We welcome people of all backgrounds, experiences, and perspectives to apply. If you require any accommodations to fully participate in the interview process, please let us know, we’re happy to assist.</p>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/moxie-staff-product-engineer-fullstack-ic-4">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/moxie-staff-product-engineer-fullstack-ic-4</a></p>
</description>

      <title>Phantom: Product Design (Wallet Platform)</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Remote-US
</p>

<p>Phantom is revolutionizing the way millions of people interact with the crypto ecosystem. Our self-custodial wallet offers a seamless, unified experience for managing accounts and tokens across Solana, Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Polygon, empowering users with a single, convenient solution. By integrating cutting-edge security features and launching innovative tools for an enhanced personalized user experience, Phantom is able to provide a next-generation, safe and easy to use self-custodial wallet for everyone. This strategy has allowed Phantom to achieve significant milestones including surpassing 16 million MAU’s, reaching #1 in the Google play store finance category, and consistently trending as a Top 50 app across all categories, right next to X, PayPal, Coinbase, and ChatGPT.</p><p></p><h2>Role Description</h2><p><a href="http://phantom.app">Phantom</a> is a design-led company focused on making crypto safe, friendly, and easy to use. Our crypto wallet is used by millions of people to access apps and financial services built on the Solana blockchain. As a Product Designer at Phantom you will have the opportunity to make crypto more accessible and inclusive for millions of people around the world by lowering the barrier to entry through human-centered design.  </p><p></p><h2><strong>Responsibilities</strong></h2><ul><li><p>Lead design for a product team from conception to launch in partnership with product managers, engineers, marketing, support, and executive leadership</p></li><li><p>Define new product flows and incorporate them into our design system</p></li><li><p>Take complex, conceptual ideas and turn them into something useful and easy to use for our users across desktop and mobile</p></li><li><p>Contribute to strategic decisions around the future direction of Phantom, crypto wallets, and web3</p></li><li><p>Proactively raise our bar for quality, by making crypto UX more approachable for everyday people</p></li><li><p>Design end-to-end flows and experiences that are simple and elegant</p></li></ul><p></p><h2><strong>Qualifications</strong></h2><ul><li><p>6+ years of experience building and shipping applications and software to users, with a strong emphasis on mobile-first consumer products.</p></li><li><p>Understanding of crypto ecosystems, with a crypto-native perspective—whether through professional experience, personal projects, or active participation in the web3 community.</p></li><li><p>Proven ability to present work to broader product teams and leadership, clearly articulating design goals, rationale, and user impact.</p></li><li><p>Strong visual design skills, with proficiency in desktop and mobile UI, color systems, layout, and iconography.</p></li><li><p>Advanced interaction design expertise and the ability to define intuitive behavior based on user needs and communicate ideas clearly through high-fidelity prototypes.</p></li><li><p>Experience leading product direction and applying strategic thinking to define product goals, uncover user opportunities, and make informed design decisions.</p></li><li><p>Background in defining and contributing to design systems and reusable components that elevate the quality and consistency of the overall design practice.</p></li></ul><p></p><h1><strong>Why Work with Us</strong></h1><h1><strong>Opportunity</strong></h1><p>We are a team of experienced builders in the blockchain and crypto industry. Our journey began from users seeking an easy, seamless path to accessing the crypto ecosystem. This passion fueled our exponential growth, allowing us to onboard over 16M+ active users in just over three years; with our user base growing weekly. Our dedication to a secure and seamless user experience has made us the leading wallet on Solana as well as our multi-chain approach enhances our platform's versatility, meeting the needs of a diverse and growing user base. By staying at the forefront of technology and user expectations, we continue to innovate and set industry standards on self-custodial crypto wallets.</p><p>There has never been a better time to work in crypto to help shape the future of innovation with a focus around the wallet experience!</p><ul><li><p><strong>First impressions matter:</strong> Wallets are responsible for a users first impression with crypto and onboarding new users into crypto. By ensuring that a user has a great first-time experience with crypto, we can help supercharge the growth of the entire ecosystem.</p></li><li><p><strong>Make crypto easier to navigate: </strong>There is no easy way for a user to discover and navigate all that crypto has to offer. Wallets have a unique opportunity to help users not only onboard to crypto but also stay retained by exploring new things to do.</p></li><li><p><strong>We live in a multi-chain world: </strong>We currently support Solana, Ethereum, Polygon and Bitcoin with more networks to come in the new future. We are focused on creating a unified, multi-chain crypto experience for users.</p></li></ul><p></p><h1><strong>Benefits</strong></h1><ul><li><p>Competitive salary and equity</p></li><li><p>Eligibility to participate in performance bonus program</p></li><li><p>Comprehensive insurance (medical/dental/vision) — 100% covered</p></li><li><p>Stipend for your ideal remote set-up</p></li><li><p>Flexible hours and a supportive remote environment</p></li><li><p>Unlimited vacation: Take time when you need it (and we really mean it!)</p></li><li><p>401(k) retirement plan</p></li><li><p>Monthly wellness benefit</p></li><li><p>Weekly meal benefit</p></li><li><p>Global off-sites</p><p></p></li></ul><p><strong>We strongly encourage candidates of all different backgrounds to apply.</strong> </p><p>We believe that our work is stronger with a variety of perspectives, and we’re eager to further diversify our company. If you have a background that you feel would make an impact at Phantom, please consider applying. We’re committed to building an inclusive, supportive place for you to do the best work of your career. </p><p>The target base salary for this role will range between $200,000 $238,000 with the addition of equity and benefits. This is determined by a few factors including your skillset, prior relevant experience, quality of interviews and market factors (such as location) at the point in time of offer.</p><p><em>By submitting your resume and application materials, you acknowledge and agree that Phantom may use automated tools, including AI systems, and may engage trusted third-party service providers to process your application and ensure an efficient hiring process. Phantom does not sell your information and your materials will be handled securely and in accordance with applicable data protection laws.</em></p>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/phantom-product-design-wallet-platform">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/phantom-product-design-wallet-platform</a></p>
</description>

    <item>
      <title>CRUX: Full Stack Developer/Senior Full Stack/Lead</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Chennai, Chennai , Tamil Nadu, India
</p>

<div><div><p class="googlejobs-paragraph--empty"></p><h2 class="title">Company Description</h2></div><div class="wysiwyg"><p><strong>About CRUX</strong></p><p>CRUX is one of the leading information technology companies. Through its Global Network Delivery Model, Innovation Network, and Solution Accelerators, CRUX focuses on helping global organizations address their business challenges effectively.</p><p>CRUX continues to invest in new technologies, processes, and people, which can help its customers, succeed. From generating novel concepts through CRUX’s R&amp;D and academic alliances, to drawing on the expertise of key partners, it keeps clients operating at the very edge of technological possibility.</p><p>CRUX highly skilled, dedicated IT professionals, its subsidiaries and Joint Ventures provide customized IT solutions for several industries using our range of technical expertise and experience.</p><p><strong>CRUX</strong></p><p>Client’s satisfaction is our utmost priority. We will go through and provide you with the right vendor with the right talent who are capable of handling any job you desire. We will handle the project for you making sure that all your requirements are met. We work for you.</p><p>We believe that every IT &amp; ITES project is unique in it and cannot be generalized.&nbsp; In this model the client stands to gain by working with the pioneers of the industry at relatively lower cost and towards the end of the development life cycle the technology is transferred which value adds to the local content.</p><p>CRUX offers a wide variety of services.&nbsp; Match your business needs to our capabilities.&nbsp; Our professional staff’s are highly qualified to assist companies in any area related to their information systems environment</p></div><div><p class="googlejobs-paragraph--empty"></p><h2 class="title">Job Description</h2></div><div class="wysiwyg"><p>We are seeking a highly skilled and versatile <strong>Full-Stack Developer</strong> to join our engineering team. In this role, you will be responsible for the end-to-end development of web applications, from architecting user-facing front-end components to building robust, scalable server-side logic and database schemas.</p><p>The ideal candidate has a deep understanding of the entire software development life cycle and is comfortable working in a fast-paced, Agile environment. Whether you are a seasoned Senior Developer or a Lead ready to drive architectural decisions, you will play a critical role in ensuring the performance, security, and scalability of our platforms.<br><br><br><br>&nbsp;</p><p>Key Responsibilities</p><ul><li><p><strong>Front-End Development:</strong> Design and implement responsive, high-performance user interfaces using <strong>Angular (v16+)</strong> and TypeScript.</p></li><li><p><strong>Back-End Development:</strong> Build and maintain secure, scalable server-side applications using <strong>NestJS</strong> and Node.js.</p></li><li><p><strong>Database Management:</strong> Architect and optimize data models across both relational (<strong>PostgreSQL</strong>) and NoSQL (<strong>MongoDB</strong>) databases.</p></li><li><p><strong>API Design:</strong> Develop and integrate RESTful APIs; experience with microservices architecture is highly preferred.</p></li><li><p><strong>Full-Stack Integration:</strong> Ensure seamless communication between the client-side and server-side systems.</p></li><li><p><strong>Code Quality:</strong> Conduct thorough testing using frameworks like <strong>Jest</strong> or <strong>Jasmine</strong> and participate in rigorous code reviews.</p></li><li><p><strong>DevOps &amp; Deployment:</strong> Work within <strong>CI/CD pipelines</strong> and utilize containerization tools like <strong>Docker</strong> and <strong>Kubernetes</strong>.</p></li><li><p><strong>Mentorship:</strong> (For senior/lead candidates) Provide technical guidance, promote best practices, and lead architectural discussions.</p></li></ul><p>Technical Requirements</p><ul><li><p><strong>Professional Experience:</strong> 4 to 12 years of software development experience in a professional environment.</p></li><li><p><strong>Core Fundamentals:</strong> Strong mastery of Computer Science fundamentals, including data structures, algorithms, and software design patterns.</p></li><li><p><strong>Front-End Mastery:</strong> Extensive experience with Angular (specifically version 16 or higher) and reactive programming (RxJS).</p></li><li><p><strong>Back-End Mastery:</strong> Proven expertise in NestJS, TypeScript, and Node.js.</p></li><li><p><strong>Database Expertise:</strong> Proficiency in database design, query optimization, and management (PostgreSQL and MongoDB).</p></li><li><p><strong>DevOps Knowledge:</strong> Solid understanding of Git, CI/CD practices, and cloud infrastructure (AWS, Azure, or GCP).</p></li><li><p><strong>Security:</strong> Deep knowledge of web security best practices (OWASP, JWT, OAuth).</p></li></ul></div><div><p class="googlejobs-paragraph--empty"></p><h2 class="title">Qualifications</h2></div><div class="wysiwyg"><ul><li><p><strong>Education:</strong> Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related technical field.</p></li><li><p><strong>Cloud &amp; Containers:</strong> Experience with Docker, Kubernetes, and cloud-native services.</p></li><li><p><strong>Leadership:</strong> Previous experience in a Lead or Senior role is highly desirable.</p></li><li><p><strong>Methodology:</strong> Familiarity with Agile/Scrum processes.</p></li></ul></div><div><p class="googlejobs-paragraph--empty"></p><h2 class="title">Additional Information</h2></div><div class="wysiwyg"><p>&nbsp;</p><p><strong>Experience Level:</strong> 4–12 Years</p><p><strong>Location:</strong> [Chennai/Remote]</p><p>&nbsp;</p></div></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/crux-full-stack-developer-senior-full-stack-lead">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/crux-full-stack-developer-senior-full-stack-lead</a></p>
</description>

    <item>
