      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Warsaw, Masovian Voivodeship, Poland
</p>

<p>We're looking for an experienced full-stack developer who excels at using AI-assisted development tools (Cursor IDE) to rapidly build and deploy features. You'll own projects end-to-end, work independently with AI pair programming, and help scale our development across multiple products.</p><p></p><p><strong>What You'll Do</strong></p><ul><li>Build full-stack features using Next.js, React, TypeScript, Prisma, PostgreSQL</li><li>Use Cursor IDE and AI assistants to accelerate development</li><li>Design database schemas and optimize queries</li><li>Integrate third-party APIs (Stripe, Supabase, music services)</li><li>Develop admin dashboards and complex UIs</li><li>Own projects from requirements to deployment</li></ul> <ul><li>5+ years full-stack development experience</li><li>Expert in TypeScript, React, Next.js, Node.js, PostgreSQL</li><li>Proven experience with Cursor IDE or similar AI coding assistants</li><li>Experience with Prisma, Supabase Auth, Stripe</li><li>Self-directed, fast learner, excellent problem-solver</li><li>Strong communication and documentation skills</li></ul><p></p><p><strong>Tech Stack</strong></p><p>Next.js 14+, React, TypeScript, Prisma, PostgreSQL (Supabase), Stripe, Vercel, Cursor IDE</p> <ul><li>Work at the cutting edge of AI-assisted development</li><li>Own projects and make technical decisions</li><li>Fast-paced, high-impact environment</li><li>Fully remote with flexible hours</li><li>Competitive compensation + equity</li></ul><p></p><p><strong>How to Apply</strong></p><p>Send your resume, GitHub profile, and examples of AI-assisted development work. Include a brief note about your experience with Cursor or similar tools.</p><p></p>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/creatunity-llc-senior-full-stack-developer-ai-assisted-development-remote">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/creatunity-llc-senior-full-stack-developer-ai-assisted-development-remote</a></p>

      <title>Vee Technologiesorporated: Product Engineering Operations Director</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Remote
</p>

<div class="col col-xs-7 description"><br><span><span><span>We are seeking a highly motivated and experienced <b>Product</b> <b>Engineering Operations Director (Project Engineer) </b>to join our growing team. </span><strong><span>This is a fully remote position.&nbsp; </span></strong><span>In this role, you will support Vee Technologies’ clients by leveraging deep expertise across mechanical, automotive, maritime, and industrial engineering domains.&nbsp; </span></span></span><br><br><span><span><span>This position partners closely with clients and offshore delivery teams to provide technical leadership, guide project execution, and act </span>as a critical liaison in developing and presenting customer-specific engineering solutions.&nbsp; The ideal candidate is a technically adept professional with a strong passion for enabling seamless, end-to-end project delivery.&nbsp;</span></span><br><br><span><span>You will take full ownership of client interactions, ensuring clear and effective communication, aligning technical requirements, and overseeing project execution in close collaboration with the offshore delivery teams. Success in this role requires a balance of strong engineering knowledge, client-facing leadership, and operational excellence.</span></span><br><br><span><span><b><span>Key Responsibilities:</span></b></span></span><br><br><span><span>Serve as primary liaison between client and offshore delivery teams to ensure project objectives, timelines and quality expectations are met. </span></span><ul><li><span><span>Lead the development of client projects, including reviewing engineering drawings, interpreting client quotations (RFQs), and translating requirements into clear, actionable project plans.</span></span></li><li><span><span><span><span>Maintain continuous communication with clients and internal teams to clarify scope, identify all applicable specifications, provide project status updates, address concerns, and proactively manage expectations.</span></span></span></span></li><li><span><span><span><span>Collaborate closely with clients and suppliers to negotiate design specifications, technical requirements, and cost estimates. &nbsp;</span></span></span></span></li><li><span><span><span><span>Optimize manufacturing processes by evaluating the balance between cost efficiency and production volumes.</span></span></span></span></li><li><span><span><span><span>Assess existing working methods and recommend improvements to process documentation, operational manuals and standard operating procedures.</span></span></span></span></li><li><span><span><span><span>Leverage engineering expertise to enhance conceptual solutions, support the design of new equipment, and redesign existing systems, to meet client specifications.&nbsp;&nbsp; Address unique or non-standard requirements by identifying root causes and implementing corrective actions.</span></span></span></span></li><li><span><span>Lead technical reviews, oversee corrective actions, and conduct in-depth analyses to continuously improve outcomes. </span></span></li><li><span><span>Manage project timelines, deliverables, and quality standards to ensure full compliance with contractual agreements.</span></span></li><li><span><span>Partner with sales teams to ensure a seamless transition of projects from post-sale to execution.</span></span></li><li><span><span>Build and sustain strong working relationships with clients and internal teams, fostering collaboration, trust and long-term partnerships.</span></span></li><li><span><span>Provide proactive leadership in navigating complex projects and delivering consistent, high-quality results.</span></span></li><li><span><span>Prior experience working with offshore delivery teams is highly preferred.</span></span></li></ul><br><span><span><b><span>Qualifications &amp; Skills:</span></b></span></span><ul><li><span><span>Bachelor’s degree in mechanical engineering, automotive engineering, or related experience required</span></span></li><li><span><span>6 to 10 years of experience in automotive, mechanical, maritime or industrial engineering</span></span></li><li><span><span>Strong working knowledge of Solid Works or other 3D software systems, with proficiency in AutoCAD and application-based engineering design. </span></span></li><li><span><span>Experience with pricing analysis, should-costing modeling, GD&amp;T and statistical tolerancing </span></span></li><li><span><span>Proven ability to build and maintain client relationships, identifying and leveraging business and technical opportunities.</span></span></li><li><span><span>Demonstrated success managing and collaborating with offshore delivery teams.</span></span></li><li><span><span>Exceptional verbal, written, presentations and interpersonal communication skills.</span></span></li><li><span><span>Demonstrated experience in developing client-specific technical solutions or serving in a customer-facing engineering role.</span></span></li><li><span><span>Strong organization and time-management skills with the ability to manage multiple projects concurrently.</span></span></li><li><span><span>Natural leadership qualities with a track record of initiative, problem solving, and continuous improvement.</span></span></li></ul><div></div><br><span><span><b><span>Compensation &amp; Benefits:</span></b></span></span><ul><li><span><span><span>Competitive base salary + commission ($100K – $140K)</span></span></span></li><li><span><span><span>Health, dental, and vision insurance</span></span></span></li><li><span><span><span>401(k) with company match</span></span></span></li><li><span><span><span>Paid time off and holidays</span></span></span></li><li><span><span><span>Professional development opportunities</span></span></span></li></ul><br><br><span><span><span><b><span lang="en"><span>Vee Technologies is an equal opportunity employer committed to diversity and valuing the ways in which we are different. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability, veteran status, or other characteristics protected by applicable law.</span></span></b></span></span></span><br><br>&nbsp;                </div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/vee-technologiesorporated-product-engineering-operations-director">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/vee-technologiesorporated-product-engineering-operations-director</a></p>

      <title>Mangomint: Senior Software Engineer</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country>🇦🇹 Austria, 🇬🇧 United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland, and 🇺🇸 United States of America</country>
      <state>California</state>
      <skills>AWS, PostgreSQL, React, SASS, Kotlin, TypeScript, and CSS</skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description><img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/4529/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" />

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Los Angeles, California
    <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://www.mangomint.com/">https://www.mangomint.com/</a>
</p>

<h2><strong>About Mangomint</strong></h2>
<p><a href="https://www.mangomint.com/">Mangomint</a>&nbsp;is a fast-growing SaaS company on a mission to make every salon and spa more profitable. We are already the&nbsp;<a href="https://www.capterra.com/sem-compare/salon-software/?utm_source=ps-google&amp;utm_medium=ppc&amp;utm_campaign=:1:CAP:2:COM:3:All:4:US:5:BAU:6:SOF:7:Desktop:8:BR:9:Salon&amp;network=g&amp;gclid=Cj0KCQjwo8S3BhDeARIsAFRmkONzVqpXcRTd9U5SXUn9GsHMtwaiuBTx_Q2xJqx5-7KvYJTvGVmnrn8aAu9KEALw_wcB">highest-rated</a>&nbsp;salon and spa software in the US and Canada with thousands of customers and seek to become the #1 market leader in the coming years.</p>
<p>We’re a primarily remote company, ambitious, and collaborative&nbsp;<a href="https://www.glassdoor.com/Overview/Working-at-Mangomint-EI_IE2539548.11,20.htm">team</a>&nbsp;that gathers together every few months. As we grow, we’re looking to attract high-potential individuals who want to be part of a winning team. If that’s you,&nbsp;<a href="https://jobs.ashbyhq.com/mangomint">come join us</a>!</p>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
<h2><strong>About the Role</strong></h2>
<p>As a Senior Software Engineer at Mangomint, you’ll play a critical role on our Connect Engineering team, building and scaling the core communication systems our customers rely on every day: emails, texting, and phone calls.</p>
<p>This role is focused on strengthening a mission-critical part of the product as we scale usage, integrations, and operational complexity. You’ll work across the full stack to design, build, and operate reliable communication features that integrate with external providers while delivering a seamless experience for customers and internal teams.</p>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
<p><strong>In the Senior Software Engineer role at Mangomint you will:</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>Develop new features across the whole stack, including data design, backend APIs, frontend React UI, mobile, and HTML/CSS</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Work deeply with external integrations and third-party services, ensuring reliability and observability</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Support the scaling of our systems as we grow and acquire new customers, and improve engineering standards, tooling, and processes to enable rapid development and iteration</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Troubleshoot and debug production issues across various services and layers of the stack, ensuring a stable, efficient, and resilient system for our customers</p>
</li>
</ul>
<h3><strong>Technologies You Will Work With</strong></h3>
<p>Backend/Rest API: Kotlin/JVM, PostgreSQL, AWS (RDS, SQS, Lambda, EC2/EB)</p>
<p>Frontend: Typescript, React, Sass/CSS</p>
<p>While experience or familiarity with our technology stack is a plus, it’s not a requirement. We care more about your general engineering skill set, and your ability to pick up new languages and technologies quickly.</p>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
<h2><strong>What We’re Looking For</strong></h2>
<ul>
<li>
<p>5+ years of experience in a software engineering role</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Experience as a Senior Software Engineer at a SaaS Company and with programming languages such as Kotlin, C#, Java, Ruby, etc.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Someone who enjoys being a generalist, working on the frontend, backend, and anything it takes to solve problems</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Experience building software and systems that balance simplicity, flexibility, and maintainability</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Ability to thrive in a collaborative and iterative environment, working and empathizing with teammates, internal stakeholders, and customers</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Someone skilled in completing projects from start to finish, using various technologies and systems, while balancing technical, business, and customer priorities.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Ability to stitch together many different services and processes even if you have not worked with them before</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
<h2><strong>What You'll Love About Us</strong></h2>
<ul>
<li>
<p>Health, dental, vision, life &amp; LTD insurance</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Generous monthly wellness budget for gym memberships, yoga, etc.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Premium subscription to the&nbsp;<a href="https://www.calm.com/?pid=googleadwords_int&amp;af_channel=googlesem&amp;af_c_id=14668023573&amp;af_adset_id=136070395885&amp;af_ad_id=603377958418&amp;af_siteid=g&amp;af_sub_siteid=&amp;af_keyword=kwd-316578326783&amp;af_sub3=c&amp;af_sub4=Cj0KCQiAkMGcBhCSARIsAIW6d0COoPkg49T2ESdqQlUlpJIF4KxYkRluepIYfFEFcGjSwxu10SAfBhoaAvuGEALw_wcB&amp;utm_medium=paid&amp;utm_source=googlesem&amp;utm_campaign=14668023573&amp;utm_content=homepage&amp;utm_term=kwd-316578326783&amp;gclid=Cj0KCQiAkMGcBhCSARIsAIW6d0COoPkg49T2ESdqQlUlpJIF4KxYkRluepIYfFEFcGjSwxu10SAfBhoaAvuGEALw_wcB">Calm</a>&nbsp;app</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><a href="https://www.onemedical.com/">One Medical</a>&nbsp;membership</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Flexible PTO</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>401k plan available (no matching)</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Employee stock option program</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
<h3><em><strong>Mangomint is an equal opportunity employer. We do not discriminate against any employee or job applicant on the basis of race, color, religion, sex (including pregnancy, sexual orientation, and gender identity), national origin, age, disability and genetic information (including family medical history).</strong></em></h3>

      <media:content url="https://wwr-pro.s3.amazonaws.com/logos/0018/9650/logo.gif" type="image/png"/>
      <title>Yoko Co: WordPress Support Engineer</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state>Virginia</state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description><img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0018/9650/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" />

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> McLean, VA
    <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://www.yokoco.com/">https://www.yokoco.com/</a>
</p>

<p>We’re seeking a WordPress Support Engineer who wants to make the world a better place through thoughtful troubleshooting, clear communication, and excellent technical support.</p>
<p>This isn’t just about closing tickets – it’s about building relationships, understanding problems, and showing our clients that we’ve got their back.</p>
<p>This role is perfect for someone who enjoys digging into problems, figuring out why things broke, and helping clients feel confident that their website is in good hands.</p>
<h2><strong>Why work at Yoko Co?</strong></h2>
<ul>
<li><strong>Do good, better:</strong>&nbsp;We exclusively serve clients who make a positive impact on the world. This is your chance to build things that help create a better place for all of us.</li>
<li><strong>4-day work week and lots of holidays.</strong>&nbsp;Mondays are flex days, meaning you’re free to take them off if you’re caught up on your work. Plus, we’re closed for nearly a full week at Thanksgiving (November), and two weeks at the end of the year, plus a bunch of other days, too.</li>
<li><strong>High performance, no jerks.</strong>&nbsp;You’ll collaborate with good people who believe in doing great work.</li>
<li><strong>Best Place to Work</strong>&nbsp;(and that’s not just our opinion). We’ve been named a Best Place to Work by the Inc. 5000 and Washington Business Journal.</li>
</ul>
<p>We value team members who are motivated by our mission and driven to make a positive impact. If you have a passion for excellence, a growth mindset, and a commitment to collaboration, we’d love to hear from you.</p>
<h2><strong>What you’ll do:</strong></h2>
<p>As part of our technical support team, you’ll troubleshoot client requests, implement fixes, and help ensure our clients’ websites continue running smoothly long after launch. The best candidates tend to be naturally curious problem-solvers who enjoy figuring out how systems work and helping people along the way.</p>
<p><strong>As such, you’ll:</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>Provide hands-on technical support for client websites, troubleshooting requests and helping ensure sites run smoothly long after launch</li>
<li>Diagnose technical issues, implement fixes, and coordinate with teammates when deeper investigation is needed</li>
<li>Communicate clearly with clients throughout the support process, helping them understand issues and feel confident in the solutions provided</li>
<li>Respond to incoming support requests with clear, friendly, and thoughtful communication</li>
<li>Troubleshoot and resolve a wide range of WordPress issues, including plugin conflicts, functionality bugs, layout problems, integrations, and unexpected site behavior</li>
<li>Read, debug, and occasionally modify HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and PHP within WordPress to diagnose problems and implement fixes</li>
<li>Apply WordPress core, plugin, and theme updates while ensuring compatibility and site stability</li>
<li>Monitor website health, performance, and security, proactively identifying potential risks or issues</li>
<li>Investigate and resolve issues related to hosting environments, DNS configuration, email delivery, analytics tracking, and third-party integrations</li>
<li>Conduct QA testing to confirm that updates and fixes function properly across browsers and devices</li>
<li>Provide CMS guidance or quick tutorials to help clients manage their websites effectively</li>
<li>Document support work clearly in the ticketing system to maintain visibility and accurate billing</li>
<li>Collaborate with developers, project managers, and strategists when requests require deeper technical investigation</li>
<li>Help maintain an organized support workflow so requests move forward smoothly</li>
<li>Contribute to improving internal support processes, documentation, and knowledge sharing</li>
</ul>
<h2><strong>What we’re looking for:</strong></h2>
<p>We’re less concerned with rigid checklists and more interested in capable, thoughtful problem solvers who communicate well and enjoy helping people.</p>
<p><strong>Strong candidates typically have:</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>3–5+ years of experience working with WordPress in a technical capacity</li>
<li>Strong understanding of WordPress themes, plugins, and site configuration</li>
<li>Comfort reading and modifying HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and PHP within WordPress</li>
<li>Experience debugging issues such as plugin conflicts, integrations, or unexpected site behavior</li>
<li>Familiarity with WordPress hosting environments, migrations, and DNS basics</li>
<li>Experience working within a support workflow or ticketing system</li>
<li>Excellent written and verbal communication skills</li>
<li>Fluent English for written and spoken communication</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>Bonus points for:</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>Experience with Git workflows</li>
<li>Experience supporting websites in a multi-client or agency environment</li>
</ul>
<h2>Examples of support work:</h2>
<p>To give you a better idea of the types of things you might encounter, here are a few examples of issues recently handled by our support team:</p>
<ul>
<li>Help a client understand why protected content isn’t accessible to the correct users</li>
<li>Investigate the connection between WordPress and SendGrid to figure out why transactional emails aren’t being delivered</li>
<li>Give a client tips on how to better optimize and format banner images they upload to their website</li>
<li>Diagnose why Google Analytics tracking code appears to be capturing only a fraction of site visitors</li>
<li>Migrate an outdated WordPress site from another hosting provider to our servers, update plugins, and help the client adjust DNS records</li>
<li>Troubleshoot an SSO login issue that keeps kicking users out of the dashboard</li>
<li>Triage a malware notification, clean malicious code, and harden the WordPress installation</li>
<li>Send a short screencast showing a client how to create columns in their page builder</li>
<li>Fix a layout bug caused by a plugin update that unexpectedly broke styling on a landing page</li>
</ul>
<h2><strong>However, maybe don’t apply if:</strong></h2>
<ul>
<li>Client communication isn’t something you enjoy</li>
<li>You prefer highly predictable work instead of solving a variety of technical problems</li>
<li>You find it frustrating when the solution to a problem isn’t immediately obvious</li>
</ul>
<p>Support work often requires patience, curiosity, and a willingness to dig into problems until the root cause becomes clear.</p>
<h2>What you get:</h2>
<p>You’ll get a flexible schedule, unlimited time off, a competitive salary, a profit share bonus (starting in your second year), the ability to work wherever you want, a personal development budget, and all US federal holidays and multiple weeks off at the end of the year to recharge. We’ll also offset your entire carbon footprint. If you’re in the US, we also offer health insurance, disability and life insurance, and 401(k) matching.</p>
<h2>More about us:</h2>
<p>We’re a group of people who are passionate about the work we do, the clients we serve, and improving our craft. We also care about each other — we don’t think of one another as coworkers or employees, but as fellow humans. From developers to designers, project managers to strategists, we bring out the best in each other.</p>
<p>We’ve been in business for over a decade, our whole team is remote, we’ve been named a Best Place to Work by the Inc. 5000 and the Washington Business Journal.</p>
<h2>To apply:</h2>
<p>If you’re interested, fill out our&nbsp;<a href="https://form.jotform.com/240285232476052">application form</a>. (An actual human from our team looks at every submission.&nbsp;<em>P.S. – We encourage you to include a video message!</em>)</p>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/yoko-co-wordpress-support-engineer">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/yoko-co-wordpress-support-engineer</a></p>
</description>

<div>&nbsp;</div>
<div><strong>About the role</strong></div>
<div>&nbsp;</div>
<div>We’re looking for a software engineer who wants to build end-to-end. You’ll report directly to the CTO and work across our React/Next.js frontend and TypeScript backend to ship new features into production. Occasionally, you’ll work with Python to build data pipeline integrations with our partners.</div>
<br>
<div><strong>What you’ll do</strong></div>
<ul>
<li>Implement new product features end-to-end in React, TypeScript, and Next.js (from data layer to UI).</li>
<li>Work with well-defined specifications, so you can focus on building instead of untangling unclear requirements.</li>
<li>Extend and reuse existing modules and components, keeping things consistent and maintainable.</li>
<li>Write tests and maintain code quality, ensuring reliability and readability.</li>
<li>Participate in CI/CD workflows, helping ensure smooth, repeatable deployments.</li>
</ul>
<br>
<div><strong>What we’re looking for</strong></div>
<ul>
<li>3–5+ years of professional software engineering experience.</li>
<li>Strong experience with React and TypeScript, comfortable with modern patterns and tooling.</li>
<li>Hands-on experience with Next.js, including routing and data fetching.</li>
<li>Experience with CI/CD pipelines and shipping code to production.</li>
<li>Proven track record of deploying software and owning features through release.</li>
<li>Clear, direct communication and a builder mindset: you like taking a specification and making it real.</li>
</ul>
<br>
<div><strong>Nice to have</strong></div>
<ul>
<li>Experience with serverless or cloud-native architectures.</li>
<li>Experience working in a JavaScript/TypeScript monorepo.</li>
<li>Familiarity with infrastructure-as-code or deployment automation tools.</li>
<li>Experience with Pulumi (with SST) and the event-driven architecture.</li>
<li>Familiarity with Python and data pipelines.</li>
</ul>
<div>
<p>&nbsp;</p>

    <item>
      <title>WALTER: Senior Software Engineer</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state>La Libertad</state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Remote
    <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://gowalter.co">http://gowalter.co</a>
</p>


<div>
<p>Senior Software Engineers at Stamped are hands-on builders responsible for designing, developing, and delivering high-quality software that powers our products. This role combines technical depth with product intuition — engineers are expected to think like product partners, not just implementers.</p>
<p>They work closely with Product and the Director of Engineering to rapidly prototype, validate, and scale solutions that drive measurable user value. Senior Engineers bring curiosity, empathy, and a bias for action, leveraging AI tools and modern practices to deliver with speed, reliability, and craftsmanship.</p>
<p>This role has a strong emphasis on user-facing development — building intuitive, performant interfaces and components that merchants interact with daily. While full-stack capability is valued, you'll spend significant time on front-end architecture, UI implementation, and ensuring excellent user experiences across our product suite.</p>
<p>Our current systems include a large .NET/C# foundation on the backend, so familiarity with these technologies is helpful for full-stack collaboration, but your primary focus will be o modern front-end development and the user experience layer.</p>
<p>This group sits at the center of Stamped's shift toward an AI-native, iterative engineering culture — emphasizing autonomy, accountability, and shared ownership across the team.</p>
<h3><strong>Responsibilities</strong></h3>
<ul>
<li><strong>Product Engineering:</strong>&nbsp;Design, build, test, and ship user-facing features with a focus on polish, performance, and usability.</li>
<li><strong>Front-End Development:</strong>&nbsp;Build and maintain responsive, accessible UI components and interfaces using modern frameworks and tooling.</li>
<li><strong>Prototyping &amp; Validation:</strong>&nbsp;Rapidly prototype new user experiences to validate value before scaling.</li>
<li><strong>AI-Enabled Development:</strong>&nbsp;Use AI tools (e.g., Copilot, Claude, or similar) to accelerate development, reduce repetitive work, and improve code quality.</li>
<li><strong>Technical Judgment</strong>: Participate in front-end architecture decisions, component design patterns, and client-side performance optimization. Contribute to discussions on full-stack integration and API design.</li>
<li><strong>Execution &amp; Ownership:&nbsp;</strong>Deliver against roadmap commitments with a focus on quality, maintainability, and iteration — especially on user-facing surfaces.</li>
<li><strong>Collaboration:</strong>&nbsp;Partner closely with Product and the Director of Engineering to align technical work with customer and business needs. Work alongside designers to ensure high-fidelity implementation of user experiences.</li>
<li><strong>Knowledge Sharing:</strong>&nbsp;Document, mentor, and contribute to a culture of learning and openness.</li>
<li><strong>Continuous Improvement:&nbsp;</strong>Stay curious and experimental with new tools, frameworks, and AI workflows that can improve speed, quality, or developer experience.</li>
</ul>
</div>


<h2>Requirements</h2>
<div>
<ul>
<li>5+ years of professional software engineering experience, with significant time spent on front-end or full-stack development</li>
<li>Strong proficiency with modern JavaScript/TypeScript and front-end framework (React, Vue, or similar) — experience building scalable, maintainable component architectures</li>
<li>Experience with responsive design, accessibility standards, and client-side performance optimization</li>
<li>Familiarity with backend technologies and APIs — experience with C#/.NET, Node.js, Python, or similar is a plus for full-stack collaboration</li>
<li>Experience with cloud infrastructure (AWS preferred)</li>
<li>Demonstrated use of AI tools or automation in the development workflow</li>
<li>Product mindset: comfort with ambiguity, iteration, and user-centric decision-making</li>
<li>Excellent communication and collaboration skills; thrive in cross-functional teams</li>
</ul>
</div>


<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/walter-senior-software-engineer">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/walter-senior-software-engineer</a></p>
</description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> San Francisco
    <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://codesignal.com/">https://codesignal.com/</a>
</p>

<div>We are looking for a Software Engineer who wants to be an impactful part of a small team looking to change the way technical hiring is done. In this role, you will be an integral part of our Product Engineering team and will drive features with immediate business impact to our core products:&nbsp;<a href="https://codesignal.com/products/pre-screen/">Assessments</a>,<a href="https://codesignal.com/products/interview/">&nbsp;Interviews</a>, and&nbsp;<a href="https://codesignal.com/learn/course-paths">Learn</a>. You’ll be a key member of the team that builds and maintains our identity and authentication systems, tying all of our products together.</div>
<div>To learn more about the kinds of projects we work on, check out our<a href="https://codesignal.com/blog/engineering/">&nbsp;</a><a href="https://codesignal.com/blog/engineering/">Engineering blog</a>! Some noteworthy projects include:</div>
<ul>
<li><a href="https://codesignal.com/blog/engineering/why-we-moved-from-mongodb-meteor-observers-to-redis/">Why we moved from MongoDB &amp; Meteor observers to Redis</a></li>
<li><a href="https://codesignal.com/blog/engineering/what-we-learned-when-10000-users-hit-our-platform-at-once/">What we learned when 10,000 users hit our platform at once</a></li>
<li><a href="https://codesignal.com/blog/engineering/how-to-avoid-issues-with-your-html-email-formatting/">How to avoid issues with your HTML email formatting</a></li>
</ul>
<div><strong>Day-to-Day&nbsp;</strong></div>
<ul>
<li>Contribute to building product features across the full stack (from the front-end to the back-end to separate microservices)</li>
<li>Develop clean and maintainable code, with an emphasis on quality and craftsmanship</li>
<li>Conduct code reviews and collaborate with your peers</li>
<li>Lead technical design discussions on features where you're able to lend your expertise</li>
</ul>
<div><strong>Basic Qualifications</strong></div>
<ul>
<li>At least 4 years of professional, full-time software engineering experience</li>
<li>Clear and effective communication skills</li>
<li>Drive and initiative for getting things done</li>
<li>Experience with TypeScript/JavaScript (browser, Node, or both)</li>
<li>Available to work full-time. Candidates must be based within GMT-GMT+6 timezones.</li>
</ul>
<div><strong>Bonus Points for the Following</strong></div>
<ul>
<li>Experience with any part of our stack:</li>
<li>React</li>
<li>Node</li>
<li>MongoDB</li>
<li>GraphQL</li>
<li>Experience with SSO, SCIM or RBAC.</li>
<li>Any experience in a related industry, including assessments, HR tech, or education.</li>
</ul>

      <description><img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/2173/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" />

</p>

<div class="position-content">
<div class="position-description">We are seeking experienced Software Engineers to contribute to projects across a wide range of technologies and programming languages, including JavaScript, Python, Go, C++, Ruby, and more.<br>This is an open-ended contract opportunity, structured around project-based work with no set schedules or minimum time or task commitments. Contributors who work with us decide which available projects they'd like to work on, when they work, and how much they contribute, which makes it an excellent option for those seeking flexible and high-impact work.<br>In this role, you will help advance AI research by understanding complex systems, exploring large codebases, and developing approaches to verify the correctness of software behavior.<br>
<h3>Compensation</h3>
<ul>
<li>$70 per hour after passing the qualification</li>
<li>Fully remote</li>
<li>Project based work, no minimum time or task commitments</li>
</ul>
<h3>Responsibilities</h3>
<ul>
<li>Rapidly build context in large, multi-module codebases</li>
<li>Analyze feature implementations for correctness and edge cases</li>
<li>Produce clear, structured documentation of findings and rationale</li>
</ul>
<h3>Requirements</h3>
<ul>
<li>Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or a related field</li>
<li>At least 2 years of experience as a Software Engineer</li>
<li>Excellent written communication skills</li>
<li>Ability to clearly explain complex technical concepts</li>
</ul>
<h3>Location</h3>
<p>Remote in the US, UK, Canada, Europe, Australia, or New Zealand</p>
</div>
</div>
